Hello,
$5.
That’s the amount I am humbly asking you to chip in to my campaign today to help me win this critical House seat. Yes, just $5.
$5 because in 2022, I lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes in the closest race in the entire country.
$5 because we scared off Boebert, but now this race is going to be a lot harder to win.
$5 because all the pundits say that this time, we absolutely _can_ win this seat.
And $5 because the Super PACs are already attacking me, and I need your help to counter their lies if we’re going to win.
I know $5 might not seem like much, but together with tens of thousands of other grassroots donors like you, we can take on the corporate PACs and special interests. We cannot stop here or let up.
We’ve set a goal to raise another $100,000 before our mid-April fundraising deadline, but right now, we are still short.

clean_body: I am humbly asking you to chip in to my campaign today to help me win this seat. Hello, $5. That’s the amount I am humbly asking you to chip in to my campaign today to help me win this critical House seat. Yes, just $5. $5 because in 2022, I lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes in the closest race in the entire country. $5 because we scared off Boebert, but now this race is going to be a lot harder to win. $5 because all the pundits say that this time, we absolutely can win this seat. And $5 because the Super PACs are already attacking me, and I need your help to counter their lies if we’re going to win. I know $5 might not seem like much, but together with tens of thousands of other grassroots donors like you, we can take on the corporate PACs and special interests. We cannot stop here or let up. We’ve set a goal to raise another $100,000 before our mid-April fundraising deadline, but right now, we are still short. = Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = It means the world to know I have the support of people like you on this journey again. Thank you so much in advance. With gratitude - Adam ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. name: Debbie
subject: what I told viewers on MSNBC:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
I am unapologetically pro-choice, and I will always fight to protect reproductive freedom.
| | |
---
Hi, friend — **did you see me on _MSNBC_ last week?**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82983544/466924271/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1087-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTU3MDI1MjMtZjZmOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6WozLQxqHfJzkT-hLm6vzt1H2kUHG2F5Gyr0-n63jho=)
Last week, the Florida Supreme Court triggered Ron DeSantis' six-week abortion ban with almost no exceptions for rape or incest will automatically take effect on May 1.**But they also ruled to put abortion rights on the ballot this November, so voters can have the final word on the GOP's extremist bans.**
That's why I was so glad to discuss the news with Chris Hayes and spread the word nationwide about how high the stakes are in Florida's elections.
Listen: **My opponent, Rick Scott, co-sponsored a nationwide ban on abortions that would put doctors in prison.** He even endorsed Ron DeSantis' ban, saying, _“I am 100% pro-life and if I was still governor, I would sign this bill.”_
**_Ya no más_. I am unapologetically pro-choice, and I will always fight to protect reproductive freedom.**
So now that abortion will be the driving force at the ballot box this November, Rick Scott is absolutely _spiraling._**__ It's no secret why his fellow extremists tried so hard to keep the question off the ballot in the first place:**
_He**knows** that 67% of Floridians oppose these deadly bans._
_He**knows** that Florida is ready to follow other states in rejecting abortion bans._
_He**knows** Florida voters will protect our right to privacy, our right to choose, and our most basic freedoms at the polls this November._
But with Democrats' slim Senate majority on the line, he could still somehow win this fight: He's already spent** $3 MILLION **running attack ads .._. and I just got word after the decision, he immediately wrote another check for more airtime this month._
**I'm not just up against an extremist, friend — I'm up against a _multi-millionaire_ extremist. clean_body: I am unapologetically pro-choice, and I will always fight to protect reproductive freedom. | | | Hi, friend — did you see me on MSNBC last week? = Last week, the Florida Supreme Court triggered Ron DeSantis' six-week abortion ban with almost no exceptions for rape or incest will automatically take effect on May 1.But they also ruled to put abortion rights on the ballot this November, so voters can have the final word on the GOP's extremist bans. That's why I was so glad to discuss the news with Chris Hayes and spread the word nationwide about how high the stakes are in Florida's elections. Listen: My opponent, Rick Scott, co-sponsored a nationwide ban on abortions that would put doctors in prison. He even endorsed Ron DeSantis' ban, saying, “I am 100% pro-life and if I was still governor, I would sign this bill.” Ya no más. I am unapologetically pro-choice, and I will always fight to protect reproductive freedom. So now that abortion will be the driving force at the ballot box this November, Rick Scott is absolutely spiraling. It's no secret why his fellow extremists tried so hard to keep the question off the ballot in the first place: Heknows that 67% of Floridians oppose these deadly bans. Heknows that Florida is ready to follow other states in rejecting abortion bans. Heknows Florida voters will protect our right to privacy, our right to choose, and our most basic freedoms at the polls this November. But with Democrats' slim Senate majority on the line, he could still somehow win this fight: He's already spent $3 MILLION running attack ads ... and I just got word after the decision, he immediately wrote another check for more airtime this month. I'm not just up against an extremist, friend — I'm up against a multi-millionaire extremist. With this momentum on our side, we have a golden opportunity to build the resources it'll take to retire him, so long as I can count on your help. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for being a part of this movement to turn the tides in Florida. Debbie | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

We thought Democrats would jump at the chance to abolish the Electoral College...
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=21246%2E4449941%2EwgtsVc)
---
**This must be some mistake:** []() When we emailed you yesterday, we thought Democrats would jump at the chance to abolish the Electoral College... _**but hardly anyone donated!**_

We’re **way** behind pace to make our $10,000 ad payment. If we don’t make up the difference soon, we could be forced to pull down our ads.

[**That’s why it’s crucial that we raise the final $7,879 to fully fund our Electoral College ads and support our work before midnight tomorrow. Please, chip in $7 (2X-MATCHED) now »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/41960?t=7&akid=21246%2E4449941%2EwgtsVc) | [2X-MATCH $7 now to help fund our ads to abolish the Electoral College and support our work »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/41960?t=8&akid=21246%2E4449941%2EwgtsVc)
---
We have two choices:
**CHOICE #1:** Sit on our hands and hope that the Electoral College doesn’t hand extremist Trump another corruption-riddled presidency.

**CHOICE #2:** Chip in [**$7**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/41960?t=9&akid=21246%2E4449941%2EwgtsVc) to help fund our ads to abolish the Electoral College, strengthen our democracy, and save the country from Trump.
---
[**Please, Trump has never won the popular vote. If the Electoral College is abolished, he has no chance of winning in 2024. 2X-MATCH $7 now to help fund our ads and support our work »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/41960?t=10&akid=21246%2E4449941%2EwgtsVc)

name: Governor Scott Walker
subject: Should colleges protect Jihadist sympathizers?
body:
We need your feedback on an urgent threat to freedom that is taking place on college campuses nationwide. | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=aa387738b523444ab81735c9ba2c8ffb&_t=FckPH-S6qpO1NCLKRa4i0GQrV0A-NazhDdOJcIqoPgn7TQXuRmKeM8Fakumacf050NDlzh1aF0YyW6K2j0WkenXzOendLFRvysklRFaxACg%3D)_
---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=aa387738b523444ab81735c9ba2c8ffb&_e=G5QgOA_2n80kivoWMWL_xLPL92URODZwCnWV2QYas-_4OqVMdsKgEMpI8V18cg7cT5IP6grWw2dIT95J4h222BfMuF87izluaoWK-Wbig98QXiyo0GskgPFZQALqZ32YiOFeCT9GpwypPD1c_wTeYIb3_uhr9UTlup4-b-_fa0bm-Q2j81xBerb1eawVX1e3SdxBKfDdo0ImFeDNoo1s8KNDoCHCal9EuVI6rp5qXQB_kQkRprl15BppuagSdP7x1bDXoZar4o_PreI5gvb53V6hfSUnkmezYuwhz0mZAyHRjLtdMOKbfmpL8rIuVXyfp0J8FgKE4-XwIOnYf2757oYWsGKLoSV6hC4HLYuGFMyckA6QvRwQBlY16_eRJa9nnahvxWAJuM8W9NPUL5dQlQ%3D%3D)
Fellow Patriot,

We need your feedback on an urgent threat to freedom that is taking place on college campuses nationwide.

Leftist administrators are pushing a radical, woke agenda on our children and grandchildren. Yet, students have never been more eager to hear your conservative values of individual freedom, a strong national defense, free enterprise, and traditional values.

But thanks to increasing censorship by college administrators, students often can't hear your conservative ideas. Many students seeking to learn conservative ideas face leftist bullying, harassment, and discrimination.

Worse still, colleges and universities are now providing safe havens for radical Jihadist sympathizers and their hate-America ideologies.

That's why I am looking for 100 people today to share their thoughts on the current state of higher education.

Your response right now will help raise awareness about what everyday Americans think about the woke policies sweeping through higher education before it is too late.

Click here to take our short, five-question _State of Higher Education Survey_ : **[https://yaf.org/offers/2024-state-of-higher-education-survey/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=aa387738b523444ab81735c9ba2c8ffb&_e=G5QgOA_2n80kivoWMWL_xLPL92URODZwCnWV2QYas-_4OqVMdsKgEMpI8V18cg7cT5IP6grWw2dIT95J4h222BfMuF87izluaoWK-Wbig98QXiyo0GskgPFZQALqZ32YiOFeCT9GpwypPD1c_wTeYIb3_uhr9UTlup4-b-_fa0bm-Q2j81xBerb1eawVX1e3SdxBKfDdo0ImFeDNoo1s8KNDoCHCal9EuVI6rp5qXQB_kQkRprl15BppuagSdP7xxaEasFkpLjxsYC4qhyJ_MgYJVNuOioc2TUnBKsoPp6Daz9Fr_MLUYQtLfVZxuUd-0GvK9plb1-65AKs0Z_dZKTfCPQxB4ePldoZOIgRZm322kStetgSHNEhwSZ3wYmPZfTW52qZ5dupY0gL_5RyfUg%3D%3D)**

Thank you for standing for freedom.

Governor Scott Walker
**President of Young America 's Foundation**
* * *

---
_**Young America 's Foundation**
11480 Commerce Park Drive Suite 600
Reston, VA 20191-1556

800.USA.1776_

subject: Donald Trump just endorsed Bob’s opponent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2681%2E552475%2EYXoUGv)
Peter, we need you to read this:
Donald Trump _just_ held a rally in Pennsylvania where he gave his full endorsement to Bob’s opponent, David McCormick, and came after Bob by name.
**[This endorsement is sure to rally GOP donors to give large sums to our opponent, so we need all hands on deck to fight back now that McCormick has Donald Trump’s full support. Will you rush a donation now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240413-3?refcode=em20240413-3&refcode2=2681_552475_YXoUGv&akid=2681%2E552475%2EYXoUGv)**
**[Rush $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240413-3?refcode=em20240413-3&refcode2=2681_552475_YXoUGv&akid=2681%2E552475%2EYXoUGv)**
With both the Senate and the White House hinging on Pennsylvania, we have to be prepared for whatever Trump and MAGA Republicans throw our way.
Thank you in advance.
Team Casey

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

---
Friend on Monday, my SHAM trial in New York begins.
**THEY WANT ME IN PRISON!**
_Democrats are chomping at the bit_. They think if you see me sitting in court, it will be the end of the MAGA Movement.
If we fail to have a MASSIVE outpouring of peaceful patriotic support - right here, right now - _**all Hell will break loose.**_
| [**STAND WITH TRUMP**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj29h2u4gniperq3elvjp8ofsfrngqq1odos982g_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1geaoj5chh2bs)
---
_#1 Democrats will say the end of our campaign is near._
_#2 The hateful LIARS in the media will say our movement is FINISHED._
_#3 And worst of all? THE ABSOLUTE WORST! They’ll start to say supporters like YOU have GIVEN UP on me..._
BUT I KNOW THAT’S NOT TRUE! MY SUPPORTERS ARE THE GREATEST PEOPLE IN THE HISTORY OF THE COUNTRY!
**Rabid Democrats are poised to raise MILLIONS while I’m stuck defending myself in court.**
Listen, I’m sure you get a lot of these messages, but now it’s time for ALL of us to send the Democrats, the media, and the Globalist Deep State a message they’ll NEVER forget.
[**Before the day is over, I’m calling on ONE MILLION pro-Trump patriots to chip in and say, I’LL NEVER GIVE UP ON PRESIDENT TRUMP! >**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0sdi5cppfuh599vudd7c174kam8tr4qim5jhi70_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1geaoj5chh2bs)

---
Remember, the only thing standing between freedom & the TOTAL OBLITERATION of our country is your support.
YOUR SUPPORT fuels our Patriotic movement.
And only with YOUR SUPPORT will we win back the White House.
[**So from the bottom of my heart, I’m asking for you to peacefully stand by my side just one more time >**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvc35llb6v3r4lekmfjjpv21291ad5gan696pk5o_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1geaoj5chh2bs)

Thank you,
President Trump

name: Lara Trump
subject: I have an important favor to ask you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
Will you step up to support your Party?

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32020%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=colz7V%2b5AHqcyDiDgT7YFA&sysid=1)

Friend,

Before the RNC’s first **[FEC End-of-Quarter Deadline Report](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32021%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tCJrRp727ZsXck5X82cVvw&sysid=1) **since I assumed the role of Co-Chair, I have an important favor to ask.

Will you help set the tone for incredible Republican victories up and down the ballot by contributing **[$25](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32022%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4CQeMeGEiIvlaprzVNi48w&sysid=1) **toward our End-of-Quarter Goal?

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32023%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ignJ804FxCjrvAZ6YJOajQ&sysid=1)

I promise you, Friend, your generous contribution will be well worth it when we elect President Trump back to the White House by historic margins.

Every cent you give will go DIRECTLY to turning out the vote, protecting the vote, and raising massive amounts of money for our mission to Save America.

**[**I’m doing everything in my power to Make America Great Again, and I hope you’ll do the same by contributing $25 toward our End-of-Quarter Goal right away. >>**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32024%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NTJmngkUHN%2bZ4WFKmrsokg&sysid=1)**

Thank you,

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32035%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AXfSypWIYZEMpnClOh%2boqg&sysid=1)
Lara Trump

subject: On Monday all hell breaks loose!

body:
Democrats want me in prison. It’s bad.

|
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z37r6o48uk4gdci2dtuhm3m8761ev3fdm0fdc3kg_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1ge1o74c9h2bs)
---
| |
---
**ON MONDAY ALL HELL BREAKS LOOSE!**
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zim8p5812gu1j213vfpgsfli7bn7evt7r5hp7638_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1ge1o74c9h2bs)
---
Friend on Monday, my SHAM trial in New York begins.
**THEY WANT ME IN PRISON!**
_Democrats are chomping at the bit_. They think if you see me sitting in court, it will be the end of the MAGA Movement.
If we fail to have a MASSIVE outpouring of peaceful patriotic support - right here, right now - _**all Hell will break loose.**_
| [**STAND WITH TRUMP**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztt7610hvj03bj6rk3lm5rc9o7ctcoep9vcc6n08_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1ge1o74c9h2bs)
---
_#1 Democrats will say the end of our campaign is near._
_#2 The hateful LIARS in the media will say our movement is FINISHED._
_#3 And worst of all? THE ABSOLUTE WORST! They’ll start to say supporters like YOU have GIVEN UP on me..._
BUT I KNOW THAT’S NOT TRUE! MY SUPPORTERS ARE THE GREATEST PEOPLE IN THE HISTORY OF THE COUNTRY!
**Rabid Democrats are poised to raise MILLIONS while I’m stuck defending myself in court.**
Listen, I’m sure you get a lot of these messages, but now it’s time for ALL of us to send the Democrats, the media, and the Globalist Deep State a message they’ll NEVER forget.
[**Before the day is over, I’m calling on ONE MILLION pro-Trump patriots to chip in and say, I’LL NEVER GIVE UP ON PRESIDENT TRUMP! >**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5v1nt2b7rss82pm008ibmtth1si9f983b1gn9to_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1ge1o74c9h2bs)
| [**STAND WITH TRUMP**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zeda4dpdf52ikmo0o0pd6am1gk3o56v4vqdcs08g_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1ge1o74c9h2bs)
---
Remember, the only thing standing between freedom & the TOTAL OBLITERATION of our country is your support.
YOUR SUPPORT fuels our Patriotic movement.
And only with YOUR SUPPORT will we win back the White House.
[**So from the bottom of my heart, I’m asking for you to peacefully stand by my side just one more time >**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z97cft0qejg3vom9ik0hmp13c0hk7hamg03o1gv0_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1ge1o74c9h2bs)
| [**STAND WITH TRUMP**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zus8q7ovl1rgkkoee6qupg9r7j3v3t9p9ncclml8_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1ge1o74c9h2bs)
---
Together we will win back the White House and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
Thank you,
President Trump
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za6hsg9cen2vkiqqugrqtf786fo1tru68tp5j6a8_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1ge1o74c9h2bs)

body:

We need to rip a page out of the Democrats' playbook and go on the _**[offensive...](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfdmv6b53h0gcuaop4nth47m70s2vicv6bmg9d8o_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1ge1o73c9h2bs)**_

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg51m3m0pmv3m1usts9qt2acjjm8s4211672p4n8_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1ge1o76cth2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqv9jeqi5891kahtt9aoanq6rh0gpudcjonnpe4o_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1ge1o76cth2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztm950jnucn5n2rkle5bq839o7ut7t7ipo5h1c18_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1ge1o76cth2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c690879%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=X7CwpYj1h9VBehIgPykkZQ&sysid=1)

---
_Yours for a gift of ANY AMOUNT!_
---
This book, fittingly titled _MTG_ , is a must-read for Americans like YOU who want to understand what’s really happening in Washington, D.C. and how one person can take on the political elite and make a difference for We the People. Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene’s story will inspire YOU to work harder than ever to save our country, just like we’re committed to doing EVERY DAY at Turning Point Action alongside our True Grassroots Network. **[Friend, will you make a generous gift of $25, $50, $75, or even $100 to help Turning Point Action SAVE AMERICA this year? As my thanks for your gift of ANY AMOUNT- even just $5! -- I’ll send YOU a copy of Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene’s book _MTG._](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c690870%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WY4EEYwB1K7wx9SBnWD8bQ&sysid=1)** I can only make this offer while Turning Point Action still has copies of _MTG_ available, so please don’t miss out. Make your gift and claim your book right away!
---
[Make your gift & claim your book](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c690871%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y4DGtEcHWTQNWUmE8YjWRQ&sysid=1)
---
Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene's book is a rallying cry for all freedom-loving patriots who are fed up with the D.C. Swamp. She pulls no punches in exposing the corruption, cowardice, and sheer disdain for the American people that runs rampant among the political class ... and she also shows the power of _one True Conservative Leader_ to make a difference in Congress. **Friend, like you, Turning Point Action is on the FRONT LINES of this same battle.** At Turning Point Action, we understand that America needs BOLD and UNAPOLOGETICALLY PATRIOTIC leadership - and with the help of grassroots patriots like YOU, we’re getting out the vote for the BIGGEST class of Pro-America Leaders EVER. **That’s why, when you make a generous gift to Turning Point Action today, you’re not _just_ securing a copy of Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene’s book...** **... you’re helping to build the FIRST and BIGGEST ballot-chasing operation on the Right: Turning Point Action’s CHASE THE VOTE!** In fact, your gift will have a powerful impact on Turning Point Action’s efforts to recruit, train, and deploy a GRASSROOTS ARMY of ballot chasers in the must-win precincts and battleground states in 2024. **[Please, Friend, make your most generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 today to help Turning Point Action CHASE THE VOTE and SAVE AMERICA in 2024- and as my thanks for your gift of ANY AMOUNT, I’ll send you a copy of _MTG_ , while our supplies last.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c690872%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XLljxv4%2fsQKsHBP2a8%2fqDA&sysid=1)**

---
The D.C. Swamp will fight us at every step, just like they’ve done during Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene’s entire time in Congress. But - just like MTG - we won’t give up the fight, we won’t bend a knee to the so-called “political elite,” and that’s why we WILL win and we WILL get out the vote to WIN and SAVE AMERICA this year. **[Please chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can to help Turning Point Action CHASE THE VOTE and WIN BIG this year, and I’ll be sure to get your copy of _MTG_ to you as quickly as I can.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c690873%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n2cUH86uGi%2fxF%2fRietAuOw&sysid=1)** Thank you for your patriotism, for your moral courage, and for your support. A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

name: Roger Ream
subject: There is Right and Wrong
body:
You see it on the news. Our universities are failing our students. A radical left-wing agenda is indoctrinating too many students with the principles of moral relativism.

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z09mrd87h95v4gep15ejqqbuhpups5pp5ljsinno_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1ie4ob2cjh2bs)
---
Friend, You see it on the news.
Our universities are failing our students.
A radical left-wing agenda is indoctrinating too many students with the principles of moral relativism. And it's resulting in a generation that doesn't know the difference between right and wrong. A generation that increasingly doesn't understand the principles of honorable leadership. As an organization that has spent 57 years working with young people, these are some of the most challenging days since our founding. But fortunately, there are still brave young college students out there living the principles of honorable leadership. And while their peers spend time attacking Israel and engaging in unconscionable, anti-semitic protests, students associated with TFAS's Student Journalism Association stand up and fight for the truth.

When the Chicago Black Lives Matter and the University of Chicago Students for Justice in Palestine stood with Hamas on October 7, students at the University of Chicago's _Chicago Thinker_ exposed those groups' support for terrorism.
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpa1tbun30kq6ivg0lth8jjifqrh2fu9dhbelpfo_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1ie4ob2cjh2bs)
---
_Friend, TFAS is committed to supporting brave students like Jahmiel Jackson (and others at_ the _Chicago Thinker) who show honorable leadership. And we do that through our Student Journalism Association, but we need your support to do it._ That's why we're trying to raise $15,000 for them. And 100% of the money you donate today will directly fund the Student Journalism Association and the over a dozen student newspapers we support. [And that is why we're hoping that you will help us support these students by donating whatever you can right now!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zulm1faukb6kjm89bvot95nvdkp6rt7fekcl45ro_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1ie4ob2cjh2bs) In TFAS's 57 years we've focused on teaching courageous young people the principles of civics, free markets, and honorable leadership. And the Student Journalism Association is our latest effort to help these students!
It gives conservative and libertarian college students the training, mentoring, and financial support they need to launch, manage, and lead conservative newspapers on campus.

Friend, this support means that on many campuses (even ones as radical as Harvard), there are conservative voices fighting the radical agenda that dominates the quad. In fact, the Harvard Salient denounced students on their own campus who were supporting terrorism, stating there is "no excuse for a Harvard student-or any American-to carry water for these groups." These brave young conservatives are standing up for what's right when they denounce these evil terrorists. And while that shouldn't be hard, on today's college campuses, it often is.
* 51% of college students would support a socialist
* 33% of college students deny that Hamas committed these atrocities
* 20% of Social Science professors are avowed marxists.

That is what these students are dealing with every day while they stand up for what's right.
That's why it's so important that TFAS stands with these students.

[And it's why we hope you will join us in standing with them by donating anything (from $5 to $5,000) to help us give these students the support they NEED to make a difference.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zru0cck9rhervap4iv3imqut4nopgkoq2v6559lo_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1ie4ob2cjh2bs) Sincerely,

Roger Ream President The Fund for American Studies
---
| The Fund for American Studies (TFAS), 1706 New Hampshire Ave., NW, Washington, DC 20009, United States
---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9ur0vli9fs3rjjsvsjdoh71tm5ic1iabslqkhr8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8oj3c5j6epr246h22sh2s8i6ep36c1ie4ob2cjh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9agrvn0v2jv2ja9vcaoqpudjfv98orvseab1f6o_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1ie4ob2cjh2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zefha4htneqgoupcgiq982ciammk8im8ds9tv458_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr4cpg69oj1c9ie49fg)

And while their peers spend time attacking Israel and engaging in unconscionable, anti-semitic protests, students associated with TFAS's Student Journalism Association stand up and fight for the truth. When the Chicago Black Lives Matter and the University of Chicago Students for Justice in Palestine stood with Hamas on October 7, students at the University of Chicago's Chicago Thinker exposed those groups' support for terrorism. Friend, TFAS is committed to supporting brave students like Jahmiel Jackson (and others at the Chicago Thinker) who show honorable leadership. And we do that through our Student Journalism Association, but we need your support to do it. That's why we're trying to raise $15,000 for them. And 100% of the money you donate today will directly fund the Student Journalism Association and the over a dozen student newspapers we support. In TFAS's 57 years we've focused on teaching courageous young people the principles of civics, free markets, and honorable leadership. And the Student Journalism Association is our latest effort to help these students! It gives conservative and libertarian college students the training, mentoring, and financial support they need to launch, manage, and lead conservative newspapers on campus. Friend, this support means that on many campuses (even ones as radical as Harvard), there are conservative voices fighting the radical agenda that dominates the quad. In fact, the Harvard Salient denounced students on their own campus who were supporting terrorism, stating there is "no excuse for a Harvard student-or any American-to carry water for these groups." These brave young conservatives are standing up for what's right when they denounce these evil terrorists. And while that shouldn't be hard, on today's college campuses, it often is. 51% of college students would support a socialist 33% of college students deny that Hamas committed these atrocities * 20% of Social Science professors are avowed marxists. That is what these students are dealing with every day while they stand up for what's right. That's why it's so important that TFAS stands with these students. Sincerely, Roger Ream President The Fund for American Studies | The Fund for American Studies (TFAS), 1706 New Hampshire Ave., NW, Washington, DC 20009, United States 1600 Daily PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Sarah DeValkenaere
subject: In prison for saving a life
body:
I wish I could sit down with you face to face instead of writing this e-mail.

Dear Friend,

I wish I could sit down with you face to face instead of writing this e-mail.
[](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkL2K4zAUhZ9G7hT0a8mFixkcT5OEJVtsKa51rzMCyQ6KwrJvv0zY7af9OBzOd36dwxlSTtvtAoXGNddQtxYWDJkyrrzS1iAHJZThwnBpgu5wFHJAYzoapZNa-N4q0X2OblmNQrWgJxh6jVEiRq8XICLnrO_S-NUjjDTCmd72BzsMK3oJi5dkBzcwIyBTbYe1EuFeYMOcFqrtT6X7Xtsh7qXL42dr9wfTb0zNTM0Pis9KB9gI91eCqfk1nqnZA1ktIXK_6shNROKgneUkl945kN4Ojun52Up47M8aienpffrg1-OFqf4LF8L0LExPx_M_EqHcId02pqf_OuF9-gin42maw89JhevxEn688fl07eqI998p5_ToHTPiViDll0X71td_AwAA__9cuIFa)
That's a picture of me and my husband, Eric, so you at least know what we look like.

Eric is a Detective with the Kansas City Police Department.

I wanted to send a picture of us with our three beautiful children - but in this current political climate, I don't feel safe sharing photos of our kids on the Internet.

When I tell you what happened, I think you'll understand. **[And I pray that you'll find it in your heart to help me save my husband.](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkL2K4zAUhZ9G7hT0a8mFixkcT5OEJVtsKa51rzMCyQ6KwrJvv0zY7af9OBzOd36dwxlSTtvtAoXGNddQtxYWDJkyrrzS1iAHJZThwnBpgu5wFHJAYzoapZNa-N4q0X2OblmNQrWgJxh6jVEiRq8XICLnrO_S-NUjjDTCmd72BzsMK3oJi5dkBzcwIyBTbYe1EuFeYMOcFqrtT6X7Xtsh7qXL42dr9wfTb0zNTM0Pis9KB9gI91eCqfk1nqnZA1ktIXK_6shNROKgneUkl945kN4Ojun52Up47M8aienpffrg1-OFqf4LF8L0LExPx_M_EqHcId02pqf_OuF9-gin42maw89JhevxEn688fl07eqI998p5_ToHTPiViDll0X71td_AwAA__9cuIFa)**

You see, it all started in early December - a few weeks before Christmas.

One of Eric's fellow detectives witnessed two vehicles speeding through the city streets - one was clearly chasing the other - and the police helicopter quickly got involved. A spotter in the helicopter was able to locate the suspect in a red pickup truck... still speeding down city streets.

The driver, 26-year-old Cameron Lamb, was chasing his ex-girlfriend in a stolen truck - weaving across lanes and running through stoplights.

My husband and his partner responded to the call and caught up with the suspect as he attempted to back the stolen truck into a garage.

Both detectives got out of their police vehicles and approached the stolen truck while repeatedly ordering the suspect to STOP and SHOW HIS HANDS.

That's when it happened.

**As Eric 's partner approached the driver's side, the suspect reached into his waistband and pulled out a handgun - pointing it directly at the detective.**

**My husband 's police training kicked in.**

He fired four rounds in the direction of the suspect through the truck's front windshield. The truck continued traveling into the garage where it finally came to a stop.

When officers entered, they found the suspect deceased - his arm hanging out the open window with a .45 semi-automatic pistol on the ground below.

That night, when Eric returned home, I hugged him and burst into tears. I was so thankful he was safe - and hopeful we could move forward and put this episode behind us.

But it didn't end there.

Several months later, the local prosecutor _charged Eric with MANSLAUGHTER and Armed Criminal Action._

I was in shock.

Then late last year, my husband finally went to trial. The judge ruled against him - and Eric was sentenced to 6 years in prison.

Now you understand why I'm asking for your help.

My husband is an honest man of integrity who followed in his father's law enforcement footsteps. Eric himself is a decorated, 21-year veteran of the Kansas City Police Department.

He's a role model in our community - a Little League baseball coach, a tireless volunteer, and a loving husband and father.

My husband is a hero.

But it didn't matter to the prosecutor that the suspect recklessly swerved a stolen truck through city streets... that he was violent toward his ex-girlfriend and endangered the lives of her two children... that he pointed a stolen gun directly at a police officer.

For serving our community for over 20 years - and risking his life - my has been shipped to an out-of-state prison.

And since the Missouri Supreme Court recently declined to take up Eric's case, that's where he'll stay for the next six years unless he receives a pardon from the Governor of Missouri. He'll miss our wedding anniversaries, our children's birthdays, their graduations(?), and our home will be left without the father and husband we love.

Even if Eric's good name is eventually cleared, just thinking about the cost of his defense and now our efforts to get him pardoned is overwhelming...

... but thank God we got a call from Jason Johnson, President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF).

If you've ever heard of LELDF you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly accused police officers like Eric.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops - and their families - at their lowest moments.

And with the thought of trying to suddenly raise our three children alone - I was certainly at one of the lowest moments of my life.

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help provide Eric with the best possible legal defense, but now they're helping us launch a nationwide petition campaign urging Missouri Governor Mike Parson to pardon Eric.

But as a non-profit organization, they depend solely on generous gifts from folks like you to defend officers like Eric.

I truly believe God is using Jason and the LELDF to answer our prayers.

That's because my husband and I are not wealthy people. I'm a kindergarten teacher and Eric is a career cop.

So I must ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone.

**Will you donate[$35 or any amount to LELDF today to help save my husband?](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkL2K4zAUhZ9G7hT0a8mFixkcT5OEJVtsKa51rzMCyQ6KwrJvv0zY7af9OBzOd36dwxlSTtvtAoXGNddQtxYWDJkyrrzS1iAHJZThwnBpgu5wFHJAYzoapZNa-N4q0X2OblmNQrWgJxh6jVEiRq8XICLnrO_S-NUjjDTCmd72BzsMK3oJi5dkBzcwIyBTbYe1EuFeYMOcFqrtT6X7Xtsh7qXL42dr9wfTb0zNTM0Pis9KB9gI91eCqfk1nqnZA1ktIXK_6shNROKgneUkl945kN4Ojun52Up47M8aienpffrg1-OFqf4LF8L0LExPx_M_EqHcId02pqf_OuF9-gin42maw89JhevxEn688fl07eqI998p5_ToHTPiViDll0X71td_AwAA__9cuIFa)**

If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I am so scared for Eric and I will do whatever I can for him - and for our children.

**[So I pray you'll find it in your heart today to make a tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100 or more to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund.](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkL2K4zAUhZ9G7hT0a8mFixkcT5OEJVtsKa51rzMCyQ6KwrJvv0zY7af9OBzOd36dwxlSTtvtAoXGNddQtxYWDJkyrrzS1iAHJZThwnBpgu5wFHJAYzoapZNa-N4q0X2OblmNQrWgJxh6jVEiRq8XICLnrO_S-NUjjDTCmd72BzsMK3oJi5dkBzcwIyBTbYe1EuFeYMOcFqrtT6X7Xtsh7qXL42dr9wfTb0zNTM0Pis9KB9gI91eCqfk1nqnZA1ktIXK_6shNROKgneUkl945kN4Ojun52Up47M8aienpffrg1-OFqf4LF8L0LExPx_M_EqHcId02pqf_OuF9-gin42maw89JhevxEn688fl07eqI998p5_ToHTPiViDll0X71td_AwAA__9cuIFa)**

Eric and I - and our three kids - are counting on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you to help bring Eric home where he belongs.

No matter what you're able to give today, please pray for us. Thank you in advance for your support.

Sincerely,

Sarah DeValkenaere

P.S. The Missouri Supreme Court has declined to take Eric's case. Now a pardon is one of the last remaining options to bring Eric home. We're feverishly trying to raise the money to pay for a massive petition drive urging the Missouri Governor Mike Parson to pardon Eric. I know my husband is innocent. But it's so hard to be a cop these days. The 'defund the police' movement has wiped out the support officers like Eric need to do their jobs.

And dozens of prosecutors across the country have made it a priority to try and lock up as many cops as they can. Even if they followed their training or defended themselves in the line of duty. The brave men and women in blue need to know that someone... anyone still has their back.

**[That's why I sincerely hope you'll help me get justice for Eric - and our entire family - by making a tax-deductible gift of any amount to the LELDF today.](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkL2K4zAUhZ9G7hT0a8mFixkcT5OEJVtsKa51rzMCyQ6KwrJvv0zY7af9OBzOd36dwxlSTtvtAoXGNddQtxYWDJkyrrzS1iAHJZThwnBpgu5wFHJAYzoapZNa-N4q0X2OblmNQrWgJxh6jVEiRq8XICLnrO_S-NUjjDTCmd72BzsMK3oJi5dkBzcwIyBTbYe1EuFeYMOcFqrtT6X7Xtsh7qXL42dr9wfTb0zNTM0Pis9KB9gI91eCqfk1nqnZA1ktIXK_6shNROKgneUkl945kN4Ojun52Up47M8aienpffrg1-OFqf4LF8L0LExPx_M_EqHcId02pqf_OuF9-gin42maw89JhevxEn688fl07eqI998p5_ToHTPiViDll0X71td_AwAA__9cuIFa)**

Thank you, and God bless!
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_

clean_body: I wish I could sit down with you face to face instead of writing this e-mail. Dear Friend, I wish I could sit down with you face to face instead of writing this e-mail. That's a picture of me and my husband, Eric, so you at least know what we look like. Eric is a Detective with the Kansas City Police Department. I wanted to send a picture of us with our three beautiful children - but in this current political climate, I don't feel safe sharing photos of our kids on the Internet. When I tell you what happened, I think you'll understand. You see, it all started in early December - a few weeks before Christmas. One of Eric's fellow detectives witnessed two vehicles speeding through the city streets - one was clearly chasing the other - and the police helicopter quickly got involved. A spotter in the helicopter was able to locate the suspect in a red pickup truck... still speeding down city streets. The driver, 26-year-old Cameron Lamb, was chasing his ex-girlfriend in a stolen truck - weaving across lanes and running through stoplights. My husband and his partner responded to the call and caught up with the suspect as he attempted to back the stolen truck into a garage. Both detectives got out of their police vehicles and approached the stolen truck while repeatedly ordering the suspect to STOP and SHOW HIS HANDS. That's when it happened. As Eric 's partner approached the driver's side, the suspect reached into his waistband and pulled out a handgun - pointing it directly at the detective. My husband 's police training kicked in. He fired four rounds in the direction of the suspect through the truck's front windshield. The truck continued traveling into the garage where it finally came to a stop. When officers entered, they found the suspect deceased - his arm hanging out the open window with a .45 semi-automatic pistol on the ground below. That night, when Eric returned home, I hugged him and burst into tears. I was so thankful he was safe - and hopeful we could move forward and put this episode behind us. But it didn't end there. Several months later, the local prosecutor charged Eric with MANSLAUGHTER and Armed Criminal Action. I was in shock. Then late last year, my husband finally went to trial. The judge ruled against him - and Eric was sentenced to 6 years in prison. Now you understand why I'm asking for your help. My husband is an honest man of integrity who followed in his father's law enforcement footsteps. Eric himself is a decorated, 21-year veteran of the Kansas City Police Department. He's a role model in our community - a Little League baseball coach, a tireless volunteer, and a loving husband and father. My husband is a hero. But it didn't matter to the prosecutor that the suspect recklessly swerved a stolen truck through city streets... that he was violent toward his ex-girlfriend and endangered the lives of her two children... that he pointed a stolen gun directly at a police officer. **I put a bullet through Osama bin Laden's skull, Friend. **

It's Rob O'Neill. I'm a Navy SEAL. At my core, I am built to serve this country; I will do _**WHATEVER**_ it takes to make America safe and prosperous.

I hope you share that sentiment. And if you don't, then the rest of this message just isn't for you. Feel free to delete this email and move on with your life if you're not committed to American excellence.

**If you 're still reading, then I thank you for your commitment. And now, I'm counting on you to rise to the occasion, Friend. **

My Navy SEAL brother, Senior Chief Derrick Van Orden, needs your help. He served our nation for over 25 years in the Navy and fought extremists from the Taliban to Al-Qaeda. He's one of the most patriotic & hard-working men I know. Today, he's still serving our country by representing true American patriots like you & me in Congress.

I'm not a swamp-dwelling politician - I don't have support from mega-donors or Super PACs. I'm just like you - **a concerned American who loves this nation and will always do the right thing.**

[The Democrats are going at me with everything they've got, and I'll need all the help I can get to protect this seat. name: Roger Ream
subject: Fighting Anti-Semitism on Campus
body:
You see it on the news. Our universities are failing our students. A radical left-wing agenda is indoctrinating too many students with the principles of moral relativism.

| [ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32156%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wHW11aGkDoL9dTpHJOk99g&sysid=1)
---
Friend, You see it on the news.
Our universities are failing our students.
A radical left-wing agenda is indoctrinating too many students with the principles of moral relativism. And it’s resulting in a generation that doesn’t know the difference between right and wrong. A generation that increasingly doesn’t understand the principles of honorable leadership. As an organization that has spent 57 years working with young people, these are some of the most challenging days since our founding. But fortunately, there are still brave young college students out there living the principles of honorable leadership. And while their peers spend time attacking Israel and engaging in unconscionable, anti-semitic protests, students associated with TFAS’s Student Journalism Association stand up and fight for the truth.

When the Chicago Black Lives Matter and the University of Chicago Students for Justice in Palestine stood with Hamas on October 7, students at the University of Chicago’s _Chicago Thinker_ exposed those groups’ support for terrorism.
---
[ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32157%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0cWry0m0w8%2bwxLVZl6pgiQ&sysid=1)
---
_Friend, TFAS is committed to supporting brave students like Jahmiel Jackson (and others at_ the _Chicago Thinker) who show honorable leadership. And we do that through our Student Journalism Association, but we need your support to do it._ That’s why we’re trying to raise $15,000 for them. And 100% of the money you donate today will directly fund the Student Journalism Association and the over a dozen student newspapers we support. [And that is why we’re hoping that you will help us support these students by donating whatever you can right now!](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32158%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zSyk8x0dvmwWd0sv7YbU%2bg&sysid=1) In TFAS’s 57 years we’ve focused on teaching courageous young people the principles of civics, free markets, and honorable leadership. And the Student Journalism Association is our latest effort to help these students!
It gives conservative and libertarian college students the training, mentoring, and financial support they need to launch, manage, and lead conservative newspapers on campus.

Friend, this support means that on many campuses (even ones as radical as Harvard), there are conservative voices fighting the radical agenda that dominates the quad. In fact, the Harvard Salient denounced students on their own campus who were supporting terrorism, stating there is “no excuse for a Harvard student-or any American-to carry water for these groups.” These brave young conservatives are standing up for what’s right when they denounce these evil terrorists. And while that shouldn’t be hard, on today’s college campuses, it often is.
* 51% of college students would support a socialist
* 33% of college students deny that Hamas committed these atrocities
* 20% of Social Science professors are avowed marxists.

That is what these students are dealing with every day while they stand up for what’s right.
That’s why it’s so important that TFAS stands with these students.

[And it’s why we hope you will join us in standing with them by donating anything (from $5 to $5,000) to help us give these students the support they NEED to make a difference.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32159%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fhnXmzedC%2bSxFsPGU7SN9g&sysid=1) Sincerely,

Roger Ream President The Fund for American Studies
---
| The Fund for American Studies (TFAS), 1706 New Hampshire Ave., NW, Washington, DC 20009, United States
---

Your America News
---

When the Chicago Black Lives Matter and the University of Chicago Students for Justice in Palestine stood with Hamas on October 7, students at the University of Chicago’s Chicago Thinker exposed those groups’ support for terrorism. Friend, TFAS is committed to supporting brave students like Jahmiel Jackson (and others at the Chicago Thinker) who show honorable leadership. And we do that through our Student Journalism Association, but we need your support to do it. That’s why we’re trying to raise $15,000 for them. And 100% of the money you donate today will directly fund the Student Journalism Association and the over a dozen student newspapers we support. In TFAS’s 57 years we’ve focused on teaching courageous young people the principles of civics, free markets, and honorable leadership. And the Student Journalism Association is our latest effort to help these students! It gives conservative and libertarian college students the training, mentoring, and financial support they need to launch, manage, and lead conservative newspapers on campus. Friend, this support means that on many campuses (even ones as radical as Harvard), there are conservative voices fighting the radical agenda that dominates the quad. In fact, the Harvard Salient denounced students on their own campus who were supporting terrorism, stating there is “no excuse for a Harvard student-or any American-to carry water for these groups.” These brave young conservatives are standing up for what’s right when they denounce these evil terrorists. And while that shouldn’t be hard, on today’s college campuses, it often is. 51% of college students would support a socialist 33% of college students deny that Hamas committed these atrocities * 20% of Social Science professors are avowed marxists. That is what these students are dealing with every day while they stand up for what’s right. That’s why it’s so important that TFAS stands with these students. Sincerely, Roger Ream President The Fund for American Studies | The Fund for American Studies (TFAS), 1706 New Hampshire Ave., NW, Washington, DC 20009, United States Your America News Your America News • PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Liberty Delivered is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a178f10e47740a7a099081e8574d33b&_e=wadntE2N3WNvGaJ9o9H_TBl1ZK2RPtobiwG863FEcpenTmyXq6lHSmaGomcQctAmPNHCSAncjlVyeartUMy82WEaaHHLVqf3LZ1i3yDu1PZGQR-24it67Eh__j70zFY6OrKJ7r0DhgWSWyLzPeSjYmWMkKC69dp2r7ckK7liexxBXCJsIOt2XH7Uqhzv4-dSp1P6A0qKlXdAPvdlZ7XpwwascvwsW93v0hhGvb4zZYMMYJ_r1ZG0AGimTJV9tPIYAf8YabvoESi3zqv2HK5RoUnkwc9fk3Twox4Hl2Zl69P_hilmHDFuGSrVm8qhB0jXnGPcoDbiJVNcirdjv0FOcvuC13UE-7OsNe52mPElUd85Ts5jUXrG9uSJpcYclPLQNqdwDggAuqJWCMQ2wjqvcQ%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a178f10e47740a7a099081e8574d33b&_e=wadntE2N3WNvGaJ9o9H_TBl1ZK2RPtobiwG863FEcpenTmyXq6lHSmaGomcQctAmPNHCSAncjlVyeartUMy82WEaaHHLVqf3LZ1i3yDu1PZGQR-24it67Eh__j70zFY6OrKJ7r0DhgWSWyLzPeSjYmWMkKC69dp2r7ckK7liexxBXCJsIOt2XH7Uqhzv4-dSp1P6A0qKlXdAPvdlZ7XpwwascvwsW93v0hhGvb4zZYMMYJ_r1ZG0AGimTJV9tPIYvMO-u05JfQz_RoRwavq2aIj6TuaTIM3GzohCbmMMwFM2DjcWj0CBwb83t0hCesg7wMwWmaEINeHV4kvJ2pMbCi4BXVKoqu3kbdP0oKF3G_jsAI3MKDZ1FM1mQWtWOOJw7n2QkMJUxY_K4XqFc6rmOg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a178f10e47740a7a099081e8574d33b&_e=wadntE2N3WNvGaJ9o9H_TBl1ZK2RPtobiwG863FEcpenTmyXq6lHSmaGomcQctAmPNHCSAncjlVyeartUMy82WEaaHHLVqf3LZ1i3yDu1PZGQR-24it67Eh__j70zFY6OrKJ7r0DhgWSWyLzPeSjYmWMkKC69dp2r7ckK7liexxBXCJsIOt2XH7Uqhzv4-dSp1P6A0qKlXdAPvdlZ7XpwwascvwsW93v0hhGvb4zZYMMYJ_r1ZG0AGimTJV9tPIYfvqa4SO4dJ3fp-cuQlqWaDXCWQVKe1lGO4qy4tCC6xRXMA1Pv8uODw0pwvcVm0J6E3Z9jtKM79xTkF645sVf_odAl6hYT1gJeejiLVKZ5tFggZSXdPjET3tQ4RU8H1gEQVdK0BlDYEb7cq0qF4RDIQ%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a8a0dd3f7f844b5fac8173b372c5c97b&_e=_iOHkAzYBiYyL5ZLYF-cHIDJFS5iFo6i0okEqOxDaCJ5REtKtTIRSu9boIf4tJ9BYkjoMBTOnHfwJBs4pxPSHLn3_QCDuA7OkhAEptcRThKR3pagOeHCrSAbZB8yNPB8nxRSzQuQEK7INDsrer3nGu7GsA3Ogu_rhss5bxOye2PJEYJMWH5ClWEj7ejqkKbacbeVH4ctjbqk_uUo6rKOargMd_Yhgi3pNZhDXX5K0GxvashzN5XYiTeGp0-u6f8m9RRjgtw8ZUBdfagAQbUipHp80WmI5GClUP2S1AoVXJs5WGZt35yJ5BrAeDdc8qgyE6Iej3GgWmtcjAYA3pBnwbsXcvpL5YX9LiaPjQY2gPGQEx7ru8fSUBp4rwx-iy-cTmxtbHKsNHX-xmrgfbrqVA%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a8a0dd3f7f844b5fac8173b372c5c97b&_e=_iOHkAzYBiYyL5ZLYF-cHIDJFS5iFo6i0okEqOxDaCJ5REtKtTIRSu9boIf4tJ9BYkjoMBTOnHfwJBs4pxPSHLn3_QCDuA7OkhAEptcRThKR3pagOeHCrSAbZB8yNPB8nxRSzQuQEK7INDsrer3nGu7GsA3Ogu_rhss5bxOye2PJEYJMWH5ClWEj7ejqkKbacbeVH4ctjbqk_uUo6rKOargMd_Yhgi3pNZhDXX5K0GxvashzN5XYiTeGp0-u6f8mLlBm7xWXMOAhsOQ5iBjEvajyN6gR9GQbR5cmi92LytS3g3vo-AGzKDQk7oYPUkaqKQYTNEl15u5ClTQ5rOP1pgLXECxNIBi8FbjfkX1zqMvPLnqPxHfuNOhJLIkkLLgR-FVXerx99W2kFNanXOWHMg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a8a0dd3f7f844b5fac8173b372c5c97b&_e=_iOHkAzYBiYyL5ZLYF-cHIDJFS5iFo6i0okEqOxDaCJ5REtKtTIRSu9boIf4tJ9BYkjoMBTOnHfwJBs4pxPSHLn3_QCDuA7OkhAEptcRThKR3pagOeHCrSAbZB8yNPB8nxRSzQuQEK7INDsrer3nGu7GsA3Ogu_rhss5bxOye2PJEYJMWH5ClWEj7ejqkKbacbeVH4ctjbqk_uUo6rKOargMd_Yhgi3pNZhDXX5K0GxvashzN5XYiTeGp0-u6f8mEwbtZX0WZH3rMrraFXpu1dXGJts22JsCp27A7rCiZMhNzM-eYk-UtpF0qtyd8mqgIqHRlyqbdDFrBP8Id888hjed9N3Qkhf_oz-3GVD6taqZnU_4vhZI5Lv1P2OiP55HoLAVbblC-l0vcA9gVBYDrg%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Freedom Nation Today
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

body:

Friend,

If this goes on any longer, we might have to close up shop.

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7608164bb0d24fe5b6357708c91c8136&_e=wPd_JgZQZeujS1_oDevaydwAvL7cDWwkMwR6t6R327prB5cw2KAZJwlXc7SbNP723m86sbu_8if7Xj3UFg0YSYzOVe2H6ksvvDfRHEnovOQrmZ5KuBVyLvJKndzPwqglxcAqiX6tHJw826hjwfoobPCBkEStF_zZf7HTNM0prU_HGg8b8iT6fLee6PCuIv7TcL4pTbt6CBD8xDognOVTDp76T-Lr20HUXHR4v33MWjcTC8SYY58yikHTEk18znT0X4ARJWs1KWYh6rL5i57NKe3ROo1oENg5rhT9pClCLF1Aur_UY3Hpq1CxzPTbGom8KO2lEqdCDoASjJTd9YUZij4zazYDdOnLQM0rWHd5wo6NrKPw-qgQWuSNXcfxUnju_aMPTyv3K_Be_Hw9tkNRvQ%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7608164bb0d24fe5b6357708c91c8136&_e=wPd_JgZQZeujS1_oDevaydwAvL7cDWwkMwR6t6R327prB5cw2KAZJwlXc7SbNP723m86sbu_8if7Xj3UFg0YSYzOVe2H6ksvvDfRHEnovOQrmZ5KuBVyLvJKndzPwqglxcAqiX6tHJw826hjwfoobPCBkEStF_zZf7HTNM0prU_HGg8b8iT6fLee6PCuIv7TcL4pTbt6CBD8xDognOVTDp76T-Lr20HUXHR4v33MWjcTC8SYY58yikHTEk18znT0iOaLpk1qTyMACAw85LbtnOAUuM1aX_e1IXviIFdUuIUiykgwMVNZZWul5DgLLWWHLSAdGXarIvVetGNd3hnL0TvnXqsOlJjDtX255VPxfKj0SpdaSygouq3SIQqLN24cJHVpmUnN0IW3WJl6oavhGQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7608164bb0d24fe5b6357708c91c8136&_e=wPd_JgZQZeujS1_oDevaydwAvL7cDWwkMwR6t6R327prB5cw2KAZJwlXc7SbNP723m86sbu_8if7Xj3UFg0YSYzOVe2H6ksvvDfRHEnovOQrmZ5KuBVyLvJKndzPwqglxcAqiX6tHJw826hjwfoobPCBkEStF_zZf7HTNM0prU_HGg8b8iT6fLee6PCuIv7TcL4pTbt6CBD8xDognOVTDp76T-Lr20HUXHR4v33MWjcTC8SYY58yikHTEk18znT0Ccf-CiDuezdtWQMf6Dwhx-phDrjP9qoOKq7cQCjsBrgqdGRCMKLS1ughzceqVG2MXiDGftF5ewi-grOCC-tLShVbz5hbdJbbV28fyOejwWeL5Gje9vYMVNEzXAdi55RDPeNSqsVbb0lR37sVYQ7iiQ%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |

Defend the Constitution

Friend,

Will you help set the tone for incredible Republican victories up and down the ballot by contributing **[$25](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5387e0de0b1b4ae58446536638803c91&_e=8hkqkGKNKwkYxrjn9SSl4IaWMgZXEiZkpHDbYIt0U2QuURVD4vo-Vx2p4mrb_A4h8hCm35Gb4FSv_lw-4ovE7UaKeZyK0GxlerGIPdVA3SK162ch2jtUNfPHbZ9B6JlpkSM9kvTvMLgN5Nj8a-iowQNfEvk-ECSzu2fAEessYFYyQ6YwEU2xUpxHQ2ZRId5eZ-azczWlrSpMVC-z8SVIsz8W1pX3L6ua1SfGsTJz23jMDmsjUSzfPkLM8a-1INNFjD9E9JPwOLnfWs5NdIw-KkVCeAQUg_hhIxY_5Fdro8I2SBgYgiNQv6XxD6uXEfNUozfTwXdtptfJ-EpVHo95tercPloEfpWDDVZdYcafrtLIhltt1_jLfdYykwN2o6USVrx76cioEjZ4Koi8sSrkEFNjypVGnO9uBJcFWdylkv_OY0YyvJnjxEcN1RSinzjwVQpMUiAfCohYGwXGTSn1AH75E4ZQJbh0-zWkUXJjYvRpS-AROk4FAzJCZEC1BSNN) **toward our End-of-Quarter Goal?

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5387e0de0b1b4ae58446536638803c91&_e=8hkqkGKNKwkYxrjn9SSl4IaWMgZXEiZkpHDbYIt0U2QuURVD4vo-Vx2p4mrb_A4h8hCm35Gb4FSv_lw-4ovE7UaKeZyK0GxlerGIPdVA3SK162ch2jtUNfPHbZ9B6JlpkSM9kvTvMLgN5Nj8a-iowQNfEvk-ECSzu2fAEessYFYyQ6YwEU2xUpxHQ2ZRId5eZ-azczWlrSpMVC-z8SVIsz8W1pX3L6ua1SfGsTJz23jMDmsjUSzfPkLM8a-1INNFjD9E9JPwOLnfWs5NdIw-KkVCeAQUg_hhIxY_5Fdro8I2SBgYgiNQv6XxD6uXEfNUozfTwXdtptfJ-EpVHo95tU1knuDYMJD9jqN8B_-D6IGS90aHmRcNUxTgA5Rg5yXeCbFkk8dHbNQIHM_H33xvo_V0pHkf27KBx0agOIzmnGd1LWtLgItnMkJMaob4cZ_TsBHnq0sGOVK3FzTiyRqIuc4eNX-QXFV4j4puQACfmKbvkI3DlykJzcBQlgwRNGaR)

I promise you, Friend, your generous contribution will be well worth it when we elect President Trump back to the White House by historic margins.

Every cent you give will go DIRECTLY to turning out the vote, protecting the vote, and raising massive amounts of money for our mission to Save America.

**[**I 'm doing everything in my power to Make America Great Again, and I hope you'll do the same by contributing $25 toward our End-of-Quarter Goal right away. >>**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5387e0de0b1b4ae58446536638803c91&_e=8hkqkGKNKwkYxrjn9SSl4IaWMgZXEiZkpHDbYIt0U2QuURVD4vo-Vx2p4mrb_A4h8hCm35Gb4FSv_lw-4ovE7UaKeZyK0GxlerGIPdVA3SK162ch2jtUNfPHbZ9B6JlpkSM9kvTvMLgN5Nj8a-iowQNfEvk-ECSzu2fAEessYFYyQ6YwEU2xUpxHQ2ZRId5eZ-azczWlrSpMVC-z8SVIsz8W1pX3L6ua1SfGsTJz23jMDmsjUSzfPkLM8a-1INNFjD9E9JPwOLnfWs5NdIw-KkVCeAQUg_hhIxY_5Fdro8I2SBgYgiNQv6XxD6uXEfNUozfTwXdtptfJ-EpVHo95tercPloEfpWDDVZdYcafrtKmT7ZH_IQs2SXaCAXjEFp7dsC8sWsmnrfjUIL9_ZcEcb6LVYMjejff2EkWVJXByHoSUDfTFeTLEC0d5e-2cKVGmsYdPw02k_c4_Za9kQw0p_FuprH7dx3Z8J8iOLUd1pGIqid0GQHm4M6NsYpviWQt)**

body:
Before we lose our country for good, can you sign this letter to President Trump?

|

body:
I’ve now represented 50 Americans who have been politically charged for peacefully protesting on January 6th.

[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_ds27fGn-U7i9k1wnmne0w~~/AARclAA~/RgRn_k7SP0SbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC1jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1sYXctdW5pb24vcGFyZG9uLW1iLXBvcGE_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wYXJkb24mdXRtX21lZGl1bT1wb3BhJnV0bV90Yz1ST04yLTIwMjQwNDE0JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjVXA3NwY0IKZhA1tBtmcaNMsFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_ds27fGn-U7i9k1wnmne0w~~/AARclAA~/RgRn_k7SP0SbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC1jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1sYXctdW5pb24vcGFyZG9uLW1iLXBvcGE_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wYXJkb24mdXRtX21lZGl1bT1wb3BhJnV0bV90Yz1ST04yLTIwMjQwNDE0JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjVXA3NwY0IKZhA1tBtmcaNMsFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) Dear Patriot,

I've now represented 50 Americans who have been politically charged for peacefully protesting on January 6th.

And of those, 12 jury trials have been held.

Despite my best efforts and Harvard Law pedigree, the guilty verdicts keep coming.

I firmly believe no attorney in America could return a "not guilty" verdict for these Americans. It is impossible as **these are Biden's SHOW TRIALS to dole out political punishment**.

My job is to preserve appeals for these men and women while pursuing other strategies I cannot openly discuss. However, my organization, NCLU, **[needs your help to keep the fight alive](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_ds27fGn-U7i9k1wnmne0w~~/AARclAA~/RgRn_k7SP0SbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC1jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1sYXctdW5pb24vcGFyZG9uLW1iLXBvcGE_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wYXJkb24mdXRtX21lZGl1bT1wb3BhJnV0bV90Yz1ST04yLTIwMjQwNDE0JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjVXA3NwY0IKZhA1tBtmcaNMsFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~).**

I have now spent months camped out in the Swamp as I work these trials, and it is costing us tens of thousands of dollars with each trial . . . and that's our expenses between accommodations and travel for staff, family, and witnesses. **[Will you chip in to help cover our costs?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_ds27fGn-U7i9k1wnmne0w~~/AARclAA~/RgRn_k7SP0SbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC1jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1sYXctdW5pb24vcGFyZG9uLW1iLXBvcGE_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wYXJkb24mdXRtX21lZGl1bT1wb3BhJnV0bV90Yz1ST04yLTIwMjQwNDE0JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjVXA3NwY0IKZhA1tBtmcaNMsFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**

This past week, my client, a young family man named Jared Kastner, was found guilty on all counts and will be sentenced in the coming months. His offense? While traveling to Washington with his church group, he peacefully entered the Capitol, damaging or disturbing nothing and harming no one.

Jared and his wife, Kaitlyn, have a beautiful seven-month-old daughter and are expecting their second. **If Biden's DOJ gets its way, Jared will likely spend the first years of his newborn's life in Federal Prison**.

My subsequent trial for Bryan Smith begins on May 6th. What the government has done to this man is truly evil, and our trial prep has already started.

I need to purchase airline tickets for my team to return to DC and book hotel rooms. **[ I would appreciate any amount you can contribute](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_ds27fGn-U7i9k1wnmne0w~~/AARclAA~/RgRn_k7SP0SbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC1jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1sYXctdW5pb24vcGFyZG9uLW1iLXBvcGE_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wYXJkb24mdXRtX21lZGl1bT1wb3BhJnV0bV90Yz1ST04yLTIwMjQwNDE0JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjVXA3NwY0IKZhA1tBtmcaNMsFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** to offset these costs.

While we defend these Americans in court, Biden's Department of Justice continues their arrests. Just scan the news. As I write you, a Cincinnati man was arrested for following a group of people through the open doors of the Capitol.

**And Biden will not give up**. They won't stop arresting Americans until November has passed and the political games they play are over.

The wheels of justice turn slowly despite the rapid-fire show trials that are now occurring, and **I pray that in less than a year, my clients and the other 1,300 Americans who have been charged will be fully pardoned.**

In the meantime, **we must fight with everything we have to keep these men and women out of federal prison as jobs and homes are being lost and, sadly, families are being broken**. **[Will you help?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_ds27fGn-U7i9k1wnmne0w~~/AARclAA~/RgRn_k7SP0SbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC1jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1sYXctdW5pb24vcGFyZG9uLW1iLXBvcGE_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wYXJkb24mdXRtX21lZGl1bT1wb3BhJnV0bV90Yz1ST04yLTIwMjQwNDE0JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjVXA3NwY0IKZhA1tBtmcaNMsFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**

Thank you for **[any support you can provide](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_ds27fGn-U7i9k1wnmne0w~~/AARclAA~/RgRn_k7SP0SbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC1jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1sYXctdW5pb24vcGFyZG9uLW1iLXBvcGE_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wYXJkb24mdXRtX21lZGl1bT1wb3BhJnV0bV90Yz1ST04yLTIwMjQwNDE0JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjVXA3NwY0IKZhA1tBtmcaNMsFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** to help me keep fighting.

In Vigilance,

John M. Pierce
Chairman and Founder

name: Lara Trump
subject: I have an important favor to ask you
body:
You see it on the news. Our universities are failing our students. A radical left-wing agenda is indoctrinating too many students with the principles of moral relativism.

| [ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e37c7b0fc5274f75b0b0d12b392e4c60&_e=HRyUwrNg5_N76kicdIxzJKx5nz2whiRxtkKbReB6wkHKKTw9XfQnZ-nn_FPpSvfEyPdq_rY1R4uwJuZGebtyrweTS2__2af-3-jG-DzKUzYL9DYOT2ZAw4j_o6fcH_C8rx9CGgJ3GUBq3o3ksG3K2Xv0_kreGOOKLBOwRMLTAN5E28REtfACiNDGh3aTKRyyqJ6E51d6rUf52m2B3QH7UhR-bj4IJyAUFiByNnUtQ4k%3D)
---
Friend, You see it on the news.
Our universities are failing our students.
A radical left-wing agenda is indoctrinating too many students with the principles of moral relativism. And it's resulting in a generation that doesn't know the difference between right and wrong. A generation that increasingly doesn't understand the principles of honorable leadership. As an organization that has spent 57 years working with young people, these are some of the most challenging days since our founding. But fortunately, there are still brave young college students out there living the principles of honorable leadership. And while their peers spend time attacking Israel and engaging in unconscionable, anti-semitic protests, students associated with TFAS's Student Journalism Association stand up and fight for the truth.

When the Chicago Black Lives Matter and the University of Chicago Students for Justice in Palestine stood with Hamas on October 7, students at the University of Chicago's _Chicago Thinker_ exposed those groups' support for terrorism.
---
[ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e37c7b0fc5274f75b0b0d12b392e4c60&_e=HRyUwrNg5_N76kicdIxzJKx5nz2whiRxtkKbReB6wkHKKTw9XfQnZ-nn_FPpSvfEyPdq_rY1R4uwJuZGebtyr2Po9pEby1_No2_5W06_M2Cvf9OW8Elz9o74AU8WDKVjFyfuEyCNFhVMFBO78pP1K6SSy0HdwyqdrErdVq0htLBGFQLjGyhuE7MtpoK3obec0eRLayDDW9eQ63umUWC4nBeNobJ41l4nqXulbAj-q3s%3D)
---
_Friend, TFAS is committed to supporting brave students like Jahmiel Jackson (and others at_ the _Chicago Thinker) who show honorable leadership. And we do that through our Student Journalism Association, but we need your support to do it._ That's why we're trying to raise $15,000 for them. And 100% of the money you donate today will directly fund the Student Journalism Association and the over a dozen student newspapers we support. [And that is why we're hoping that you will help us support these students by donating whatever you can right now!](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e37c7b0fc5274f75b0b0d12b392e4c60&_e=HRyUwrNg5_N76kicdIxzJKx5nz2whiRxtkKbReB6wkHKKTw9XfQnZ-nn_FPpSvfEyPdq_rY1R4uwJuZGebtyr40a8NFPyYoZS0EAlQhqniTeEU4ltDvNLaj8P_PEQbTs3chizQJN1HWfWKg_fSITBgheCMWKqtr6gsLUAzeAmaaHw-aAXhLI9pkJCLsjSdIlct2yspUmRWY8Jk4-isFNsnAa12oDSp74gEQK9jW4SI8%3D) In TFAS's 57 years we've focused on teaching courageous young people the principles of civics, free markets, and honorable leadership. And the Student Journalism Association is our latest effort to help these students!
It gives conservative and libertarian college students the training, mentoring, and financial support they need to launch, manage, and lead conservative newspapers on campus.

Friend, this support means that on many campuses (even ones as radical as Harvard), there are conservative voices fighting the radical agenda that dominates the quad. In fact, the Harvard Salient denounced students on their own campus who were supporting terrorism, stating there is "no excuse for a Harvard student-or any American-to carry water for these groups." These brave young conservatives are standing up for what's right when they denounce these evil terrorists. And while that shouldn't be hard, on today's college campuses, it often is.
* 51% of college students would support a socialist
* 33% of college students deny that Hamas committed these atrocities
* 20% of Social Science professors are avowed marxists.

That is what these students are dealing with every day while they stand up for what's right.
That's why it's so important that TFAS stands with these students.

[And it's why we hope you will join us in standing with them by donating anything (from $5 to $5,000) to help us give these students the support they NEED to make a difference.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e37c7b0fc5274f75b0b0d12b392e4c60&_e=HRyUwrNg5_N76kicdIxzJKx5nz2whiRxtkKbReB6wkHKKTw9XfQnZ-nn_FPpSvfEyPdq_rY1R4uwJuZGebtyr__Cbw8ipL9BvJaUODqr098W_CNejrUUcPrsXL-MrjjROnWPtEdD450rbQxsIYq8E22Krn26dGqMxv2dHZ7w5xgAsrhZUUbB_80TD6MftCsN5lI2e5wVp0Rtu6PXNbTsLUJVRR0Y_8SHrRJX5D82CmA%3D) Sincerely,

Roger Ream President The Fund for American Studies

name: Al Franken
subject: I got a favor to ask:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
House seat pickup
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T67aeaa7a-ed1e-44f4-9d25-44d3fb056acd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| | | Peter, I got a favor to ask you. [My friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley is running for Congress in NY-19, and his next deadline is this week. Will you join me right now by splitting a contribution of $20 or more between Josh Riley and Blue Amp Action?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T25856bff-7741-4bed-b09e-22c17ae63409/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf2f8dabc-363f-4a7b-8515-1a30c6ce3fe0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I can’t say enough good things about Josh. Josh is the hardest working person I know. Together we passed bills expanding rights for survivors of domestic abuse and providing new funding for addiction treatment and mental health programs. We also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad. **Josh really cares about all the stuff I care about – and probably the stuff you care about too!**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T061d0519-5af6-43a8-a1d1-aa7234eb75db/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| If that isn’t enough to convince you, NY-19 is a must-win for Democrats to take back the House. Cook Political Report, Sabato’s Crystal Ball, and all the other smart people who know this stuff have already rated it a “toss-up.” It’s a true swing district, but Biden won it by 4% in 2020 and I know Josh can win it in 2024 – with our help! So this is pretty much the full package: a great candidate who will always do what’s right, and a big race we absolutely have to win. [Can Josh and I count on your support? The next big fundraising deadline of Josh’s campaign is coming up, and all eyes are on him. Please split a contribution between Blue Amp Action and Josh’s campaign today.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbf4ffe2d-6850-45e1-b5d6-1e45ff69f824/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks, Al **[PS - As you may know, I always end with a P.S. that’s just an excuse for another ask. This is a super important deadline, so please chip in what you can!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7d3df555-9e23-4266-a4d0-b8337bd7f1de/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
