[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8j7uunDAQhp9m6EB47MVLQZEEkSpFinPayNjjXSu-IGNrw9tHkFXK-f5vbips3tljAvkVEJ_O7IAI_Asg1sI_1cfHj3y04eef9vvtEx9niN8AsRwb_TffQzoKyvmTyrkxk0DFrG5oYpLxfhQcb81zYlrzYaT7KEemzF3eLUnBV2GE0kZY3bgJexS9YIIxjj12wyoHTXSTbLS4jhZEfy3qbCYqTxd_UzbK-aPTKTR-epay7ddhC-Cyk66ZupeLmcxpAC5RFZei8q1OcS-u1Hfp1aut0aUIuGwqmxTbsLZXC_CllvBrTzVrAj7_iwGHkwYyrgbg86leRKuwKfeIwOewvlmhfDq2GAY4qJBqLMBnvDV5MtvLee_2QYLoH9d3OoW_AQAA__9Tk4Nu) Patriot,

I’ve now represented 50 Americans who have been politically charged for peacefully protesting on January 6th.

And of those, 12 jury trials have been held.

Despite my best efforts and Harvard Law pedigree, the guilty verdicts keep coming.

I firmly believe no attorney in America could return a "not guilty" verdict for these Americans. It is impossible as **these are Biden's SHOW TRIALS to dole out political punishment**.

My job is to preserve appeals for these men and women while pursuing other strategies I cannot openly discuss. However, my organization, NCLU, **[needs your help to keep the fight alive](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8j7uunDAQhp9m6EB47MVLQZEEkSpFinPayNjjXSu-IGNrw9tHkFXK-f5vbips3tljAvkVEJ_O7IAI_Asg1sI_1cfHj3y04eef9vvtEx9niN8AsRwb_TffQzoKyvmTyrkxk0DFrG5oYpLxfhQcb81zYlrzYaT7KEemzF3eLUnBV2GE0kZY3bgJexS9YIIxjj12wyoHTXSTbLS4jhZEfy3qbCYqTxd_UzbK-aPTKTR-epay7ddhC-Cyk66ZupeLmcxpAC5RFZei8q1OcS-u1Hfp1aut0aUIuGwqmxTbsLZXC_CllvBrTzVrAj7_iwGHkwYyrgbg86leRKuwKfeIwOewvlmhfDq2GAY4qJBqLMBnvDV5MtvLee_2QYLoH9d3OoW_AQAA__9Tk4Nu).**

I have now spent months camped out in the Swamp as I work these trials, and it is costing us tens of thousands of dollars with each trial...

...and that's our expenses between accommodations and travel for staff, family, and witnesses. **[Will you chip in to help cover our costs?](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8j7uunDAQhp9m6EB47MVLQZEEkSpFinPayNjjXSu-IGNrw9tHkFXK-f5vbips3tljAvkVEJ_O7IAI_Asg1sI_1cfHj3y04eef9vvtEx9niN8AsRwb_TffQzoKyvmTyrkxk0DFrG5oYpLxfhQcb81zYlrzYaT7KEemzF3eLUnBV2GE0kZY3bgJexS9YIIxjj12wyoHTXSTbLS4jhZEfy3qbCYqTxd_UzbK-aPTKTR-epay7ddhC-Cyk66ZupeLmcxpAC5RFZei8q1OcS-u1Hfp1aut0aUIuGwqmxTbsLZXC_CllvBrTzVrAj7_iwGHkwYyrgbg86leRKuwKfeIwOewvlmhfDq2GAY4qJBqLMBnvDV5MtvLee_2QYLoH9d3OoW_AQAA__9Tk4Nu)**

This past week, my client, a young family man named Jared Kastner, was found guilty on all counts and will be sentenced in the coming months.

His offense?

While traveling to Washington with his church group, he peacefully entered the Capitol, damaging or disturbing nothing and harming no one.

Jared and his wife, Kaitlyn, have a beautiful seven-month-old daughter and are expecting their second. **If Biden's DOJ gets its way, Jared will likely spend the first years of his newborn's life in Federal Prison**.

My subsequent trial for Bryan Smith begins on May 6th. What the government has done to this man is truly evil, and our trial prep has already started.

I need to purchase airline tickets for my team to return to DC and book hotel rooms.

**[I would appreciate any amount you can contribute](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8j7uunDAQhp9m6EB47MVLQZEEkSpFinPayNjjXSu-IGNrw9tHkFXK-f5vbips3tljAvkVEJ_O7IAI_Asg1sI_1cfHj3y04eef9vvtEx9niN8AsRwb_TffQzoKyvmTyrkxk0DFrG5oYpLxfhQcb81zYlrzYaT7KEemzF3eLUnBV2GE0kZY3bgJexS9YIIxjj12wyoHTXSTbLS4jhZEfy3qbCYqTxd_UzbK-aPTKTR-epay7ddhC-Cyk66ZupeLmcxpAC5RFZei8q1OcS-u1Hfp1aut0aUIuGwqmxTbsLZXC_CllvBrTzVrAj7_iwGHkwYyrgbg86leRKuwKfeIwOewvlmhfDq2GAY4qJBqLMBnvDV5MtvLee_2QYLoH9d3OoW_AQAA__9Tk4Nu)** to offset these costs.

While we defend these Americans in court, Biden’s Department of Justice continues their arrests. Just scan the news. As I write you, a Cincinnati man was arrested for following a group of people through the open doors of the Capitol.

**And Biden will not give up**. They won’t stop arresting Americans until November has passed and the political games they play are over.

The wheels of justice turn slowly despite the rapid-fire show trials that are now occurring, and **I pray that in less than a year, my clients and the other 1,300 Americans who have been charged will be fully pardoned.**

In the meantime, **we must fight with everything we have to keep these men and women out of federal prison as jobs and homes are being lost and, sadly, families are being broken**.

**[Patriot, will you help?](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8j7uunDAQhp9m6EB47MVLQZEEkSpFinPayNjjXSu-IGNrw9tHkFXK-f5vbips3tljAvkVEJ_O7IAI_Asg1sI_1cfHj3y04eef9vvtEx9niN8AsRwb_TffQzoKyvmTyrkxk0DFrG5oYpLxfhQcb81zYlrzYaT7KEemzF3eLUnBV2GE0kZY3bgJexS9YIIxjj12wyoHTXSTbLS4jhZEfy3qbCYqTxd_UzbK-aPTKTR-epay7ddhC-Cyk66ZupeLmcxpAC5RFZei8q1OcS-u1Hfp1aut0aUIuGwqmxTbsLZXC_CllvBrTzVrAj7_iwGHkwYyrgbg86leRKuwKfeIwOewvlmhfDq2GAY4qJBqLMBnvDV5MtvLee_2QYLoH9d3OoW_AQAA__9Tk4Nu)**

Thank you for **[any support you can provide](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8j7uunDAQhp9m6EB47MVLQZEEkSpFinPayNjjXSu-IGNrw9tHkFXK-f5vbips3tljAvkVEJ_O7IAI_Asg1sI_1cfHj3y04eef9vvtEx9niN8AsRwb_TffQzoKyvmTyrkxk0DFrG5oYpLxfhQcb81zYlrzYaT7KEemzF3eLUnBV2GE0kZY3bgJexS9YIIxjj12wyoHTXSTbLS4jhZEfy3qbCYqTxd_UzbK-aPTKTR-epay7ddhC-Cyk66ZupeLmcxpAC5RFZei8q1OcS-u1Hfp1aut0aUIuGwqmxTbsLZXC_CllvBrTzVrAj7_iwGHkwYyrgbg86leRKuwKfeIwOewvlmhfDq2GAY4qJBqLMBnvDV5MtvLee_2QYLoH9d3OoW_AQAA__9Tk4Nu)** to help me keep fighting.

In Vigilance,
[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8j7uunDAQhp9m6EB47MVLQZEEkSpFinPayNjjXSu-IGNrw9tHkFXK-f5vbips3tljAvkVEJ_O7IAI_Asg1sI_1cfHj3y04eef9vvtEx9niN8AsRwb_TffQzoKyvmTyrkxk0DFrG5oYpLxfhQcb81zYlrzYaT7KEemzF3eLUnBV2GE0kZY3bgJexS9YIIxjj12wyoHTXSTbLS4jhZEfy3qbCYqTxd_UzbK-aPTKTR-epay7ddhC-Cyk66ZupeLmcxpAC5RFZei8q1OcS-u1Hfp1aut0aUIuGwqmxTbsLZXC_CllvBrTzVrAj7_iwGHkwYyrgbg86leRKuwKfeIwOewvlmhfDq2GAY4qJBqLMBnvDV5MtvLee_2QYLoH9d3OoW_AQAA__9Tk4Nu)
John M. Pierce
Chairman and Founder

name: Team Kennedy
subject: RFK Jr. Now Leading Trump/Biden
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
RFK Jr. stands as a beacon of hope for a better tomorrow.

|

Dear Peter,
Clearly, the voting population is tired of the bankrupt two-party system, and millions are declaring their independence.
According to a new Fox News poll, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.’s independent message is resonating with voters, resulting in higher favorability numbers than President Joe Biden and Donald Trump!
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfkjr_leading_4_14_24_rs_nd1&n=3)
In addition, a recent CNN shows Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is at 18% nationally, making him the most popular independent presidential candidate in modern history.
Kennedy embodies the spirit of courage, compassion, and unwavering commitment to equal justice under the law that has defined our nation's greatest leaders.
With a legacy deeply rooted in the pursuit of equality and opportunity for all, RFK Jr. stands as a beacon of hope for a better tomorrow.
From a lifetime of advocating for environmental sustainability, civil rights, medical freedom, and fair economic policy, Kennedy is committed to fighting for the American Values that unite all of us.
This moment is pivotal. With the DNC's playbook exposed, it's more evident than ever that RFK Jr. is the leader America needs — _one who can truly win in November and bring about the healing and transformation our country cries out for._
But we cannot do this alone. We need your support to turn our vision into reality.

[Please support Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s campaign and help Team Kennedy keep the momentum going.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfkjr_leading_4_14_24_rs_nd1&n=10)
Not only do we have expensive security costs, but we also need to spend more than $15 million to obtain ballot access in all 50 states and the District of Columbia.
The political establishment is committed to stopping Kennedy’s name from appearing on the ballot. subject: The shortest email you’ll read today
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
(maybe)
#

Morning, Peter. It’s Ruben.
You get enough emails, and I don’t want to waste more of your time.
This one is to ask you to make a donation to my campaign. With everything that’s happened over the last week, it’s more important than ever that we defeat Kari Lake, win up and down the ballot in Arizona, and hold the Senate.
Use this link if you can afford to make a donation:
[**https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/Ruben-Sunday-4-14**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr24.p6MMmT&refcode=em240414-1-120&t=1&akid=2203%2E734936%2E6VBiyr)
Thank you in advance, hope you can chip in.
Ruben

With everything that’s happened over the last week, it’s more important than ever that we defeat Kari Lake, win up and down the ballot in Arizona, and hold the Senate. Use this link if you can afford to make a donation: Thank you in advance, hope you can chip in. Ruben (yep, that’s the whole email!) name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: B+L Weekly Reads: Dems Remove 'Gender Queer' from Perkiomen Valley School Library | Special Announcement + More ⚡🔔
body:
News + editorial to start your week. | | | |
---
| | | Good morning, and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

[Subscribe to our daily email list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b2c5c87606&e=b7b3eddce2) and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
| | ****Special Announcement****
Next Thursday, April 18th at 10AM, _Broad + Liberty_ will host a [Zoom webinar](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=52ad96a186&e=b7b3eddce2) titled **"Chaos and Crisis: Behind the Walls of the George W. Hill Correctional Facility,"** featuring Chief Investigative Reporter Todd Shepherd and Wally Nunn, former Chairman of the Delaware County Council and Jail Oversight Board.

Since the successful deprivatization effort culminated in a transition to county management in 2022, the George W. Hill Correctional Facility has faced unprecedented challenges, highlighted by a marked increase in violence, a record number of inmate deaths including multiple inmate suicides, severe understaffing, and ongoing cost overruns. These issues have culminated in a security and humanitarian crisis that demands immediate public attention and action by public officials.

This webinar is targeted at concerned citizens, community leaders, policymakers, and activists, urging a collective push for transparency and reform in the management of the county's correctional facility. It will also delve into the broader debate about prisons, profit motive, and the public good.
For more information or to participate in the webinar, please [visit this link](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5d7222bf04&e=b7b3eddce2) or click the button below. This is a free event.
---
| [Register Here](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=cbb0fe821b&e=b7b3eddce2 "Register Here")
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Majority-Democrat school board enacts policy removing ‘Gender Queer’ from library](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9267d916e4&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Beth Ann Rosica_

“The Perkiomen Valley School District board of directors voted unanimously Monday to enact [Policy 109](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=fa822776ba&e=b7b3eddce2) that prohibits ‘depictions, representations, in whatever form, of nudity, sexual conduct, sexual excitement, or sadomasochistic abuse.... when they meet the criteria of harmful to minors.’”

According to Superintendent Dr. Barbara Russell, Gender Queer — one of the most debated library books in the country — was removed from the district’s online catalog for not conforming to the new policy. Gender Queer is an autobiographical graphic novel about a young woman’s gender confusion that contains explicit drawings of sexual acts.”

**Why It Matters**. “Former President Jason Saylor, a Republican, asked the superintendent and current board President Laura White, a Democrat, why Gender Queer was removed from the library before the new policy was enacted. When the question was not immediately answered, he pressed to understand whether his email asking why the book was in the online library collection was the impetus for the removal.

The superintendent eventually responded that the book was ultimately removed because it did not meet the criteria in the new policy. She further acknowledged that even though the new policy was not yet approved, the librarians now have a ‘hyper awareness’ of the situation and anticipated that the policy would be adopted. She added, ‘the librarian does not want that book in the collection.’”

**Quotable**. Former board member and President, Kim Mares, in the audience, said, “I totally agree that we should have a diverse library. I just can’t support at all sexually explicit materials, whether — it doesn’t matter what the interaction is, heterosexual or homosexual. It’s the sexually explicit part that is disturbing.”

[C](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4055928a0d&e=b7b3eddce2)[ontinue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=848c5b62ae&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Reconsidering classical architecture](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=85785cfb48&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Thom Nickels_

“In any event, Henry Hope Reed would have been proud of the ICAA gathering, especially since his book went unread and unnoticed throughout the 1960s and 70s when modernism in architecture — and the destruction of most things considered ‘old’ — reigned supreme. As Leigh told the gathering of 30-plus people in attendance, ‘Reed’s work is getting some attention today, so the situation has changed for the better.’”

“When I spoke to Leigh, he mentioned that one of his pet projects was saving Confederate monuments. Leigh believes that saving Confederate monuments is just as important as saving historic buildings despite the influence of “woke” politics on many preservation societies.”

**Why It Matters**. “Today’s architectural students are not looking towards the classical world for inspiration. ‘To my eye,’ Holm says, ‘the dominant style is continuity. And this was not what we were taught in architectural school courses. From a modernist point of view, all the old buildings are artifacts from a culture that doesn’t exist anymore. All the books in architectural school are written from a modernist point of view.’”

**Quotable**. “He was a totally lovable human being. I don’t think there wasn’t anybody who didn’t like him — cab drivers, professors; he was charismatic, absolutely. But I think he was wrong. I think he took us down a path that led nowhere. And I think that’s one of the problems with modernism in general. It’s idealistic without any particular ideal.” –Alvin Holm on Louis Kahn

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=af5981cf9c&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Podcasts**
* [Voices of Reason: Ep.2, new voters](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=560d19a49b&e=b7b3eddce2)
* [Kitchen Table Politics: Brendan Boyle](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=098c40db7e&e=b7b3eddce2)

---
|
---
|
# **4\. Lightning Round**
* **[Guy Ciarrocchi: The arrogance of the Left — always certain, usually wrong](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=900fe36629&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Rep. Seth Grove: What we (didn’t) learn from the 2024 budget hearings](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a16b762cba&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Stephanie Catarino Wissman: The value of Pennsylvania natural gas continues to grow](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e95b109a53&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Christine Flowers: The duplicity of the Bryn Mawr Film Institute](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=20dc0839c5&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Paul Davis: The DEA on the enduring and emerging threat of drugs](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f51c50728b&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
# **5\. What we're reading**
Kensington has become a byword for government and societal failure in combating the epidemic of opioid addiction. [This week in _The Free Press_](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0b28602679&e=b7b3eddce2), Olivia Reingold visits the shattered neighborhood and talks to some of the regular people just trying to survive there and examines the failure of the “harm reduction” movement.
---
|
---

Your generous support ensures that _Broad + Liberty_ can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at [editors@broadandliberty.com](mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com).

As always, gifts made to _Broad + Liberty_ are 100% tax deductible!

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you.

With gratitude,

— The Editors at _Broad + Liberty_

name: Final Warning (Closing Soon)
subject: Subject Line: Thanks for the memories, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
All good things must come to an end

Friend,

If this goes on any longer, we might have to close up shop.

_We 've asked THOUSANDS of people to complete the __**[REPUBLICAN PARTY AREA ASSESSMENT: ELECTION YEAR EDITION,](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=635240f0025e4fdaab7194a9b5ba1af2&_e=7tbHfa1XUifqX5z8Esyae2IWlIoeFWN8NLvscMqAMEO4ANBCXL0VVd6XLoQdo10Vtnr-ovpkOXstJbwVQFnLWWBL855Hp5KrlHgJ3iYu55kVIL5uWaiNIxh0M6PTU0vS_ZQpbHz0L58XuuEN9IDzGHSoKwcqyVqo7plYKNLm0dGl6wvJb8iTJ-8-3dr5E0xKZag3Ii5SuTKmGpoqbocsIc_w6X8uHTJLxswsEUzYKuSCzlysN9m9s0k1wC8leCwaDiX9wvlQ4oGCFhPVBUKABOoZQutw7ZWNrsynu7TRyKhK7JzT7FCgRz9-oCtA2aZFxOXNRkShFiKh1ggI70_7xY10kGr79hH3ZzHABl7n9Z-rS7OE-axjY_4uX6Iornw_ZNh_CRgxL3ihEG2Zv7qAX2juD1uRo_m5LYbPKBhEF6uq2F95KpWgfU47lbP1jP0SU95sxceLJEYjnvNKuKhUCA%3D%3D) **__but hardly ANYONE has participated._

clean_body: Republican Anthony D’Esposito is the #1 most vulnerable Republican in the country but it will take hard work and significant resources to flip this Red to Blue district. | = | Peter, I just wanted to do a quick weekend check-in about our campaign. Republican Anthony D’Esposito is the #1 most vulnerable Republican in the country but it will take hard work and significant resources to flip this Red to Blue district so we can retake the Democratic House majority. subject: State Democrats prepare for upcoming elections while Republicans uphold an abortion ban … and everything else you need to know in the states.
body:
Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, April 14th, 2024 | | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW9WL4ySifRyEQyG7D6ZDcaKmFQcO_SqeUFRkYFn0WrvHHisWiwN-mSj2nwLaaiVAndhLwjC3x9MI2KUAa0DnJVhamStH0yBHJI9uhbj_q0lHnQTGgy6dQ_r80Jc3PQqJmkifX32S_GVlavkJkRtrDot62KjOjxptYEMl1aEAv67KtCFiacyMls1b-DB6J2am5cYtGqGzlM7JKwp5bx2H0t_mgFbggRb8PWcR1cSVSDEzHonfV-v30OmGKP956vn28D6wvRislTH2kkS8ofPvU-m3GQKe5yHEdIR7Gb6IceAJcvtNFOHjeST9hekxyKH5-EPE7ZfH9ye4T5RKMWD1BS3jHqqij24anwqCWSEUEb58CFX2jmMPcLA-y5dIdxfdfx8TrTtGF7dZT0RfyWYRi7DRb8VNgKQQ6nZmIfiB_mciY6brITbfPd_eLFeHwmSpw0ocwYJZ0xDImdlXGDxr0pMPSKOxZZ07gyX0IqHRHfBaAnz7n7f6x5gpkG3KcGWigA/45i/ioIvji--Toeb8MfO84a-Aw/h0/h001.KS5rRQ9-G9puedoJnjCM5fCZcfUpCX4dtThmw3-wWg8)
---
1️⃣ **_Arizona:_ State Republicans uphold an 1864 total abortion ban **
In Arizona, Republican lawmakers refused to repeal a total abortion ban after it was reinstated by the state Supreme Court, in the most extreme restriction of reproductive freedoms we have seen from the state thus far. [This ban proves how antiquated and harmful the GOP’s anti-abortion agenda truly is → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW4UwpmUdmzgvXv8eLEbLMSG1o5LJUlNdeDEt7x21Is6a34gpNr6pbgpqHRUH9CiBlDH6OIQBEbP-3XA_q6B4q-sUp9PXtTi3o06QtNZTZiauJvyY6Wer-g7a_AHGb_wxwJNTKKL5QzuCscX7Vv1OHZdjRj0PDwUHZCVz7HdNNiw5m_ApOYLeEL-ZMxMehU-pVaohSbaQqiXN7Sb-8MUUpxaXOvhXX6NObY70266lsjEI3dnMW9tDTl-qA3VmID6jUhGfLTeY03KefkFJVJGmFzzrkXwombzIGkMm7ziL7gbaBU6IUGTju81d6NzIIj5MMf684GedeBWH0S-l4d_YaZuZtLXi1UjgMcZz9wF3gNKx2nnIku6MmNBnakk2LolSrfefiYzmgx3ak7adzir74TxsII7K0SNEzmiQZ-n-0xGyXlwhydneOa5jaEgLQk6O2UR8n59beycg13Tsmnana9sxKtYE-g3N8reipuW6e0V0e8J3J-1arv5URgR4rLZn57mtu6SKRRhTnC9AjgStD3i3verbKr2ueVOHqYiZ2DTvjJLmKGTw3PuCy2xdVXLwZo2Bv6xqlR8JPCpbv1yMz54/45i/ioIvji--Toeb8MfO84a-Aw/h1/h001.IYf0LvW3IozG2i5pMHaoGqtox4lzMaSeKu1u-lmhxZA)

2️⃣ **_Maine:_ Republican blames mass shooting on God’s wrath over abortion law **
In Maine, during a House debate this week, Republican lawmaker insinuated that the state's new abortion protections were partially responsible for a horrific mass shooting months later. [**This not only demonstrates Republicans' delusional anti-abortion radicalism, but also the extreme mental gymnastics the GOP is willing to perform to make their arguments →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.A3cd-kVlFz1CzUMSYeTvVRuHawCj6py2TD2PIT1TuMb1FzREsdjXtRVJzsk2b7sF6cEq-q3FOkprWqfNJjfJg_LybxXET8r4a0RSuIcMjIquRNKpEipT_WvxR1r6GGjsE46NgJB-7u9Mx32yx9iu2afmlH3Qs1FRRNWXpn320ftWjPziFLQsjYu9_KjpPtpg3R_MhFVLuoaWO8ZY0pSzmuvmC4MQV1nQApyAfQlfEbq4TEXFchZKDIPCDzfPnyGcP0tDoJNPpWW_5DVTye2g-rDadz1AE0Zi1TVdnHN67V3gh2HkJRLXZfPQlKsvuN2kRL1e5jw5jHp0DKSJYldJT4CefdEYxgs66HLiNJckQKtwn8tvU6L231KGmPq2I7Tez1ipKtnCMBZ_VAcIGqpgT44CAO2SrHXbS02zTMB3jJVShzlOFk8nbA7K5MDsXmVJLcdenejXn_BH3GrPTdmes3_Yab5xI-HXrXKzOxyadLoz0rYJzgnVoEYQ-Md-ZJovlwgDAnoGHtJEW7VSrkZPglgo8NY1Nw2RiXifuiGkJYJFHzijoZz8TRvwUPcLVcAx3crCTSQ4WJ8YLynOG01TsblRZHlhgM-34d2ZY6YOjlpTn35w5k9nxbixOltaVA3SIgW262lxmHelI8KsyY6s6dAfaN8nwKeLVoeM7Od7O_o/45i/ioIvji--Toeb8MfO84a-Aw/h2/h001._Zztg6a8ejDsuAeftuWtZY9XwvymQaP8oruFPhQZbsY)
3️⃣ **_New Hampshire:_ Republicans pass a bill requiring teachers to out LGBTQ+ students to parents**
In New Hampshire, LGBTQ+ advocates are gravely concerned following the passage of a bill that will require teachers to out their LGBTQ+ students to their parents. [**This bill has dangerous repercussions and threatens LGBTQ+ rights and constitutional privacies →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMc2FqEHjDlJIw9oqeJIP5tjFHVA2cCMKFtEA8cQXE1VQ-H0NLaT8GPImOpQwkBC9b6qgA8M5fgQ5pWtX1YqWD1izJX-fyvIvfrSX8RTB2sSPytuRqHrVAD2OQMrZVStRiRNAtD8O5taiRncDq-C7plUKb21L2w-IwB9DLM8DM8BAPzRMN4A4aOC8dLbagsAONKS7H6EL4d-NJ28wVvO6Cdr66rBljfgrRQMd8qltqFOjIcCMoO9WfRYgTKsrJ-nO08BQE5yuq4kg4sAwrSrNNDn-XtzqXv-4V_x7Au8S07mdaeXE7H_ceLQCQ6ea7At3i7B84zXfvAyANw6Ixf5dvZ6bT9XKLK8Imt4EzeZQMZNEXGUUqgjtoKxDRYe-tMq1U8f6n16Tj1dDG_-FcWOoxwl5dkT0ZlorczKLqn5WTM-dz6pf4j_PAJ_dCisLXdUlgp-OQN5OlO-KfgylSTPjlR0ktofC5nRuojZ-_rYVV4F5WY020a7gE0k9me5vTG-XOtnFc4tB8R_eByZbHRPVA4ehnWunvfABkvts0OuEIC7uvE06cDkmwvxKMrc_kAwtehJ188soK4EAR-WjxYkxgO73QhRdcpEFBZFvVesUS9J_S6R4WGDelmR01KJ98CQt9XysoAhcrw714Lxt7qZETzgQGzFq3Q28aZ3zj0gKKy15/45i/ioIvji--Toeb8MfO84a-Aw/h3/h001.tQRyBRGTs2OHUek1BjGCg_c_EQjw5czDyukhtGQXLDY)
🔦 **_Spotlight:_ Check out the DLCC’s spotlight candidates! **
State Democrats are working around the clock in states nationwide to pave our path to Democratic majorities this year and beyond. [**Check out our spotlight page and get to know these incredible candidates →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW8i7dgiWltPqMksHAqnq8ggYQIVNQTwGLx51AxxYwN7IQ5iCxKV2CI-xf81ZvgyqTtjQ9zwPfer0qQUuPFJlISSdaHDtVFusQxQpK0Ann_FLU22AvHeBfT4NxmxoDF689eKtFtIYkLcpIYljCl2fiwcpKn2M2QPIof05_npM8zPtnsDH7Wzamuz46SYZQpl86inopg_xGGcXzkuPiHIVgJv2T0CkXCiPlJWTcrVcViHulGAda9VZxwaEwVOUq-5moaTIQHQoWvCUTCBWPnMuDe9lVDBykh4uWRbAVhbsAFMcI711o0RCD3LhfiIngMXjKSQ3xZ0GJ60AVg2yCapDF4XSgOC0jW7qxFzIJfDdjtTuffYjqZ6gYlu1vMlM4Qr94GISQ1q-ROvzROeNg4EQUtpDXbnI7a8D8BLkwmAuIWP3hcCS-_nbPlqtyCpno3YrXzaQEPLjMz73vXX_6ktrPVZCiyAW1Oq9mgfWJdBERa21lfRmR63_EVZwCJvmKYn2f-MKq09MVVB-vsNPzD-Z3iM/45i/ioIvji--Toeb8MfO84a-Aw/h4/h001.N99y6RBuZPRcBBBLma_uZi7s6K0qcT92HFvrmKWbd48)

name: Ashley Ehasz
subject: They sure as hell weren't going to cut me a break
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
A picture is worth a thousand words. But I had a bit more I wanted to say about this particular one. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82991976/466957517/1694846221?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20240414_fr_personal_cand_mf_30da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWQxOWYwOS02MGZhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fUELgxOaEfAJXjENjAsvvvVJZnqR11omKIdT-NdgjHo=)
---
Co-pilot, I was the ONLY woman in my Apache Longbow helicopter class. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82991979/466957520/1694846221?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20240414_fr_personal_cand_mf_30da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWQxOWYwOS02MGZhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fUELgxOaEfAJXjENjAsvvvVJZnqR11omKIdT-NdgjHo=)
---
As you can tell from that photo, to say it's a man's world is an understatement. Apaches are basically airborne tanks, and the program to fly them is the Army's equivalent of Top Gun. **But if there's one word I could use to describe what the Army taught me, it's TOUGH.**
Joining the Army at just 17? Tough.
Keeping up my grades at West Point? Tough.
Flying an airborne tank in combat? Tough.
Training with 21 guys who sure as hell weren't going to cut the only woman a break? Tough.
**I joined the Army as a way to pay for college. I stayed, becoming a pilot and commander, because I knew I had the strength to lead and protect when lives were on the line.**
Compare that with my opponent, Brian Fitzpatrick, who was born with a silver spoon in his mouth and rode his brother's coattails into office. Since joining Congress, Fitzpatrick has let MAGA extremists like Matt Gaetz and Mike Johnson walk ALL over him.
I got into this race because I've seen how Fitzpatrick's weak leadership is hurting working families, LGBTQ+ folks, women – really any of us who aren't his rich donors. I wouldn't put up with that from anyone under my command in the Army, let alone someone holding one of the most powerful offices in our country.
So I'm running to defeat Brian Fitzpatrick and be the protector PA-01 folks need and deserve.
_**[I know I've got the strength to do this job. But getting there isn't easy... or cheap. That's why I'm asking you to please pitch in $10 or whatever you can right now to my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82991982/466957524/1694846221?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20240414_fr_personal_cand_mf_30da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWQxOWYwOS02MGZhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fUELgxOaEfAJXjENjAsvvvVJZnqR11omKIdT-NdgjHo=)**_
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: A picture is worth a thousand words. But I had a bit more I wanted to say about this particular one. | = Co-pilot, I was the ONLY woman in my Apache Longbow helicopter class. | = As you can tell from that photo, to say it's a man's world is an understatement. Apaches are basically airborne tanks, and the program to fly them is the Army's equivalent of Top Gun. But if there's one word I could use to describe what the Army taught me, it's TOUGH. Joining the Army at just 17? Tough. Keeping up my grades at West Point? Tough. Flying an airborne tank in combat? Tough. Training with 21 guys who sure as hell weren't going to cut the only woman a break? Tough. I joined the Army as a way to pay for college. I stayed, becoming a pilot and commander, because I knew I had the strength to lead and protect when lives were on the line. Compare that with my opponent, Brian Fitzpatrick, who was born with a silver spoon in his mouth and rode his brother's coattails into office. Since joining Congress, Fitzpatrick has let MAGA extremists like Matt Gaetz and Mike Johnson walk ALL over him. I got into this race because I've seen how Fitzpatrick's weak leadership is hurting working families, LGBTQ+ folks, women – really any of us who aren't his rich donors. I wouldn't put up with that from anyone under my command in the Army, let alone someone holding one of the most powerful offices in our country. So I'm running to defeat Brian Fitzpatrick and be the protector PA-01 folks need and deserve. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for being in this fight with me as my co-pilot, Ashley | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. Fellow American, Our Party's presumptive nominee President Trump chose me to lead Republicans to victory in key races across the country, and with the November elections on the horizon, there's no time to waste. Democrats are mobilizing, harnessing their resources to challenge our candidates and our ideals at every turn. They are strategic and well-funded, but we have something they lack: a powerful community of principled Conservatives like YOU. As Chairman of the Republican Party, I've authorized a critically important Fundraising Goal to help register new voters, push voters to the polls, and take advantage of every opportunity to run up our margin in key states. I'm committed to ensuring that our party's future aligns with your values and vision, but the Radical Left threatens to destroy the freedoms and principles that have made this nation great. Friend, I just have to ask:
**Can you spare $5 to keep Nevada and the Senate blue? **
**The GOP has made me a top target for defeat this year,** and what we do right now will determine what happens in November. After my GOP opponent just set a new fundraising record to flip this seat red and deliver the Senate to Mitch McConnell, the only way I can fight back is with your support.
I know it may not sound like much, but it’s grassroots supporters like you giving $5 or $25 at a time who are going to make the critical difference in this battleground race – not billionaire megadonors or dark money groups. That’s why it’s so important we all do our part.
**But right now, we’re still very short of our mid-month goal to raise $20,000 before midnight tomorrow: **[**So please, can you spare just $5 to help me reach my goal, win in Nevada, and defend our Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82993724/466962781/2034486384?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3699-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWI4MzhiOC02MWZhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I3pU8FTT7R2wzAzoQtBytvJtCBJfQGc9CxOVU9cSWT0=)

Jacky Rosen:** Friend, I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. name: Debbie
subject: on the road again 🛣️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
honk if you're ready to flip Florida Blue
| | |
---
Friend —
In a little over two weeks, Ron DeSantis' six-week abortion ban will take effect.
Since we won't get a chance to put the brakes on this law until Election Day,**I'm hitting the road to meet voters from Tallahassee to Tavernier and build momentum for reinstating abortion rights and flipping Florida blue!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82996712/466972329/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1078-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTk2ZjM0ZWEtNjVmYS1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JF3BSHCMBWHeu2JZky_qSyNrVkkNCUR4NJba4CSAQkU=)
**I just wrapped my third stop in Englewood, and the energy on the ground was _ELECTRIC._** But that doesn't come as a surprise, since 62% of Floridians plan to vote to save abortion and 53% are ready to elect someone new — still, I can't believe how revved-up Florida voters are to kick Rick out of the Senate.
Friend, grassroots activists like you are showing up to _prove_ that the tides really are turning here in Florida. **I'm truly humbled by the turnout thus far, and I've never felt more confident that we can flip this seat and restore abortion rights, both here at home and nationwide. Thank you.**
But on the road to victory this November, there's still a lot of work to do.
In spite of his nearly up to a quarter-billion dollar fortune, the polls still show Scott's one of the least popular and most vulnerable Republicans on the ballot. That's why he's already dropped almost $4 million to drown out our movement with desperate attack ads this early on in the race.
Considering that he spent _$64 million_ to win last time around,**the only way I'll keep trucking along is with your urgent help to meet my $600,000 mid-month goal by tomorrow at midnight.**

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023?refcode=cattacos [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023?refcode=cattacos]
Dear Friend,
With less than 2 weeks to go before Democrats in PA-10 head to the polls to choose their nominee to take on MAGA Republican Scott Perry in November, my opponent’s lies and ugly comments have come to light.
In previous debates, lifelong Republican Janelle Stelson assured the voters of PA-10 that she has been consistently voting for Democrats for years even though she never registered as a Democrat. In truth, and according to public records, she has a nearly perfect voting record in Republican Primaries in her home Congressional district of PA-11.
I know that who you vote for matters. It shows what your values are. I’m a proud Democrat and have always supported the values of my party. I need your support to reach the voters of PA-10 and make sure they know what’s at stake in this election.
Can you help by rushing a contribution to my campaign? Your contribution of $250, $100, $50, or whatever you can afford will allow me to make sure that the choice voters have couldn’t be any clearer. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023?refcode=cattacos]

| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5c76e9770835425bb4514bae7866c597&_e=41BprW5PGjgvchKGZieRlwORJNWn_YVNGHpoU61bc92OrPKAvgfAjxhDXnZioQ7cwUVWMZ7wfuTOtjnO4k4BNQRpNlGyJo525upsSlO3pAp7qboeURgmKtT-7DecXy3lJ4sDh2FbH-SL7J1-_N6YEzFlNXnSh3kiZgvT8nhbOGq-0EbNiCh_amQYmlREgfBUVM4rsay84b3dxLTSEdwBofPm9ecxo5j1JUa13XeyYm72jp4O9YZurtYJtPlTeAc66XBKY7RK1cVvJKQSBEnRzLl6YqWJ5eculW9BtKMTDVE-yShE0iir0s6S_v92bfewWy7y0RCL06UTd-UmPmn1wop5ViJNhpZ56uIMxZv7l_IGuHrvTOAxDnb88AQqK3y8) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5c76e9770835425bb4514bae7866c597&_e=41BprW5PGjgvchKGZieRlwORJNWn_YVNGHpoU61bc92OrPKAvgfAjxhDXnZioQ7cwUVWMZ7wfuTOtjnO4k4BNQRpNlGyJo525upsSlO3pAp7qboeURgmKtT-7DecXy3lJ4sDh2FbH-SL7J1-_N6YEzFlNXnSh3kiZgvT8nhbOGq-0EbNiCh_amQYmlREgfBUVM4rsay84b3dxLTSEdwBofPm9ecxo5j1JUa13XeyYm4RRDVhd_lsfHxjs5otFgmq1D30lsqrthQt1KnWdvjaLK9BrMCQTDNEL86gZvFZWE9RrSnfwnXjVylAOi_gjHz3qclYv12CJff4bnOCMcDr68h1KDhyUL3mhFgHHYUITZwbpfNdJQWhuR2agKZPHNYQ)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Bernie Moreno
subject: I “don’t deserve to win”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate
body:
We need to win the Senate and the White House to end the madness coming out of Washington and start putting America First again. |
---
Fellow patriot,

Recently, the Never Trumpers at _The Washington Post_ published a column stating I don’t deserve to win this race in Ohio and that I shouldn’t be a U.S. Senator... _over my support for President Trump._

If there’s one thing I’ve learned over the last few years, it’s that if _The Washington Post_ says it, _**you know it can’t be trusted!**_

**I 100% support and endorse President Donald J. But before I do, there are **three things I need you to know:**
* Our Democratic Senate majority is _**razor-thin,**_ and we're defending two-thirds of the seats up for election this November.

* A number of my colleagues are defending some of the most competitive seats nationwide, in states Trump won by a _landslide_ in 2020.

* With our Democratic majority on the line, so are critical policies like the right to abortion, lowering health care costs, a national paid leave program, and much more.

_And if we don't have the resources to defend our majority and keep up the fight for working families,**we give the Senate back to GOP extremists.**_
**So I'm working to make sure Democrats can keep our majority and our agenda intact. clean_body: There are three things I need you to know: | | | = Peter: Tomorrow's my critical mid-month deadline, = | | = But before I do, there are three things I need you to know: Our Democratic Senate majority is razor-thin, and we're defending two-thirds of the seats up for election this November. A number of my colleagues are defending some of the most competitive seats nationwide, in states Trump won by a landslide in 2020. With our Democratic majority on the line, so are critical policies like the right to abortion, lowering health care costs, a national paid leave program, and much more. And if we don't have the resources to defend our majority and keep up the fight for working families,we give the Senate back to GOP extremists. So I'm working to make sure Democrats can keep our majority and our agenda intact. But it won't make a difference if I miss important deadlines like the one tomorrow at midnight –**= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for your help in keeping the fight alive, Patty Murray | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Dear Peter,It's no secret that the vast majority of Americans have lost faith in the press. We've all come to see that many newspapers have abandoned their responsibility to serve the American people. Instead they act, mostly, as the enforcers of the powers and agendas that they favor.

So where do we turn for news we can trust? News that's factual and fair. And where do our leaders turn for the information they need to make world altering decisions. Increasingly there's one answer: The New York Sun.

| | President Trump, for one, reads and often shares the Sun because we're a paper that calls it straight. At times we offer criticism. At other times praise. Our loyalty is to the American people and the Constitution of the United States. We are guided by enduring principles. American principles. Principles that have served our country since the start and have been our own guiding light since the Sun’s founding nearly 200 years ago.

If you share our view about the desperate need for real American journalism, we need you to join our grassroots movement to build it.

**Until the end of April** we’re offering membership starting at just **1c a day**. Don't wait. Please join us today.

clean_body: We are guided by enduring principles. American principles.| | | | | | Dear Peter,It's no secret that the vast majority of Americans have lost faith in the press. We've all come to see that many newspapers have abandoned their responsibility to serve the American people. Instead they act, mostly, as the enforcers of the powers and agendas that they favor. So where do we turn for news we can trust? News that's factual and fair. And where do our leaders turn for the information they need to make world altering decisions. Increasingly there's one answer: The New York Sun. | | | | President Trump, for one, reads and often shares the Sun because we're a paper that calls it straight. At times we offer criticism. At other times praise. Our loyalty is to the American people and the Constitution of the United States. We are guided by enduring principles. American principles. Principles that have served our country since the start and have been our own guiding light since the Sun’s founding nearly 200 years ago. If you share our view about the desperate need for real American journalism, we need you to join our grassroots movement to build it. Until the end of April we’re offering membership starting at just 1c a day. Don't wait. Please join us today.

[**CHIP IN $5
HELP ME KICK TESTER OUT OF THE SENATE->** ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9e7b62fdd3764207bb11f4a15172ec84&_e=Fs2DJWIagpTpMnTGMhGJEKGpdmI9w-ODx6NDJh00zxjmS6ntP9uqTrtXmLbOp24AVGI9wIMK5HO5-HsHJ_9iK92a0PaMN-T1sjRAyDiAOvvvAM9CWkApjCIv0ToQ8L2ublBEY36w3mRJECnT1bIuHhqX8smYYLWevwo0RhUSw7NjTJW5S-3QIaDvLUWQ_j4ne_4h10kn3-jw8VXOTruh7rocdwR5cOOCfipmUEW23fmHE_y_Wfdpr9FZgVhUB-FyLgV_WySJAoPAWhx_JSYAkDc3dGaLr12xaVRBt6M0ZxZrh5I_W89DTi85ODWLSbkazNkafn-evF2boh_8NEtqCB3HPW332AzcDgE0NjytZ-gYKre208xX1ICMww-QH_knwKxBMzf3CFjYUd_pKure5h3Bx0HcyFw7YWjUqPz3xDY%3D)
Peter,

It’s former Navy SEAL and current U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy. Above, you'll see my Democrat opponent, Jon Tester, **threatening President Trump on national television.**

Recently resurfaced footage shows my Democrat opponent, Jon Tester, appearing on MSNBC’s **_Morning Joe_** program, telling the hosts how bad Donald Trump is for the United States, then encouraging someone to **“punch him in the face.”**

Jon Tester apparently thinks anyone who is able should "punch" Donald Trump. We're definitely NOT going to take his advice, but we are trying to **kick him OUT of the Senate** - can you help us with that?

[**CHIP IN $5
HELP ME kick TESTER OUT OF THE SENATE->** ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9e7b62fdd3764207bb11f4a15172ec84&_e=Fs2DJWIagpTpMnTGMhGJEKGpdmI9w-ODx6NDJh00zxjmS6ntP9uqTrtXmLbOp24AVGI9wIMK5HO5-HsHJ_9iK92a0PaMN-T1sjRAyDiAOvvvAM9CWkApjCIv0ToQ8L2ublBEY36w3mRJECnT1bIuHhqX8smYYLWevwo0RhUSw7NjTJW5S-3QIaDvLUWQ_j4ne_4h10kn3-jw8VXOTruh7rocdwR5cOOCfipmUEW23fmHE_y_Wfdpr9FZgVhUB-FyzPBoaM8Jblhm8iQWYlJt6bOhDbF4ZwZesxBPxdy4qK4vA2D6V4fJplSDfMEDEsl0AP68-mxrQ4qwmBCjKckfjnw2MuYExLNHVzagBIk2TMczj2OJa43g-VjacMEKzxb5BzBq5BwQUZ1k2ROzv_AzaGOwxZxMUnyQ_1wByBBCDCc%3D)
We all know the term “Trump Derangement Syndrome” by now. A significant portion of the country’s Democrats fell ill to it after Donald Trump won in 2016, and they still haven’t recovered.

While we’ve all had to deal with their collective anger in some way or another, most folks with TDS aren’t given the platform to make threatening remarks against the 45th President, but my Democrat opponent, Jon Tester, was given an opening on MSNBC, and boy did he take it.

A poll released recently found our campaign leading Jon Tester's by 3 points. Our lead fell within the margin of error, meaning this race if effectively TIED.

body:
This is our most competitive and affordable chance to flip a GOP-held U.S. Senate seat.
#
$5, Peter.
That’s what I'm asking you to chip in today to help us defeat Josh Hawley and elect Lucas Kunce to Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat. Here’s why:
**[CHIP IN $5 NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45361?refcode=em20240414-5269&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5269%2E614464%2EhggQ1n)**
**Missouri is our best opportunity to flip a GOP-held U.S. Senate seat in 2024** — and not just because multiple polls have confirmed that Lucas and Hawley are already in a _statistical tie._
**The reality is that investing in our race is cost-effective.** Every $1 spent here can go nearly five times as far as it does in states like Texas and Florida.
So that $5 we’re asking you to chip in today? Our campaign can use that to reach 25 new voters with digital ads, or we can reach undecided voters by sending a piece of mail to their homes with information about Lucas.
In Texas and Florida, that same $5 only reaches 5 voters.
**Your support goes further in Missouri and has more of an impact on the outcome of this race than it does in any other state with a chance to flip a GOP-held U.S. Senate seat this year. That’s why we’re asking for your support:**
**[Will you make sure your donation goes as far as possible by chipping in $5 or more today? Approval polling from _Morning Consult_ found that Josh Hawley is the most vulnerable GOP Senator up for re-election this year, so your support today will help us keep exposing his record to the undecided voters that will determine the outcome of this election.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45361?refcode=em20240414-5269&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5269%2E614464%2EhggQ1n)**

name: John Kennedy
subject: FW: Is there anybody out there who will listen?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
| [](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=bd517e53f7cf4ec0a2a2c26dee76a87d&_e=RC6VHkq5Sq-CXwzxpqe4m_dqWXre-xf-DJH4SFG6jFmRc5wk2T_X-EzzAMyPqKWy_YpraCXlmFSxiTCOiBabIyHumGlHkgQCE3ELtQnUTUUxxwaL3W-RRNTF_l3T3GPnsStNs1SzXfoCqo8kbbjNxAr5D382csjWm1DrdsulFVI3JWrtyRld0mlsGo0HFmnyYEKfwdz9OOO2Uvy27HiwtSPDsmBXjt023X4j0bHgGcZQv0aubUzQhGrcaFwGL6xFbuent7-2yjPcWL59Ye4MXQPENfSMVHMoi8W6dyqjjLeLaWNQCdY9ZQ_T81-bdbmbWRlBPNSVsmOLn_vTqPmlB0wJebYPVlbTMscjFiIYa97t1le_teVnTRdXVB0nOPjV)
---
Folks,

I’m more nervous than a cat in a room full of rocking chairs.

I reached out the other day about how I won’t be able to hold down the front lines much longer without the resources and support from strong conservatives like yourself.

A LOT of my supporters responded, but I was just alerted – you still have not.

My request is simple. I just need $1 from you, Friend.

If you feel up to the task of pitching in, you can do so here: **[[LINK]](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=bd517e53f7cf4ec0a2a2c26dee76a87d&_e=RC6VHkq5Sq-CXwzxpqe4m_dqWXre-xf-DJH4SFG6jFmRc5wk2T_X-EzzAMyPqKWy_YpraCXlmFSxiTCOiBabIyHumGlHkgQCE3ELtQnUTUUxxwaL3W-RRNTF_l3T3GPnsStNs1SzXfoCqo8kbbjNxAr5D382csjWm1DrdsulFVJfhdx5nKAx2WrymvKKmlyM7lv3R047MlpJLtvCHPvJ9fSdRX6JQ7hW03RfAN9HkQbRvZuq8nTlPW5fhZ3H3F2fgcqUQkS1yjdLFGQMP6OW4Ppl1QgZ2neZh7RV90ExbGxUg2KzhsNXVDlJJtyIAXNE5vhCvYQnENOn7AofKiW0dsr13TfOG40q6yS1xVnMVIw5EE9j9B06RXlWrx1QXsL8)**

-JNK

\- - - Begin forwarded message - - -

_Folks,

I'm up a creek without a paddle, and my pirogue just sprung a huge leak.

I'm giving it all I got to stand up for you and our Conservative values, but everywhere I turn, there are more and more of them woke loonies.

I can manage to hold down the front lines, but I won’t be able to much longer without the resources and support from strong, conservative patriots like yourself.

Friend, even if you can chip in $1, it’ll go a long way in eliminating woke ideologies from the halls of our government!

Chip in here: **[[Link]](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=bd517e53f7cf4ec0a2a2c26dee76a87d&_e=RC6VHkq5Sq-CXwzxpqe4m_dqWXre-xf-DJH4SFG6jFmRc5wk2T_X-EzzAMyPqKWy_YpraCXlmFSxiTCOiBabIyHumGlHkgQCE3ELtQnUTUUxxwaL3W-RRNTF_l3T3GPnsStNs1SzXfoCqo8kbbjNxAr5D382csjWm1DrdsulFVJfhdx5nKAx2WrymvKKmlyM7lv3R047MlpJLtvCHPvJ9YcJZuSqXC9u16qHnPT9-ywhg7GPVaYdIPCj7V3Ujxpxexosi1ABL67K5M_p4WtJsLP2P_wbU0kigvT9hPjDgB5iv1BG39lYQDN_G8_MXtB7OeyRH5-VQKw7oyDo_ApRS9xv6NCQGJrJbi3Zw-NrrBf3nLARzDekUuyf-_ujAmHO)**

I won’t take up any more of your precious time, but just know I rely on folks like you who are willing to do what it takes to preserve American Freedom!

God Bless,
Senator Kennedy

_

name: Josh Hawley
subject: “I lift my eyes to the Lord”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter,

I wanted to share a [Bible verse](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=0141257763664e2fa14e8b4dca607187&_e=dvKRRKs3KdqkgMX1xViymWKbZEGzycDB24YUxF9ji9XDJ1rZa6JX7Qdf1Ya1tWGRw1oFt571NBA1_zgbck4WsIn2Ypw5L_HXcXFw6nSO2MHCANBtJyyqjVkGkaQw045708I9-C9P05whypmI8X9ztvkK-U6dF3kEznlSg__oIeb9_vmW6Qj-f3w8yFpVAfQV-9YJihJkqK8LQXKEISlnhGDNQZYmbOYrRTkrh_Noy9AzkX0wwujcPZi2LabsyEex-Anbf3_eOw-Lagh--r6KKGh_Q77aRtDkT8O6gwruXYlkEB26CCS38wVCKUne-jwdW774WysH7n4376M8G0S5bXUBjnYXYf3QuEOHJMf5cuxQ76AidNefeKIElqNRBYlA) that’s been weighing on my heart:

_“I lift up my eyes to the mountains—where does my help come from? My help comes from the Lord, the Maker of Heaven and Earth”_ \- Psalm 12:1-2

When I experience challenges in life, I look to the Lord. I don’t get angry. I don’t worry. I simply pray and seek guidance from the Lord.
Right now, our country is in trouble - but too many are looking to all the wrong places for help.

For too long, people have put their faith in politicians to save us. Politicians won’t save us.

**[We need leaders who exalt God and His Word in America.](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=0141257763664e2fa14e8b4dca607187&_e=dvKRRKs3KdqkgMX1xViymWKbZEGzycDB24YUxF9ji9XDJ1rZa6JX7Qdf1Ya1tWGRw1oFt571NBA1_zgbck4WsIn2Ypw5L_HXcXFw6nSO2MHCANBtJyyqjVkGkaQw045708I9-C9P05whypmI8X9ztvkK-U6dF3kEznlSg__oIeb9_vmW6Qj-f3w8yFpVAfQV-9YJihJkqK8LQXKEISlnhGDNQZYmbOYrRTkrh_Noy9BlZPJlxba1AbyEB_QfxxZgJquj31bulwnd0WeD04EaNirxt7dZojLouXbI-5-VTPn-BGfLjgJseRiwu5zY4i_oqviGUuYL4XwS9yayc3c6Y8VP_dQppCTN2N1yFxgnmVjAFOphexlSFSjDmlUy4rNv)**

[**ELECT FAITH BASED LEADERS**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=0141257763664e2fa14e8b4dca607187&_e=dvKRRKs3KdqkgMX1xViymWKbZEGzycDB24YUxF9ji9XDJ1rZa6JX7Qdf1Ya1tWGRw1oFt571NBA1_zgbck4WsIn2Ypw5L_HXcXFw6nSO2MHCANBtJyyqjVkGkaQw045708I9-C9P05whypmI8X9ztvkK-U6dF3kEznlSg__oIeb9_vmW6Qj-f3w8yFpVAfQV-9YJihJkqK8LQXKEISlnhGDNQZYmbOYrRTkrh_Noy9Afg7Ye-d1Lo-GbdF92gRqN8JAUfKz5BxkFD48FiENWGAx7E1ZWfaDNfezHIqalwJEs3XSB4X3R90IcPesrbnXgVH0fGdzNojf3VSUQ_8FgUpzPP0xTAvL9mbsf1HHtONH9zve00rTOXz2dYPvt4h5U)
---
I start every day with a prayer for this country. A prayer for us to overcome our current struggles. A prayer for wisdom. A prayer that God blesses us with a stronger nation for our children.

I’m praying God blesses America with revival. **[Can you join my team?](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=0141257763664e2fa14e8b4dca607187&_e=dvKRRKs3KdqkgMX1xViymWKbZEGzycDB24YUxF9ji9XDJ1rZa6JX7Qdf1Ya1tWGRw1oFt571NBA1_zgbck4WsIn2Ypw5L_HXcXFw6nSO2MHCANBtJyyqjVkGkaQw045708I9-C9P05whypmI8X9ztvkK-U6dF3kEznlSg__oIeb9_vmW6Qj-f3w8yFpVAfQV-9YJihJkqK8LQXKEISlnhGDNQZYmbOYrRTkrh_Noy9CAQkNJ2OX3IL5dCK_JeAa1GaEApZrFopCFRPFJLAIIrdjPUpRiaAH_lcCksNBlP5d1X2jyeCtDeNV1KaVcnYkLnbgO5SVrIE4P_Ngnd5lLoDH6Yxhj6Iu71yIFIcc5pNDANytd-6WGceVXmmIGiC6F)**

clean_body: | | | Peter, I wanted to share a that’s been weighing on my heart: “I lift up my eyes to the mountains—where does my help come from? My help comes from the Lord, the Maker of Heaven and Earth” \- Psalm 12:1-2 When I experience challenges in life, I look to the Lord. I don’t get angry. I don’t worry. I simply pray and seek guidance from the Lord. Right now, our country is in trouble - but too many are looking to all the wrong places for help. For too long, people have put their faith in politicians to save us. Politicians won’t save us. I start every day with a prayer for this country. A prayer for us to overcome our current struggles. A prayer for wisdom. A prayer that God blesses us with a stronger nation for our children. I’m praying God blesses America with revival. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | | | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

Trust me on this: Kirsten delivers _results._ Over the last couple of years, she's won legislation to reform our military's criminal justice system, protect survivors of sexual harassment and assault, expand benefits for veterans and 9/11 first responders, crack down on gun trafficking, and tackle corruption in Washington. Now, she's leading the charge to win guaranteed paid family leave, certify the Equal Rights Amendment, restore reproductive rights, protect seniors, and so much more.
I've had the privilege of working closely with Kirsten on these issues and so many others. **I've seen her fight harder than just about anyone else to build coalitions across the aisle, block dangerous bills, and get her legislation across the finish line.** And I'm not exaggerating here: While in the House, Kirsten gave birth to her second son mere hours after working a 13-hour day.
Kirsten is one of a kind. And families in New York and across the nation need her voice in Washington advocating for their rights, priorities, and futures.
But that's why the GOP is ready to do everything within their power to defeat her this fall. New York Republicans celebrated their best election cycle in decades in 2022. **Their extremist candidates flipped enough seats in the midterms to win control of the House and came within single digits of winning the governorship. Now, they're directly targeting Kirsten's seat to retake Senate control.**
I know that my friend has what it takes to defeat the GOP and their megadonors. **But because she refuses to accept money from corporate PACs, she's counting on strong grassroots support to win this critical race.[So please, before her mid-month deadline, will you rush a donation to help Kirsten defend her seat and continue to fight for progress for families in the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83002360/466987249/-1789327584?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4964-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2NmYjY5OC02ZGZhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VLJhcql_7N9sbw0M_4ohnG93yL7i05PLMonAW3wSFBc=)**

name: Marilyn Harper
subject: My son, Hill
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
I know he’ll make you proud as Michigan’s next U.S. Senator.
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/421?t=1&akid=1158%2E62735%2EHv3ogO)
Hi there — I’m **Marilyn Harper, Hill’s mother!**
[](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1280?t=2&akid=1158%2E62735%2EHv3ogO)
Peter, I was _immensely_ proud of Hill when he told me he was running to represent Michigan in the U.S. Senate.
Ever since he was a boy, he’s had a passion for service to others — and I've watched him carry those values with him throughout his life. Harry and I raised him to be compassionate, loving, and empathetic. **We raised him to make life better for the people around him, and I know deep in my heart it’s the reason he jumped into this Senate race.**
Hill has what it takes because he’s always been a fighter — whether in law school, during his battle with cancer, or as a single father looking after his mother and young son under one roof.
But Hill is facing some tough odds, and while I’m his biggest cheerleader, it’s going to take a lot more than a mother’s love and support to get him across the finish line. **[If you could chip in just $5, $10, or even $25, I know it will go a long way in helping him build the campaign he needs to win.](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1281?t=3&akid=1158%2E62735%2EHv3ogO)**
**[DONATE »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1281?t=4&akid=1158%2E62735%2EHv3ogO)**
Thank you so much, Peter. Let’s help Hill make us _all_ proud!
Dr. Marilyn Harper
* * *
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bax_hh_email?refcode=bax_hh_emailfooter&t=5&refcode2=1158_62735_Hv3ogO&akid=1158%2E62735%2EHv3ogO)**

name: Elissa Slotkin for Senate
subject: Great rebuke to Betsy DeVos.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1343%2E135344%2EDmPIrk)

If everyone reading this donated $3 to Elissa Slotkin’s Senate campaign, we would not only have a huge number of donations, but we would reach the incremental goals we need to hit in order to win this race and keep Michigan’s Senate seat BLUE.
Unfortunately, not everyone gives. And the fact that Elissa rejects corporate PAC money makes things harder than they could be. [**So she's relying on people who understand how important this race is -- and Michigan is -- to chip-in before our FEC deadline ends.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-apr24.UpsRlZ&refcode=em240414-1-15&t=2&akid=1343%2E135344%2EDmPIrk)**
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-apr24.UpsRlZ&refcode=em240414-1-15&t=3&akid=1343%2E135344%2EDmPIrk)
Friends --
The DeVos family has supported opponents of Elissa in the past, and it looks like they’re ready to double down on this Senate race.
Republican Mike Rogers' first FEC report was filled with donations from a bunch of members of the DeVos family -- contributions totaling $46,200 all made on one single day.
By contrast, the majority of the donations we receive come from people contributing significantly smaller donations than the DeVos family made to Mike Rogers.
And what you may not know is that one of the single greatest sources of individual donations to our campaign is the response to emails like this.
That’s why Elissa would love to earn your support today. [**Your help using this link to make a contribution to Elissa’s campaign for United States Senate would be a great rebuke to the DeVos support.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-apr24.UpsRlZ&refcode=em240414-1-15&t=4&akid=1343%2E135344%2EDmPIrk)

clean_body: If everyone reading this donated $3 to Elissa Slotkin’s Senate campaign, we would not only have a huge number of donations, but we would reach the incremental goals we need to hit in order to win this race and keep Michigan’s Senate seat BLUE. Unfortunately, not everyone gives. And the fact that Elissa rejects corporate PAC money makes things harder than they could be. Friends -- The DeVos family has supported opponents of Elissa in the past, and it looks like they’re ready to double down on this Senate race. Republican Mike Rogers' first FEC report was filled with donations from a bunch of members of the DeVos family -- contributions totaling $46,200 all made on one single day. By contrast, the majority of the donations we receive come from people contributing significantly smaller donations than the DeVos family made to Mike Rogers. And what you may not know is that one of the single greatest sources of individual donations to our campaign is the response to emails like this. That’s why Elissa would love to earn your support today. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | | | | | | | ** Thank you, Elissa Slotkin for Senate PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN P.O. Box 4145 East Lansing, MI 48826

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: Sign on to support the Resolution Recognizing the Human Right to Utilities

body:
Cutting off water and other essential services is a form of violence. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWc-6kVThmY0fQknoUXPWx2kNGp07zuU80qSkM7HMaUs97PcW8_rEmK0-ve5M-ojBAP5zwGR_P0jANAAFX02H5kDykvYmVJX3yyx364CCOcScpfPwHeOlfpBRQTik-FvSAQXh7gGpW44qC9alOOi6qJcE1KHWVjuGFEt6kOrJhRBBNj2_qdj0PVj_UE5Qw8YKHXHgVMyafGDEPWhdtlQ158EckPcOf50C8d1DjbAsCbpPMHsQ4hOxYHULgUUxWFjytwSHKcGG0YzWRi5C20XQt9g/45i/Y9BhITonRqWG8FL_KI7klQ/h0/h001.iVWWi5MonyTa9D7oSttMYNUpCC-rld4KBhIKbUp3uBM)
---
Friend, From Detroit to Palestine, cutting off water and other essential services is a form of violence. In my city, thousands of Detroiters have had their access to water shut off, whether because of lead contamination or because people can’t afford to pay skyrocketing water bills. And this winter, over 100,000 people in Southeast Michigan were forced to go days without power and heat during extreme cold due to power outages. Instead of investing in needed infrastructure to prevent outages, our region’s investor-owned utility monopoly (DTE Energy) enriches its executives and shareholders. Despite some of the least reliable service in the country, DTE charges some of the highest rates in the country. After securing a rate increase in December, DTE just filed to raise rates again on people who cannot afford to pay. Each year, DTE cruelly disconnects life-sustaining services for hundreds of thousands of households who can’t afford rising rates. DTE even sells residential customers’ debt to a predatory debt collection firm. Across the country, other for-profit utility companies are doing the same. **This is unacceptable. Basic human needs should not be treated as commodities for profit.** [**If you agree, please sign on to support the**** _Resolution Recognizing the Human Right to Utilities_****, which asserts that affordable and reliable utilities are a human right, and demands an end to utility shutoffs and cancellation of household utility debt.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5Gynh1iRUvNsxDTyelD_1Bi3Wk_GNjOyM5ZdKiMsiDlW1adjxtjXDvdOsCAlxrTssjm4j5xXeoyBQOoO0qu9doQ-qoy0JJV8ybS10OjftDkXH5nJS-EYav5rXut-9JCKKvZj-EQzU8P8afsjSc0gvgs4J-pKmflVTWY3vnRwm-UPrta6L6roadi2H7NBjaENJPnwIHNTR_kkkBDKyQ1UOMfR8I6dpnh4pnJJvX9MbmdjAqi1lEIKHxKKoehSEtrKMbZqehR51Ntl7MXnux887FAXIdQcG84Uhu6K06c7m8D4bEa20L8GN1qnvoohgL41KQn9x2aUUABm7aUet3lxJ2ozELdjh_2COzpUYsLkv6wJujzHplwI9CFpU-ky8SHmuO3a04sTF004lgEjeF4qLWnpUq4s0LGZlPhuCxBGAXCXRd3o35lb9L0EwBYFzYD_Q/45i/Y9BhITonRqWG8FL_KI7klQ/h1/h001.WAbO78bcBEDRwLGE9Zwwa6nbpmWZly7C5qwJIxEzHgs) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5Gynh1iRUvNsxDTyelD_1Bi3Wk_GNjOyM5ZdKiMsiDlW1adjxtjXDvdOsCAlxrTssjm4j5xXeoyBQOoO0qu9doWwVuf-SWGGqrYrPbaJBxHvWaehg1vM3ixqmvgUlzDQPA_ZPs9I3jCMuo_Dfg19I0qJYtZYlDbaiSR0kiUumRxwwWDoRH1EBnwDgLSy51oRytzDmhqPTIIhDIkgGnC0njiKO69x95nrCv1NTj5r7eV7cT9a8LG7-wf_E3db70LfzhjjE_l5aLpejadxMS9kUBMhfv5zoT7Z1DHQmnTtnea4NzgNZhb4vJCfkYLKpfq35azvhFrU4_MlpBOyFh_EW4Kf_qxQePBJB-8HRKly6NyqjdnObMhfRv2Kcy3vS26T53bFwMdDeEwzJFOZ_NOr2f2qyDJsCtDorpnZxExrV4v8asPXJ0LQctgYiKX8gyvOe/45i/Y9BhITonRqWG8FL_KI7klQ/h2/h001.-J-ztF4WAdGIIWR1VMI6HkkDiRUpfPrupcIZ0li-TvI)
---
Thank you for taking action to demand human rights. I will continue fighting for our right to access clean water along with other life-sustaining utility services, as part of ensuring human dignity for all people.

In service,
Rashida
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sat, April 13, 2024
Subject: Sign on to support the Resolution Recognizing the Human Right to Utilities
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
From Detroit to Palestine, access to reliable and affordable utility services is a human right. Wherever you live in the United States, we are seeing large increases in our basic utilities, including water that has gone up by 400%.
In my state of Michigan, we saw our costs skyrocket while power outages increased throughout our community. Despite charging some of the highest rates in the nation, Michigan’s investor-owned utility monopoly DTE Energy provides some of the most unreliable service.
**After securing a new rate hike in December, DTE Energy just filed to raise rates again on people in my district who cannot afford to pay. Now, DTE has requested an additional rate hike that will cost our residents $450 million.**
The vast majority of Americans live paycheck to paycheck, and can’t afford skyrocketing rates for essential services. **Millions of people have fallen behind on ever-increasing utility bills and face possible shutoffs of their power, water, and gas.**
**Utility companies treat these life-sustaining needs as commodities** , which disproportionately impacts communities of color and low-wealth communities, who spend a greater portion of their income on energy bills.
I’m leading efforts in Congress to stop utility shutoffs, including introducing legislation with Reps. Cori Bush and Jamaal Bowman to assert that affordable and reliable utilities are a human right, and to demand an end to utility shutoffs for nonpayment, as well as cancellation of household utility debt.
[**Please add your name to support our**** _Resolution Recognizing the Human Right to Utilities_****, which calls on lawmakers to stop utility companies from shutting off essential public services.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5Gynh1iRUvNsxDTyelD_1Bi3Wk_GNjOyM5ZdKiMsiDlW1adjxtjXDvdOsCAlxrTssjm4j5xXeoyBQOoO0qu9doZ6X8jn-IbYHyxd9trqId2FoSLMAPCDT0D0AHsyb15ArNjJdOY5RGzdkJGdfuMNFUdXyx3QlVvF2d9yRHOaMMyCthfIr4j2HvIj56Cnq_LuHG-MaZG3-mxEitc93rc50_xufuPXfUuK0XKy0FK7YmonwDyKFuxILMXLInDRYWFwhGAvXoYzERl1Pijp7J1HRg6mpCyN4WmlrdiPP-doI2UcqTsYO17NblKW7IDoaUpY3mcD1vh5cmZMARCn2NfNE9AglhzcRI-MQTldr3Xsr9SbgVwSBZjByXfhokmjQj2UtE_JEJoGujPZpAu80zgwLfm-Mff8ams6sXNHNh593IigKOoXc3WE9DvYF6wK41yc3/45i/Y9BhITonRqWG8FL_KI7klQ/h3/h001.JGqjVkd3TlIiJb95OBTglQoGh77X5batE83H3yjVJK4)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5Gynh1iRUvNsxDTyelD_1Bi3Wk_GNjOyM5ZdKiMsiDlW1adjxtjXDvdOsCAlxrTssjm4j5xXeoyBQOoO0qu9doVnFyuISk1qEapetGzvX3EMOV-fpmkEKJYsK6O-nuz6HxSv6w6W1XF9B0JUx_FJXI6nDqyZvjvJUtadVfyHrdh2M-K10TMI__uGhHp4p6Wy3vyZgDmP7ZdoyeJwg24rhd_4skinShG4ToFOGuOBaRfAJ142UpEbOYU3jmDrOj6cSWv8PlZhpYsAcMe-kFUGjVM1rkliDfqRRbCBr2s64S1PYDKnHZ4k2ncLYDBmlIusyIeUBLYARz59VrtpXXlElEQC_NGS1OAE98GKFXwMQzGhS4gBNnJW1M2YT-Zg2Inuqws3Bsb2i_Z7cRJG5QWySng7g21E5NIwyPuZeSwxkRH9IAKmpWRoNqpSTfAYCkoC9/45i/Y9BhITonRqWG8FL_KI7klQ/h4/h001.Cv0KWsYp2Tx6kQv_WUuLAR-J8EPnyWHuP0OAzeDwvQ8)
---
In addition to pushing in Congress to guarantee our right to affordable and reliable utility services, I’ve joined local grassroots groups to protest DTE Energy’s rate hikes and to hold them accountable.
Instead of investing in needed infrastructure to prevent outages, DTE Energy enriches their executives and shareholders and spends millions on campaign contributions to avoid real accountability.
Meanwhile, DTE cruelly disconnects life-sustaining service for hundreds of thousands of households each year, and even sells residential customers’ debt to a predatory debt collection firm.
And customers who can afford to pay still end up suffering. During the recent extreme cold, over 100,000 DTE customers in Southeast Michigan were forced to go days without power and heat this winter.
[**Basic human needs should not be treated as commodities for profit. If you agree, please sign on to support the**** _Resolution Recognizing the Human Right to Utilities_****, which asserts that affordable and reliable utilities are a human right, and demands an end to utility shutoffs and the cancellation of household utility debt.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5Gynh1iRUvNsxDTyelD_1Bi3Wk_GNjOyM5ZdKiMsiDlW1adjxtjXDvdOsCAlxrTssjm4j5xXeoyBQOoO0qu9doRdeNetUthV3DdGDurY1dfkfrVMABTzor9gneDqzha8R4AhsOB5qt_hx0AvKnRvyRMkcKthi2vALeRndjAJgxj7LPaqoB-jRkLgLh6qYLtAWYngE0qUQCSaD1tG5KoIuzwYWU3U35coeFbecuYoDwj18184FWDOuGnBIQVXF-SBTzn3tntB1HUBqAb5jq14fo4sFv0JUuW7Dlg8bN8WfXkt63TT-UetLAGCz6NoYPJKm4ipZ0KvBVC5l9IHJZUMfr83EoUE_kORkNpBA_LEBJsbxqa3HHpcABVQt7Hqz0dl1P19mXArbdelne__HYfvZQ6-Ta6Hd8800_Ym9UYojluSPdiZ9-Q7XgyaPrja7QHHW/45i/Y9BhITonRqWG8FL_KI7klQ/h5/h001.w2DoAhAvuCqlnceNzBl5PmfWfW8IVWwMbn8InkBPOy8)
[SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5Gynh1iRUvNsxDTyelD_1Bi3Wk_GNjOyM5ZdKiMsiDlW1adjxtjXDvdOsCAlxrTssjm4j5xXeoyBQOoO0qu9doYiKIGJarilAaOmpZfvfw-hm4okxbaA8WSGpl7xzdQjiz36oE9gveJMRqS07-Wmy7v6lb1RCbU-ztq2yGAjvywl7lg7CnkPeLs8BmEJblXiT7KM7Autl_ngukhcFUd2FJsku5WvjI7ZxWOLH4ZWH-T9PWJm2sHV4f7W7NYpRUsiCgwZowexxZO8T9BibGLVACPjT_JXmHCC7Wj18do6VyD_n00skrV53ShJcBjRivaFy7Go13tr4CD14HFrj2g40WPThMqGjt7I68QGmg2Yh-gBYB_Wmn0KvprIXsIxaLTto6den8x09xmWmETIID28GDvBIj-RHhDSOkEvVNUivZezODSBSeaFKsbw4VBcCEOkX/45i/Y9BhITonRqWG8FL_KI7klQ/h6/h001.F8wRUB_3FSoN_VLqzXAHJKZ7U4DwTwgwkik9NrVKB3o)
---
Thank you for taking action. I promise I will keep fighting for the rights we all deserve, so our communities can thrive.
In Congress, I helped create a fund totalling $1.1 billion to stop water shutoffs during the pandemic, and secured a ban on utility shutoffs in a bill that passed the U.S. House of Representatives.
Our right to utilities includes the right to access clean water. I have passed historic amendments that would provide $23 billion to fully replace dangerous lead pipes, moved the EPA to replace lead service lines, and created the bipartisan Get the Lead Out Caucus in the House of Representatives where I’m continuing to push for urgent action to remove toxic lead pipes.
In service,
Rashida

And customers who can afford to pay still end up suffering. During the recent extreme cold, over 100,000 DTE customers in Southeast Michigan were forced to go days without power and heat this winter. Thank you for taking action. I promise I will keep fighting for the rights we all deserve, so our communities can thrive. In Congress, I helped create a fund totalling $1.1 billion to stop water shutoffs during the pandemic, and secured a ban on utility shutoffs in a bill that passed the U.S. House of Representatives. Our right to utilities includes the right to access clean water. I have passed historic amendments that would provide $23 billion to fully replace dangerous lead pipes, moved the EPA to replace lead service lines, and created the bipartisan Get the Lead Out Caucus in the House of Representatives where I’m continuing to push for urgent action to remove toxic lead pipes. In service, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . I've always enjoyed the weather here in Alaska, Peter.

As our friends in the Lower 48 states begin to enjoy spring, we here in Alaska continue to relish the fresh snowfall and cold nights.

Alaskans are independent and strong. We help our neighbors, our friends, and even strangers in times of need because living 2,000 miles away from the closest state, we must rely on each other. That's how I want to lead as your congresswoman. I've always been a listener. And I want to rely on your advice and suggestions when I get to D.C,

I firmly believe that our work ethic and resilience represent some of Alaska's most valuable exports, qualities that Washington sorely needs.

Thank you for your unwavering support,

**Congressional Leadership Fund****Endorses Nancy Dahlstrom!** _On**April 3rd**_ , the Congressional Leadership fund identified Nancy as an essential part of the 2024 conservative strategy. CLF is a top Republican campaign apparatus that will _invest heavily to advance the conservative agenda_ and expand the House Majority this cycle. Nancy was one of twenty congressional challengers included in the “Trailblazers” program who will receive financial support from the group as a high-priority congressional target.
---
| | _"Nancy has proven she has what it takes to connect with voters and win in a battle ground district. She is a stand out candidate with a proven track record of tangible achievement and impressive character."_ **_– Dan Conston, CLF President_**
---
| | |
---
**Anne Garland Young, Widow of Don Young** **Endorses Nancy Dahlstrom!** Anne Garland Young, the widow of Congressman Don Young, [announced](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a8e41c2a970b44d0a291e2cbf8512a7f&_m=a7c80a5f603d4b7faed56f7935bfe94e&_e=6B6uwvQogueDY-J5_HOSN73J_A0hBs_PU-d5CB_wLrgC3ycqxA7p9MifOf0SOkvYwVX18XEMBX-CrfDUVC1Jl0toMLaB28ZSA_ldscdSqQNLEU6odu41gKgyauZPuzeIh_XkvgA1tlSUz6fRBY4BggtDqmE7cqyybr7ngcMPH95SdZB0FS9C0areTKMPWUx4TVVzRS3V4lStjkC85BCxvoJbDhoAy5Zm25wezhBL7gJ72jBffFbYjGi5ZrZF2thz-0FtMIyKCgHVDME73ID2uuC4X1CVwz5XzRT92H1swIei5Ut9dKcc2Ml5TQ_3773x) her endorsement of Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom in her bid to represent Alaska in Congress. Rep. Don Young served as Alaska’s sole Congressman for 49 years, from 1973 to 2022. Mrs. Young joins Governor Mike Dunleavy in endorsing Lt. Governor Dahlstrom as she seeks to build on Congressman Young’s incredible legacy. Dahlstrom also has the backing of Republican Leadership including Speaker Mike Johnson, Leader Steve Scalise, and Whip Tom Emmer, and Chairwoman Elise Stefanik.
---
| | “I am proud to endorse Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom for United States Congress. She is the only candidate my husband, Congressman Don Young, would be supporting,” stated Anne Garland Young. “She is an active, experienced, and competent leader in Alaska already, and I know that her integrity and proven representative skills will uniquely serve our state in Congress. Nancy is the person Alaska needs with the values Alaskans share. She will stand up for Alaska in every way, just as my husband did.” **_– Ann Garland Young_**
