clean_body: | | | | | I've always enjoyed the weather here in Alaska, Peter. As our friends in the Lower 48 states begin to enjoy spring, we here in Alaska continue to relish the fresh snowfall and cold nights. Alaskans are independent and strong. We help our neighbors, our friends, and even strangers in times of need because living 2,000 miles away from the closest state, we must rely on each other. That's how I want to lead as your congresswoman. I've always been a listener. And I want to rely on your advice and suggestions when I get to D.C, I firmly believe that our work ethic and resilience represent some of Alaska's most valuable exports, qualities that Washington sorely needs. Thank you for your unwavering support, Nancy Dahlstrom Candidate for Congress, Alaska At-Large | We have the momentum with the support of conservative leaders in Alaska and across the country. They're on Team Dahlstrom, and I cannot wait to join them to help get America back on track! ✅ Ann Garland Young, Widow of Don Young ✅ Congressional Leadership Fund ✅ Mike Dunleavy, Governor of Alaska ✅ Speaker of the House Mike Johnson ✅ House Republican Conference Chair Elise Stefanik ✅ House Majority Leader Steve Scalise ✅ House Majority Whip Tom Emmer ✅ Winning for Women PAC | | | Congressional Leadership FundEndorses Nancy Dahlstrom! OnApril 3rd , the Congressional Leadership fund identified Nancy as an essential part of the 2024 conservative strategy. CLF is a top Republican campaign apparatus that will invest heavily to advance the conservative agenda and expand the House Majority this cycle. Nancy was one of twenty congressional challengers included in the “Trailblazers” program who will receive financial support from the group as a high-priority congressional target. | | "Nancy has proven she has what it takes to connect with voters and win in a battle ground district. She is a stand out candidate with a proven track record of tangible achievement and impressive character." – Dan Conston, CLF President | | | Anne Garland Young, Widow of Don Young Endorses Nancy Dahlstrom! Anne Garland Young, the widow of Congressman Don Young, her endorsement of Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom in her bid to represent Alaska in Congress. Rep. Don Young served as Alaska’s sole Congressman for 49 years, from 1973 to 2022. Mrs. Young joins Governor Mike Dunleavy in endorsing Lt. Governor Dahlstrom as she seeks to build on Congressman Young’s incredible legacy. Dahlstrom also has the backing of Republican Leadership including Speaker Mike Johnson, Leader Steve Scalise, and Whip Tom Emmer, and Chairwoman Elise Stefanik. | | “I am proud to endorse Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom for United States Congress. She is the only candidate my husband, Congressman Don Young, would be supporting,” stated Anne Garland Young. “She is an active, experienced, and competent leader in Alaska already, and I know that her integrity and proven representative skills will uniquely serve our state in Congress. Nancy is the person Alaska needs with the values Alaskans share. She will stand up for Alaska in every way, just as my husband did.” – Ann Garland Young | | | | Embrace the essence of Alaska while supporting Nancy's congressional campaign with our themed mugs. Every purchase fuels our get-out-the-vote efforts and spreads our conservative message throughout the state. Supplies are limited, so act fast! | It's time for Mary Peltola to leave! Week after week, month after month, Mary Peltola is abandoning Alaskan values for the radical ideology of the left. Thankfully, the dedicated volunteers at the AKGOP are keeping track of her destructive behavior. Just last month, she joined Nancy Pelosi and voted to strike down major reform legislation to combat rampant corruption in the green energy sector. | Thanks for tuning in to another Dahlstrom Dispatch! With your support, we can restore Alaska's conservative voice to congress. Can't donate? No problem. There are many ways that you can get involved. Check out some volunteer opportunities below. | | | | Was this email forwarded to you? If so, below to sign up for our Dahlstrom Dispatch and never miss a beat! | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | |

name: Kari Lake
subject: Send Kamala Harris a message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate
body:
This is your chance

|
---
Kamala Harris is visiting Arizona.

Not to address the border crisis she created.

Not to address runaway inflation crippling American families.

Not to help the American people.

She's coming to attack me and President Trump.

It's clear that our Vice President is woefully out of touch with the American people, so I decided to help her out. I'm giving all my supporters the opportunity to send her a message and let her know what real Americans think about the disaster her and her boss Sleepy Joe have created.

body:

clean_body: Our campaign is taking a serious look at how much we can invest in ads, on-the-ground organizing, and data and technology we know we will need to win, and we’re counting on you. | | | Peter, this is a critical moment for our campaign, which is why I’m reaching out personally. We have just wrapped up the first quarter of 2024. Now our team is taking a serious look at how much more we can invest in ads, on-the-ground organizing, and data and technology we need to win in just seven months. Since Day One, President Biden and I have taken action to create millions of new jobs, lower health care and prescription costs, combat the climate crisis, and so much more. Meanwhile, Donald Trump says he is "proud" to have ushered in the overturning of Roe v. Wade , stripping reproductive freedom away from millions of women in America. He has vowed to “terminate” the Affordable Care Act, slash Social Security and Medicare, and pass more tax handouts for the ultra-wealthy and big corporations. Plus, Trump and outside spending organizations have been throwing millions of dollars worth of attack ads at this team -- and they are hoping we won’t have enough resources to respond. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Millions of people like you from across the country have joined our reelection campaign because they believe in our vision of progress and in taking a stand against Donald Trump. Now, the President and I are asking for your support once more. Thank you for all that you do, Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Heating up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Friends -
There are less than 48 hours to go before we hit the mid-point of April, so we have a quick request today.
[**Can you PLEASE make a $3 contribution to The Long Run before today? We’ll put your donation immediately to work in flipping House and Senate races blue across the country.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-apr24.czsms6&refcode=em240414-1-tt&t=1&akid=5273%2E196590%2EuADjIq)
[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-apr24.czsms6&refcode=em240414-1-tt&t=2&akid=5273%2E196590%2EuADjIq)
If you don’t contribute today will it be the end of the world? No.
But do we really need your support today? YES.
Normally we wouldn't be so concerned, but races are heating up across the country earlier than usual. And with attacks on reproductive freedom growing nationwide, we need to support as many candidates as we can in key swing states like Michigan, Wisconsin, and Arizona — states that will determine which party controls the Senate and the House.
When we chat with Mandela after our mid-month deadline tomorrow, we want him to know that this team showed up again to help us fight for Democrats nationwide.
[**So we are asking again. Can you PLEASE make a $3 contribution to The Long Run before today? Every dollar counts when we are trying to protect the Senate, the presidency, and regain the House majority.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-apr24.czsms6&refcode=em240414-1-tt&t=3&akid=5273%2E196590%2EuADjIq)

name: Giffords.org
subject: Gabby doesn't need you to donate to every email, but she is hoping you'll give to this ONE.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Why today?
#

Friends -
If you have been waiting for the absolute perfect time to make your first donation to GIFFORDS and Gabby's campaign to make our communities safer from gun violence, we are here to tell you that TODAY is that day.
Why today?
Well, there are the very obvious reasons: our role in the presidential and congressional elections now that gun violence prevention is a winning issue. There's our work in state legislatures across the country. And there's the fact that the NRA is on the ropes and now is our time to relegate them to the dustbin of history.
But there's also a very practical reason: Gabby and this organization have very real fundraising goals we need to reach in order to win in November and keep making progress on strengthening our gun laws.
And tomorrow—the end of our mid-month fundraising drive—is an important benchmark on where we are.
The goals are not arbitrary. They are numbers we must reach to fund our work electing gun safety champions up and down the ballot. And getting that done means saving lives.
The fact is, there is no greater source of donations to GIFFORDS than emails like this one.
Gabby doesn't expect anyone to give every time we send an email, but right now we're in danger of falling behind on our goals for April, so she's really hoping you'll give to this one. What do you say?
[**Can Gabby count on you to use this link to contribute $3, or whatever you can afford today, to our campaign to make our communities safer from gun violence? Do it before our mid-month fundraising drive ends tomorrow. We would not ask if it were not so important.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr24.Y_Rik7&refcode=em240414-1-30&t=1&akid=7940%2E3935704%2ElhFNPF)

We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=7940%2E3935704%2ElhFNPF) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
clean_body: Why today? Friends - If you have been waiting for the absolute perfect time to make your first donation to GIFFORDS and Gabby's campaign to make our communities safer from gun violence, we are here to tell you that TODAY is that day. Why today? Well, there are the very obvious reasons: our role in the presidential and congressional elections now that gun violence prevention is a winning issue. There's our work in state legislatures across the country. And there's the fact that the NRA is on the ropes and now is our time to relegate them to the dustbin of history. But there's also a very practical reason: Gabby and this organization have very real fundraising goals we need to reach in order to win in November and keep making progress on strengthening our gun laws. And tomorrow—the end of our mid-month fundraising drive—is an important benchmark on where we are. The goals are not arbitrary. They are numbers we must reach to fund our work electing gun safety champions up and down the ballot. And getting that done means saving lives. The fact is, there is no greater source of donations to GIFFORDS than emails like this one. Gabby doesn't expect anyone to give every time we send an email, but right now we're in danger of falling behind on our goals for April, so she's really hoping you'll give to this one. What do you say? If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | Thank you in advance for stepping up to help Gabby today. The response to these messages is so important. The team at GIFFORDS ** Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

body:

The ‘folks out east’ who tried to bribe me and who run this country from the shadows with their dark money machine have found a new target. ME.

**First:** The Clinton-Soros machine endorsed my opponent.

**Then:** They funded a lawsuit against me for using my First Amendment right as a citizen and a concerned mom.

**Now:** I’m asking for your help to meet a MIDNIGHT fundraising deadline so we can FIGHT BACK and get to work on the one thing that matters in 2024. SAVING THIS NATION.

You may have heard President Trump say, “They’re not coming for me; they’re coming for you, and I’m in their way.”

Well — I’m right here in the way with him. Far-Left Democrats and Lincoln Project Republicans are teaming up to weaponize the government to financially ruin my FAMILY in the same way they’re trying to take out President Trump.

I need your support now more than ever. I’m asking for your help to raise $10,000 in small-dollar contributions by MIDNIGHT tonight so we can show the NATION we’re going to keep fighting for this country until we take our last breaths.

**I don’t care if I’m homeless or if I lose everything. NOTHING matters if we don’t win the November election.**

****If there’s ANYTHING you can spare — your donation will be MATCHED 10X if you donate towards my midnight deadline. Please DONATE BELOW!** **

clean_body: | The ‘folks out east’ who tried to bribe me and who run this country from the shadows with their dark money machine have found a new target. ME. First: The Clinton-Soros machine endorsed my opponent. Then: They funded a lawsuit against me for using my First Amendment right as a citizen and a concerned mom. Now: I’m asking for your help to meet a MIDNIGHT fundraising deadline so we can FIGHT BACK and get to work on the one thing that matters in 2024. SAVING THIS NATION. You may have heard President Trump say, “They’re not coming for me; they’re coming for you, and I’m in their way.” Well — I’m right here in the way with him. Far-Left Democrats and Lincoln Project Republicans are teaming up to weaponize the government to financially ruin my FAMILY in the same way they’re trying to take out President Trump. I need your support now more than ever. I’m asking for your help to raise $10,000 in small-dollar contributions by MIDNIGHT tonight so we can show the NATION we’re going to keep fighting for this country until we take our last breaths. I don’t care if I’m homeless or if I lose everything. NOTHING matters if we don’t win the November election. **If there’s ANYTHING you can spare — your donation will be MATCHED 10X if you donate towards my midnight deadline. Please DONATE BELOW! | Thank you, Kari Lake Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate If you'd like to donate by mail, **.

name: Rebekah (American Federation for Children Growth Fund)
subject: Too many schools are forced to do this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children Growth Fund
body:
Did you know that nearly 100 Catholic schools... ;
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osgMI_SiuN)
| | | Please see a note from one of our sponsors.
---
| | **" We're closing our doors... for good."** Friend, did you know that **nearly 100 Catholic schools across America** are forced to say those dreaded words every year? We believe every family deserves the freedom to choose where and how their children are educated -- **_and that 's why we're working to keep Catholic schools open_** _. _
---
[**SIGN THE PETITION: KEEP CATHOLIC SCHOOLS OPEN**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63053398:sgMI_SiuN:m:1:2532013465:8651FF2405A117D0844EACDE0EC8A37C:r)
---
Right now, 1.6 million American children are enrolled in Catholic schools, but the school system they love is under threat of extinction -- **especially** in states that don't allow taxpayers to direct education tax dollars to private schools.

For many families, their local Catholic school is the only available alternative to the public school system. **And if their school closes, their access to school choice can disappear overnight.**
---
[**SIGN THE PETITION: SAVE CATHOLIC SCHOOLS**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63053398:sgMI_SiuN:m:1:2532013465:8651FF2405A117D0844EACDE0EC8A37C:r)
---
**This is the withering of educational options in our most at-risk neighborhoods. **

__Because these schools aren't just for Catholics. __

There's a beautiful phrase you will hear from Catholic educators: "We don't teach these kids because _they're_ Catholic. We teach because _we're_ Catholic."

Catholic schools don't just open where there is existing parent wealth. As a charitable work, they serve many communities where quality education is lacking.

**Friend, this is why we fight for school choice -- and supporters like you are making a powerful impact every day.**
---
[**SIGN THE PETITION: DEFEND SCHOOL CHOICE**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63053398:sgMI_SiuN:m:1:2532013465:8651FF2405A117D0844EACDE0EC8A37C:r)
---
The **American Federation for Children Growth Fund** knows that education needs vary for every individual student. We work to give every child the opportunity to have his or her education needs met.

Whether that's a Catholic school or another type of private school, these diverse options can only survive if families have the freedom to choose.

[**Join us today in fighting for this vital American institution by signing our petition asking lawmakers to let parents choose Catholic schools.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63053398:sgMI_SiuN:m:1:2532013465:8651FF2405A117D0844EACDE0EC8A37C:r)

Thank you,
Rebekah Bydlak
American Federation for Children Growth Fund
---

---

| It’s the difference between our Democratic majority’s pandemic relief, infrastructure, CHIPS and Science, the first gun safety law in 30 years, veterans’ health care, and the biggest climate investment in American history (in Joe Biden’s first two years)...and the least productive Congress in decades since Republicans took narrow control in the midterm elections.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=6237%2E5257348%2Ed0I75a)
Derek,
We already knew that the 2024 U.S. Senate race in California was going to be one of the most important races in the country.
**Now, the stakes have increased tenfold.**
There are pivotal congressional races in California that could determine control of the House and our ability to get _anything_ done for the next two years.
It’s the difference between our Democratic majority’s **pandemic relief, infrastructure,_CHIPS and Science_ , the first gun safety law in 30 years, veterans’ health care, and the biggest climate investment in American _history_** (in Joe Biden’s first two years)...and the least productive Congress in _**decades**_ since Republicans took narrow control in the midterm elections.
That means we need to drive Democratic voter turnout across California.
When you contribute to Adam’s campaign, you're making a donation that will have an impact across _all_ elected offices in California.
This is how we are going to protect our democracy from the far-right and continue to advance the progress achieved under President Biden.
Your support will assist us in mobilizing voters statewide, especially in critical toss-up districts within our state.
**[If you want to be a part of our voter outreach efforts, will you pitch in $5.80 to help Adam reach voters in all of California’s 58 counties? Your donation will help Adam reach the Senate and protect vulnerable congressional seats in the November election.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2845?c0=apr2024_abs_em.uSbbp3&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20240414_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=6237%2E5257348%2Ed0I75a)**

name: Lexie, Team Baldwin
subject: We need to be prepared for anything after our Q1 fundraising report becomes public
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| These reports will help our opposition determine their strategy for the next 3 months.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2411%2E35263%2E5ahSz5)
Hi Peter, Lexie here from Team Baldwin. Remember our major FEC deadline we emailed you about at the end of March? Our first public fundraising reports of 2024 are officially due to the FEC tomorrow. After that, everyone from our opponent to his dark money allies will be able to see how much our campaign raised over the first three months of this election year. Here’s why that concerns me as Tammy’s Finance Director: **These reports will help our opposition determine their strategy for the next three months.** Eric Hovde could continue to self-fund millions of his own personal fortune to expand his cash advantage over our campaign. Outside groups and Republican super PACs could swoop in to spend more attacking Tammy if they think our campaign isn’t prepared to mount a response. The short of it is, we need to be ready for anything after these reports become public. I know Tammy’s least favorite part of the job is asking you for your hard-earned dollars, so I thought I’d reach out to you myself today since the stakes are so high. **[Before tomorrow’s mid-month fundraising deadline, will you chip in toward Tammy’s reelection campaign to help us fight back against our Republican opponent and keep Wisconsin’s Senate seat blue?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-apr24.2z_qm-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20240414_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2411%2E35263%2E5ahSz5)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=tbe-em-apr24.Xs9pUr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20240414_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2411%2E35263%2E5ahSz5)

With less than two months until the primary election, we’re firing on all cylinders to reach the voters we need to connect with and share why Michael would make a great Congressman. But doing so takes a lot of time, money, and resources. We may not have a warchest of millions, but we have a secret power that’s key to a winning campaign: our volunteers! We can’t win this race without a strong grassroots team talking to their friends, sending texts, and knocking on doors across the Lowcountry. **[That work begins right now. name: Team Eric
subject: Eric's mission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wilson for Wisconsin
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83009362/467005872/-112884332?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=2024_ws2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2JiY2E5MjEtNzhmYS1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1dR2ft4Rq-Tr1RBV-qxw11hwwanZCZiocctTKv0rfbk=)
---
Peter, Eric Wilson is a Democrat running for Congress to bring a fresh perspective for Wisconsin — and fight for our hardworking families and rural communities who've been left behind by Big Money in politics. subject: 84% drop-off in support
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BUCKEYE LIBERTY PAC PO BOX 368 Falls Church, VA 22040
body:
Some political pundits say that small dollar donors are getting less and less involved in politics. For us, the jury still seems to be out
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=40534ef75dc247548c662ad16e2db0d6&_e=QYtrkZKU0GUmqzV-XMG-rQ3MHV5964nxwhUUGRuXZpgDazCKQCXXpryMxlQdADT5YZnagWDD0AYZ2N5XnC86rZDykoj5l9YgNtTHmZgj87JLD0Ldi4lF4dtO6z12DuIwUOe7pKL4m_TMC9jRW9OrlcJmV6NmXURkhrqkzYBsZnQlnc093lcLEJRWgyLSX-xXWbVa7ae7KNcrfY1ONrk8phte63asmmxzvdgExXztRiFOXkyzLjtLa1-T-MjdkK2BtaRRCP0zGK_9R3tx4OpLW0hS0IpVm7CqIO6llqcZ2CIVG_NUdsOQ5v9se3vsUhNV51Z9j2H-E6-MRvuKaJd5LJkI0sBwOjBPEk9UDw9zi1SzBMf99QxTuCrnnjQ0v2RAjl_gP6KfD8ML5NlGJGbdzA%3D%3D)
| **$6**

More than 23,000 donations were made to my campaign in March with **an average gift of $6**. And let me tell you that while $6 goes a long way in helping us to reach the voters we need to continue winning elections - not as many people are donating to campaigns like mine as they once did.**In fact, our fundraising numbers are down 84% in the first 11 days of April compared to the first 11 days of March.**

This email is on the longer side, so if you don't want to read to the end, **[would you be able to make a contribution of $6](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=40534ef75dc247548c662ad16e2db0d6&_e=QYtrkZKU0GUmqzV-XMG-rQ3MHV5964nxwhUUGRuXZpgDazCKQCXXpryMxlQdADT5YZnagWDD0AYZ2N5XnC86rZDykoj5l9YgNtTHmZgj87JLD0Ldi4lF4dtO6z12DuIwUOe7pKL4m_TMC9jRW9OrlcJmV6NmXURkhrqkzYBsZnQlnc093lcLEJRWgyLSX-xXWbVa7ae7KNcrfY1ONrk8phte63asmmxzvdgExXztRiFOXkyzLjtLa1-T-MjdkK2BNj2uH-YYdwC5IEdZwqL8E7orpbKNh6PzX8LIK6_QWPUq2OhtxZOT5va7DLOIyXL6bKPw-tYfL_7kHhh5NI-cCfIR5wPhAebt-fnBsYqMsJFdh3Qt5cm6e9WxjodUlr3eSQ2oQPdB0aUo23jq1b-LXg%3D%3D)** , our average March donation, to help us kick-start our april fundraising?

[**CHIP IN $6
**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=40534ef75dc247548c662ad16e2db0d6&_e=QYtrkZKU0GUmqzV-XMG-rQ3MHV5964nxwhUUGRuXZpgDazCKQCXXpryMxlQdADT5YZnagWDD0AYZ2N5XnC86rZDykoj5l9YgNtTHmZgj87JLD0Ldi4lF4dtO6z12DuIwUOe7pKL4m_TMC9jRW9OrlcJmV6NmXURkhrqkzYBsZnQlnc093lcLEJRWgyLSX-xXWbVa7ae7KNcrfY1ONrk8phte63asmmxzvdgExXztRiFOXkyzLjtLa1-T-MjdkK2B8OzU6H22XSI13FOfG6rlMwu87XZpGOHjwAPKKJrXkENN6L8kyKWVsLki-Z3vlHXsbxWv-9UEx0XH4VpKjmL3R4MnhOqLwhdYb3YELZZrrNBaGPAoaI8hhx-B4JUn6vbiqG21AlnZOYYD3gp1FJbilw%3D%3D)
Some political pundits have written articles that spell doom for Republican candidates, opining that conservative candidates/causes have inundated you with too many texts and too much email to sift through in a day. While It’s true that nearly every congressional campaign in the 2024 cycle will attempt to utilize online fundraising to propel them into the House/Senate, not every email or text is created equal; and **not every email or text will deliver the entirety of your donation to the candidate you think you’re donating to.**

Bad actors and political grifters have figured out that online fundraising is a good way to make a quick buck off your generosity. **Not me. Not now, not ever.**

I know a couple of things to be true:
* We must do everything within our power to hold onto the U.S. House – the future of our country absolutely depends on it

* **Democrats are outraising Republicans 2-1 most months, sometimes it can even be as high as 3-1**

That’s why I’m reaching out today. The stakes are as high now as they were in each of the past two elections, **[yet in just one month we've seen an 84% drop in donations](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=40534ef75dc247548c662ad16e2db0d6&_e=QYtrkZKU0GUmqzV-XMG-rQ3MHV5964nxwhUUGRuXZpgDazCKQCXXpryMxlQdADT5YZnagWDD0AYZ2N5XnC86rZDykoj5l9YgNtTHmZgj87JLD0Ldi4lF4dtO6z12DuIwUOe7pKL4m_TMC9jRW9OrlcJmV6NmXURkhrqkzYBsZnQlnc093lcLEJRWgyLSX-xXWbVa7ae7KNcrfY1ONrk8phte63asmmxzvdgExXztRiFOXkyzLjtLa1-T-MjdkK2BzpfTjd0TDXxBftDdcS6u4uK8YFMhXnCKMz2b_2I518HAZKahwh1rMz_CmkkxBcrNe80cJHjUy-2uqZqve_R0GvlPDQotwcSkk7jBinDgJjavy1SdmrVCI1AFfZppRqjqHPM35UBwP3Z-SsZXCZoBiA%3D%3D)**. If you can, would you please help us close the donation gap by **[chipping in $6](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=40534ef75dc247548c662ad16e2db0d6&_e=QYtrkZKU0GUmqzV-XMG-rQ3MHV5964nxwhUUGRuXZpgDazCKQCXXpryMxlQdADT5YZnagWDD0AYZ2N5XnC86rZDykoj5l9YgNtTHmZgj87JLD0Ldi4lF4dtO6z12DuIwUOe7pKL4m_TMC9jRW9OrlcJmV6NmXURkhrqkzYBsZnQlnc093lcLEJRWgyLSX-xXWbVa7ae7KNcrfY1ONrk8phte63asmmxzvdgExXztRiFOXkyzLjtLa1-T-MjdkK2B02XKTjJLA1t90-7a90gF2bFh62XQ3FgXmyo-zKhZ9n6i0G2P9-OOy7nWYoERNxCrzQElx-ENknOXrnbzfgUVbqu4zGAJvEc7GY0c0zBnek26_xmpf2XT2oEeez2fmEx18D23ArZGNKkkmtK9agXQ7w%3D%3D)** or another amount today?

[**CHIP IN $6
**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=40534ef75dc247548c662ad16e2db0d6&_e=QYtrkZKU0GUmqzV-XMG-rQ3MHV5964nxwhUUGRuXZpgDazCKQCXXpryMxlQdADT5YZnagWDD0AYZ2N5XnC86rZDykoj5l9YgNtTHmZgj87JLD0Ldi4lF4dtO6z12DuIwUOe7pKL4m_TMC9jRW9OrlcJmV6NmXURkhrqkzYBsZnQlnc093lcLEJRWgyLSX-xXWbVa7ae7KNcrfY1ONrk8phte63asmmxzvdgExXztRiFOXkyzLjtLa1-T-MjdkK2Bjd9YZPyosqaE1JJv6ywng0YiN6ZjTM6-k6GRDpLtm80U6ZlEwBLQnKUk5v1w8L2PwtblFuhtPSPewTmWH7wi8-8MlUkQk6DiV7S6ByxQ_mxKZVRLu5lhmrg3qeOoetgbr07N10TNVFkw45woVlgswA%3D%3D)
When considering whether to donate to campaign contribution requests like this one, I urge you to look at the paid for language at the bottom of the email. _**Do you know who you’re giving money to? It may not be the person asking for it**_.

With so much competition for your hard-earned dollars, campaigns like mine have seen a dramatic shift in the donations we’re able to bring in every month, **putting a damper on our efforts to keep our one-seat House majority**. So, if you’re able to at this time, would you please consider my request for a donation today? **[Whether it’s $5, $15, or the March average of $6, every contribution counts](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=40534ef75dc247548c662ad16e2db0d6&_e=QYtrkZKU0GUmqzV-XMG-rQ3MHV5964nxwhUUGRuXZpgDazCKQCXXpryMxlQdADT5YZnagWDD0AYZ2N5XnC86rZDykoj5l9YgNtTHmZgj87JLD0Ldi4lF4dtO6z12DuIwUOe7pKL4m_TMC9jRW9OrlcJmV6NmXURkhrqkzYBsZnQlnc093lcLEJRWgyLSX-xXWbVa7ae7KNcrfY1ONrk8phte63asmmxzvdgExXztRiFOXkyzLjtLa1-T-MjdkK2BU45cINlZMxsqY0uSC4zPdNXFx5WfpNwfcGq0Mj2VUDfzIZE8khhCkFwVYXokTKQzpSMT0T5_BNrK0lk4SGDzg_ceqpBvfGF4QgbEWCxMVFUF20vzs9P3UOdkOqSAUixmVLw-t6u5uJym179iW1NYfA%3D%3D)** - every single contribution matters.

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

clean_body: Some political pundits say that small dollar donors are getting less and less involved in politics. For us, the jury still seems to be out | $6 More than 23,000 donations were made to my campaign in March with an average gift of $6. And let me tell you that while $6 goes a long way in helping us to reach the voters we need to continue winning elections - not as many people are donating to campaigns like mine as they once did.In fact, our fundraising numbers are down 84% in the first 11 days of April compared to the first 11 days of March. This email is on the longer side, so if you don't want to read to the end, , our average March donation, to help us kick-start our april fundraising? Some political pundits have written articles that spell doom for Republican candidates, opining that conservative candidates/causes have inundated you with too many texts and too much email to sift through in a day. While It’s true that nearly every congressional campaign in the 2024 cycle will attempt to utilize online fundraising to propel them into the House/Senate, not every email or text is created equal; and not every email or text will deliver the entirety of your donation to the candidate you think you’re donating to. Bad actors and political grifters have figured out that online fundraising is a good way to make a quick buck off your generosity. Not me. Not now, not ever. I know a couple of things to be true: We must do everything within our power to hold onto the U.S. House – the future of our country absolutely depends on it Democrats are outraising Republicans 2-1 most months, sometimes it can even be as high as 3-1 That’s why I’m reaching out today. The stakes are as high now as they were in each of the past two elections, . If you can, would you please help us close the donation gap by or another amount today? When considering whether to donate to campaign contribution requests like this one, I urge you to look at the paid for language at the bottom of the email. Do you know who you’re giving money to? It may not be the person asking for it. With so much competition for your hard-earned dollars, campaigns like mine have seen a dramatic shift in the donations we’re able to bring in every month, putting a damper on our efforts to keep our one-seat House majority. So, if you’re able to at this time, would you please consider my request for a donation today? - every single contribution matters. body:
I’ll make this short:

| Peter, I’ll make this short.

My mid-month fundraising deadline is in just over 24 hours and we’re still $1,142 short of where we’d like to be, so I'm asking _directly_ for your help.

**I need you to know that I don’t do ‘call-time’** – I’d rather focus on legislating and doing the work I was elected to do. That means this is a campaign fueled by (and for!) supporters like you, Peter.

Can you chip in before tomorrow and help get us over the finish line? Here is the best link: [**https://ritchietorres.org/aprilmidmonth**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83012332/467014270/-933762732?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20240414_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWQzOTM0Mi03Y2ZhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=clAI56nY55IE25CYsbKqkHuXHzNyYh2PuwsR8MgAvXQ=)

Thank you,

_Ritchie_

| | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Protect the Squad via JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: This Republican billionaire gave another $800k to the super PAC attacking Summer Lee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Progressive Rep. Summer Lee’s primary challenger is seriously trying to
claim that Summer isn’t a good enough Democrat because she doesn’t agree
with President Biden 100% of the time.

Meanwhile, this same so-called Democratic candidate has accepted help from
Donald Trump’s potential Treasury Secretary pick and the richest man in
Pennsylvania: anti-abortion and anti-education Republican billionaire Jeff
Yass.

Yass recently dumped another $800,000 into Moderate PAC, which has only
run ads attacking Summer so far this cycle. That’s more money than
Summer’s opponent has raised since launching her campaign!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-pts-email-sl.wJpHnY&refcode=em20240414-34304&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1001&akid=34304%2E1203867%2EF-dULx ]Sludge: A new FEC filing shows that GOP megadonor Jeff Yass donated
another $800,000 to a group called The Moderate PAC that is attacking
Democratic Rep. Summer Lee in her primary against Bhavini Patel. Yass has
now given $1.8 million to the PAC.

This super PAC is the biggest spender in the race for Pennsylvania’s 12th
Congressional District, and its main funder is the GOP’s largest 2024
donor. Make no mistake: Summer is the only real Democrat in this race and
one of the few progressive champions in Washington.

With only 9 more days until Pennsylvania’s primary election, Summer needs
our grassroots support to counteract the right-wing lies and attacks NOW.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-pts-email-sl.wJpHnY&refcode=em20240414-34304&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=34304%2E1203867%2EF-dULx ]Help Summer fight back and keep working for bold progressive change in
Congress: split a donation between Summer’s campaign and Justice Democrats
to protect this Squad member now!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-pts-email-sl.wJpHnY&refcode=em20240414-34304&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1021&akid=34304%2E1203867%2EF-dULx ]Contribute $5

Summer Lee’s primary challenger is seriously trying to claim that Summer isn’t a good enough Democrat because she doesn’t agree with President Biden 100% of the time. Meanwhile, this same so-called Democratic candidate has accepted help from Donald Trump’s potential Treasury Secretary pick and the richest man in Pennsylvania: anti-abortion and anti-education Republican billionaire Jeff Yass. Yass recently dumped another $800,000 into Moderate PAC, which has only run ads attacking Summer so far this cycle. That’s more money than Summer’s opponent has raised since launching her campaign! [ ]Sludge: A new FEC filing shows that GOP megadonor Jeff Yass donated another $800,000 to a group called The Moderate PAC that is attacking Democratic Rep. Summer Lee in her primary against Bhavini Patel. Yass has now given $1.8 million to the PAC. This super PAC is the biggest spender in the race for Pennsylvania’s 12th Congressional District, and its main funder is the GOP’s largest 2024 donor. Make no mistake: Summer is the only real Democrat in this race and one of the few progressive champions in Washington. With only 9 more days until Pennsylvania’s primary election, Summer needs our grassroots support to counteract the right-wing lies and attacks NOW. [ ]Help Summer fight back and keep working for bold progressive change in Congress: split a donation between Summer’s campaign and Justice Democrats to protect this Squad member now! [ ]Contribute $5 Protect the Squad via JusticeDemocrats.com Contribute to Justice Democrats:

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. body:
We can make a Trump-free future a reality. Here’s how: | |
---
Derek, Imagine that a $5 contribution is the answer to ensuring Donald Trump never returns to the Oval Office. Wouldn’t that be worth it? Imagine that a $5 donation means President Biden and Vice President Harris can continue fighting for access to affordable health care and prescription drug costs. Wouldn’t that be worth it? Imagine that a $5 contribution could protect our democracy from MAGA extremists’ attempts to strip Americans of our fundamental rights. Wouldn’t that be worth it? We understand that $5 might not seem like a lot. It’s the cost of a cup of coffee in a lot of places. But when this grassroots team comes together, every single $5 donation adds up. **Instead of just _imagining_ a world where Trump never steps foot in the Oval Office again, one where all Americans can access the affordable health care they deserve, and one where MAGA extremists can’t do further harm to our democracy, we can make it a reality.** [That’s why we’re asking: If you have $5 -- or any amount -- to spare, will you help make a more democratic future a reality by pitching in to the DNC right now? ](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvpOShxPWr9mFhJMw1S-wTtsWJ4oHmyX6l1dZXrMu59XkqaLmdnimuDefwh5_O-3pS347T3Jb9hbVhquYOW9RECi8UceRQCfgrnpOHuWSgu-2AbVVeo4hu0sg9e8VUhzZPlm6x9s0kY0h8RNtaLcXRfuZxeq_fqK1sR7GWujNZNIx-qtfcpFBhGQ3r_ITuJFjM6SQzPM6QzUKePHBfuUjiL2bJtT2QJqNg18f_3jOXKVuZGcBexoxiU54oJSKWwOTT_vbeFKIpg4boTvM-q2IZAPlrsl0TesOnhkXTNMsdSCqHnjvY858Bz88kvBsJ2BGnSC5HuidsaDVx1tL_KEm7jx2P1CMZ7YGRUxv5CjcCFBQfqmzdl0jHE3u3RAxakKVRPpM7klIUKiCWCpnMmtSRyXO_WBv34pK0lQeEgNipoTkHMytf70M4Q0N4MAPg3pzgnvc_ah8H86guiCCmln966BT8fqNvh7EUzzODNdQrgBndVpmveWj3vP1MbqLEuFEcyGB4xKhW6HXbN6cGoVOpC2tHPx5ujShXU_U8BqcVZC16I_Mslufr_UUnScWBmmYlGhQX7wriAXLTiE1re3Yhh/45i/ijImSPJdTQ2_ibMATUZysA/h0/h001.weKTUnf70HH9D-wAuHtw698k49w7AamFMlFlw5fQ3mw)

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: The first real threat to Jim Jordan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Team,
As the official Democratic nominee running against Jim Jordan one thing has become abundantly clear: Jim and his radical-right donors are TERRIFIED of the momentum we’re building.
I’m a tenacious fighter with a reputation for speaking my mind - and I won’t shy away from a bruising fight with Jim Jordan—and that’s got his entire team shaking in their boots.
Right now, a lot of my focus is on talking with voters, attending events, and getting my message out to the people. That means I’m relying heavily on grassroots donors like you to help me grow my team, hit our fundraising goals, and flip this seat blue!
We’ve got a huge deadline coming up in just a few days, and, frankly, it’s all hands on deck to hit our goals.
Before I head back out into the field, I have to ask: Will you rush a donation of $25, $50, or whatever you can spare -- split with Serve America -- to help me stand up to Jim Jordan and WIN? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-wilson]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-wilson]
This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to take the fight to Jim Jordan and get this seat into Democratic hands.
But in order to get the job done, we have to take these fundraising goals seriously.
Your support means the world to me, and it will help us continue to grow this grassroots campaign that will take down Jim Jordan! What could be better than that?
Click here to rush a contribution! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-wilson]
I’m so grateful for your support,
Tamie
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-wilson [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-wilson]
Tamie Wilson
Candidate for Congress (OH-4)

Together, we’ve built an open and connected government that works alongside the community to ensure that our neighbors are the ones driving the conversation.

From securing historic investment in our schools, roads, and parks to tackling issues like gun safety, police reform, and affordable housing, we’ve accomplished so much here in Baltimore County over the past five years— _but I know that there is still so much more that we can and must do._

Now, I’m ready to take on this next chapter and bring a new generation of leadership to Congress because we need leaders who understand how to make our government work more effectively so we can improve people’s everyday lives.

name: Taylor, Bob Casey for Senate
subject: re: Today’s meeting
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2684%2E552475%2Eyxpp7k)
Peter, I just got out of a budget planning meeting, and I wanted to reach out straight away.
I sat down with Tiernan, our Campaign Manager, and mapped out a rough budget of all our costs from now until Election Day. **But then I looked at our current fundraising progress — _and it doesn’t get us there._**
If we’re going to change that, we need to see not just a one-day surge — we need greater and greater grassroots support from here on out. So here’s why I am writing you this urgent message:
[**In order to make up our gap, we need you to make your first donation to support Bob Casey’s re-election campaign. If you’ve been on the fence, the time is now to pitch in any amount and help us stay in the fight to keep PA blue.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240414-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240414-1&refcode2=2684_552475_yxpp7k&akid=2684%2E552475%2Eyxpp7k)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240414-1?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240414-1-el&refcode2=2684_552475_yxpp7k&akid=2684%2E552475%2Eyxpp7k) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240414-1?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240414-1-el&refcode2=2684_552475_yxpp7k&akid=2684%2E552475%2Eyxpp7k) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240414-1?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240414-1-el&refcode2=2684_552475_yxpp7k&akid=2684%2E552475%2Eyxpp7k) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240414-1?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240414-1-el&refcode2=2684_552475_yxpp7k&akid=2684%2E552475%2Eyxpp7k) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240414-1?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240414-1-el&refcode2=2684_552475_yxpp7k&akid=2684%2E552475%2Eyxpp7k) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240414-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240414-1&refcode2=2684_552475_yxpp7k&akid=2684%2E552475%2Eyxpp7k)

name: Mark Takano
subject: 📎 photo attached
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
I want to show you these hateful mailers Ken Calvert sent out about me

| Peter, when I first ran for Congress in 1994, I was **publicly outed as gay by my Republican opponent, Ken Calvert.**

**Today, I wanted to show you the exact mailers that were used:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83013789/467017400/649527246?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20240414_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzRkZjk5ZC03ZWZhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lw0dGzDO_n3crxXolLA6H_GiPIPS-H3gs9oeFDC5fw8=) Peter, in a series of bright pink mailers, Ken Calvert - _a currently sitting US Congressman_ - **revealed my sexuality to thousands of Riverside residents without my consent.**

For members of the LGBTQ+ community, coming out is an extremely personal and sensitive moment. So, you can imagine my horror and heartbreak upon finding out I had been outed so publicly in such a hateful way. I was crushed.

**I ended up losing that extremely competitive race and it wasn 't until 18 years later that I finally won my race for Congress in 2012. **

Today, I am proud to be able to fight for LGBTQ+ rights and dignity in Congress. But sadly this type of homophobia is still rampant in the Republican House Majority:
* _Ken Calvert - the man who sent these mailers - is still in Congress!_
* _House Speaker Mike Johnson is a far-right Christian Nationalist who wants to criminalize homosexuality!_
* _The House MAGA Majority spent weeks last year attacking trans folks!_

[**Peter, in 1994 when I was attacked for my identity, I lost my race because I didn 't have good people like you by my side. But now I do -- and together we can fight for LGBTQ+ rights. That's why I'm hoping that I can count on you to chip in $7 to help me remove hateful Republicans from power by taking back the House Majority. clean_body: I want to show you these hateful mailers Ken Calvert sent out about me | Peter, when I first ran for Congress in 1994, I was publicly outed as gay by my Republican opponent, Ken Calvert. Today, I wanted to show you the exact mailers that were used: = Peter, in a series of bright pink mailers, Ken Calvert - a currently sitting US Congressman - revealed my sexuality to thousands of Riverside residents without my consent. For members of the LGBTQ+ community, coming out is an extremely personal and sensitive moment. So, you can imagine my horror and heartbreak upon finding out I had been outed so publicly in such a hateful way. I was crushed. I ended up losing that extremely competitive race and it wasn 't until 18 years later that I finally won my race for Congress in 2012. Today, I am proud to be able to fight for LGBTQ+ rights and dignity in Congress. But sadly this type of homophobia is still rampant in the Republican House Majority: Ken Calvert - the man who sent these mailers - is still in Congress! House Speaker Mike Johnson is a far-right Christian Nationalist who wants to criminalize homosexuality! The House MAGA Majority spent weeks last year attacking trans folks! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you so much -- I'm so glad to have your support. name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Our fundraising has slowed significantly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
If we don’t close the gap, we could lose out on key opportunities to protect our Democratic base from AIPAC and any other GOP-aligned competitors.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240414-3749-footer&t=1&akid=3749%2E420207%2EMTDCu5)
Peter, it’s the weekend, so we’ll keep this short.
**Tomorrow marks the official halfway point of April and our fundraising has slowed significantly since the start of the quarter.**
We can’t afford to lose our momentum now, not when billionaire donors have put Pramila on their target list for 2024.
Pramila always leads with integrity, compassion, and care for all communities — which is more than we can say for the entrenched Republicans backed by Super PACs and powerful special interests.
But if we don’t close the gap on our 300 contribution goal and fortify our campaign’s resources — we could lose out on key opportunities to protect our Democrats from GOP megadonors.
**The good news is that we still have time, Peter.**[**With just 133 contributions left to reach our goal, your donation — of any amount — could be the one we need to push us over the finish line before midnight tomorrow. Can we count on you?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240414.Lqx2JU&refcode=em20240414-3749&t=2&akid=3749%2E420207%2EMTDCu5)

Let's do this,
Jayapal HQ

clean_body: = Team, I’ve got some big news: We just launched our first TV ad of the cycle, and we need your help to keep it running across the Commonwealth. = Here’s the deal, team: Right-wing super PACs are already dumping millions of dollars into this race to flip PA red, and my opponent just launched a seven-figure ad buy of his own. With the Senate majority hinging on PA, getting our ads on the air is critical to fighting back and sharing my message with Pennsylvanians – but ads are expensive, so we need to step up our fundraising to keep them running. Without your grassroots support, we could miss the chance to reach crucial swing voters, and in a battleground race like this one, that could be the difference between winning and losing. The vast majority of contributions to this campaign come from emails like this one, so I’m counting on you today. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = Thank you in advance. name: Mucarsel-Powell, Debbie
subject: brutal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
abortion access is effectively over in Florida
| | |
---
Friend,

**The Florida Supreme Court issued a decision last week to uphold our state's 15-week abortion ban. That means Ron DeSantis' brutal six-week ban with almost no exceptions for rape or incest will automatically take effect on May 1.**
Despite the lies and noise from far-right extremists, the result of this ruling is crystal clear:___Our reproductive rights have been effectively destroyed in Florida._
This fight is only just beginning, friend. Despite this devastating ruling, the Florida Supreme Court also just ruled to uphold the abortion ballot initiative that would codify reproductive rights in our state constitution, which would end these extreme bans. And I'm running for Senate to defeat Rick Scott and vote to restore reproductive rights nationwide.
**With Florida at the front of the fight for abortion rights, we need to stand strong. [Will you add your name before midnight tonight to stand AGAINST extremist abortion bans? I'm counting on 50,000 people to sign on today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83016795/467023783/-1034315402?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1088-su-nd&refcode=jtk1088-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjZkMTA0OGMtODJmYS1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kqkwSMpdfWXghi9zEdfKp9F71i85rFc2CuxkIXSBxCA=&emci=a5516c92-dbf8-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=66d1048c-82fa-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=3969733)**
| | [SIGN ON NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83016796/467023784/-1034315402?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1088-su-nd&refcode=jtk1088-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjZkMTA0OGMtODJmYS1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kqkwSMpdfWXghi9zEdfKp9F71i85rFc2CuxkIXSBxCA=&emci=a5516c92-dbf8-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=66d1048c-82fa-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=3969733)
---
My heart breaks for the millions of families in Florida and across the country who have had their rights and access to medical care stripped away from them. As a mother of two young daughters, I’m scared too. But I refuse to let this loss stop my fight for reproductive freedoms — and you can't either.
I'm angry, friend. And I'm going to use that anger to fuel me every single day until we defeat Rick Scott on Election Day.
Rick Scott said that, if he were still governor, he would sign this same exact six-week ban — even with no exceptions. **And right now, he's fighting to take his far-right agenda nationwide by banning abortions in all 50 states. He even co-sponsored the national abortion ban.****If we fail to defeat him this November, next year, he could have the votes in the Senate to do it.** This is a fight that we cannot afford to lose.
**_Ya no más._ Enough is enough. All across Florida, voters are standing up to Rick Scott's extremist agenda. [Please, will you join us by signing my reproductive rights petition before midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83016797/467023786/-1034315402?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1088-su-nd&refcode=jtk1088-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjZkMTA0OGMtODJmYS1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kqkwSMpdfWXghi9zEdfKp9F71i85rFc2CuxkIXSBxCA=&emci=a5516c92-dbf8-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=66d1048c-82fa-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=3969733)**
| | [SIGN ON NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83016799/467023787/-1034315402?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1088-su-nd&refcode=jtk1088-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjZkMTA0OGMtODJmYS1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kqkwSMpdfWXghi9zEdfKp9F71i85rFc2CuxkIXSBxCA=&emci=a5516c92-dbf8-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=66d1048c-82fa-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=3969733)
---
Thank you for standing with me in this fight.

With hope and gratitude,

Debbie

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. About the most important race in the country
clean_body: About the most important race in the country Fellow American, Pennsylvania could be home to the MOST IMPORTANT Senate race in the entire country this year, and Mark Levin is taking notice. Conservatives like Levin know that if we want ANY SHOT at defeating the Washington Swamp, we MUST support outsider candidate Dave McCormick against career politician Bob Casey. Control of the United States Senate for DECADES to come could LITERALLY come down to who wins this race. 99% of people will ignore this email - will you be the 1% that steps up and supports Dave McCormick? PATRIOT: CONTRIBUTION STATUS: PENDING DEADLINE: 11:59 PM ****************************************************************************************************** Thank you, NRSC HQ ****************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. Peter,

**We’re thrilled to announce our endorsement of Shomari Figures in Alabama’s 2nd newly reshaped congressional district!**

Figures is an Obama administration alum who previously worked for the Justice Department, and the son of two Alabama state senators. Just like his parents, he has dedicated his career to public service, helping to implement legislation like the Affordable Care Act and addressing issues that support students and teachers, expanded access to quality healthcare, increased job and workforce opportunities, and building stronger, safer communities.

A Democratic victory for AL-02 would mean the election of a _**SECOND**_ Black Alabama member of Congress — a monumental achievement for representation and progress. If elected, Figures would be serving a district that covers the state capital of Montgomery, Mobile, and parts of the Black Belt.

Listen, Peter, after battling Alabama Republicans at the Supreme Court to secure a second majority-Black congressional district, we cannot let this hard-fought victory go to waste. **We need a candidate who will bring real representation to the state and flip this district from red to blue.**

This is our chance to make sure Black voters in Alabama have their voices represented in Congress and finally have the political power they rightfully deserve. **[Pitch in $10 right now between The Collective PAC and Shomari Figures to help us flip AL-02 and bring real representation to Washington>>>](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvfdh0fv4-ZWp0d2-eweRJuWHIJaUDCMm4X8jFuv2Q2tPptvYn7M5EI_6uZN9GB-VxriWECQ6WEIRua57j6uW5T17xaNQLvTzID9aHnr7TvBkUKjPAo5Wkm-hPWtxbXD0CQO8andYIo--LpoWlehOeaV9xlV1tO1gdVCmQTwibYxYHFRq6TWjvTAsdY569KvmJgcmcylj5IMS08sAMA2vkn22UsruM5cQoY4oVShPTSFYjF5-x7kN03QkJ36Q1MeQo3APtqDw81YB2xSw4N3qnlSu78c0tBrOqbTG7iGqCZ8vUFNziFyCGYI9Rl5huCgg6lw7Zps03lGnaPHw8sup4vpCrqp_4RcCXF815kR4cjfSHgo8s9WkjMwEDxRhbLgB-ehnpsitS-RohvcSCGWNVvU7Uv9uJJynhNj1ut8uw7HOW3e0pvuhbxcCKEr-gbkzE8A2cK10UMHzeAb0c_t7t7zX-6BFLf4M3jO4j8lGqMyw/45i/6vKiLF_yQfetmKtsos2Irg/h10/h001.-IxBGmIAokzOv03mWUlGDMBt5NnoIDiwzNJqu3-Dx18)**

Imagine a MAGA-extremist at the helm of these institutions... _Imagine what might happen if another January 6th takes place at a time when Trump loyalists hold these vital positions_. name: Lauren Underwood
subject: This week is so important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83018418/467025844/-822722586?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240414_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGE5YjQ5YS04NWZhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4F7Itd8Faz-1RzJCLsRPdEoPTXHIls_E4xi80I-5iOU=)
---
_Hey there, folks, it's Black Maternal Health Week and I wanted to pass along this message from my friend and colleague, Lauren Underwood. — Nikki_
* * *
Hey there, As we observe Black Maternal Health Week, I want to take a moment to talk about this critical issue and why this week is so important to me. Despite global reductions in maternal mortality rates, preventable deaths related to pregnancy have been rising in the United States over the past two decades. This rise is driven by far higher mortality rates among Black mothers — who are three to four times more likely to die of pregnancy-related causes. The impact isn't limited to mothers we’ve lost. Communities of color face a disproportionate burden, with 70 women experiencing "near misses" or lasting health issues for every mother tragically lost. _This is heartbreaking and unacceptable. There's no excuse, we can and must do better._ **That’s why I’m working to pass my Black Maternal Health Momnibus Act — thirteen pieces of legislation that provide the comprehensive resources we need to study and address disparities in access to prenatal care, supportive services, education, and more.** [**Will you join me and Nikki Budzinski and split a donation to support our work to end our nation’s maternal health crisis? Your partnership means the world to us, and we are grateful to have you by our side.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83018419/467025845/-67972691?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240414_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGE5YjQ5YS04NWZhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4F7Itd8Faz-1RzJCLsRPdEoPTXHIls_E4xi80I-5iOU=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83018420/467025846/-67972691?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240414_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGE5YjQ5YS04NWZhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4F7Itd8Faz-1RzJCLsRPdEoPTXHIls_E4xi80I-5iOU=)

Thanks to the hard work of many of my House colleagues on both sides of the aisle, the _Protecting Moms Who Served Act_ was signed into law. This is a major victory for moms everywhere. But our work doesn't stop there. We're looking ahead to pass the next bill, the _Maternal Health for Veterans Act_.
As co-founder of the Black Maternal Health Caucus, I'm thrilled to share that we secured significant investments in this year’s federal funding bill to support mothers and address the national crisis. These funds will have a real impact, saving lives and making childbirth safer for countless families.
We're making great strides, but our work isn't finished! Moms across America need the Momnibus now. They can't wait any longer.
[**Momentum is on our side, and now, it’s time to keep pushing forward. So in honor of Black Maternal Health Week, will you join me and****Nikki Budzinski****and split a donation before it ends on April 17? clean_body: | = Hey there, folks, it's Black Maternal Health Week and I wanted to pass along this message from my friend and colleague, Lauren Underwood. — Nikki Hey there, As we observe Black Maternal Health Week, I want to take a moment to talk about this critical issue and why this week is so important to me. Despite global reductions in maternal mortality rates, preventable deaths related to pregnancy have been rising in the United States over the past two decades. This rise is driven by far higher mortality rates among Black mothers — who are three to four times more likely to die of pregnancy-related causes. The impact isn't limited to mothers we’ve lost. Communities of color face a disproportionate burden, with 70 women experiencing "near misses" or lasting health issues for every mother tragically lost. This is heartbreaking and unacceptable. There's no excuse, we can and must do better. That’s why I’m working to pass my Black Maternal Health Momnibus Act — thirteen pieces of legislation that provide the comprehensive resources we need to study and address disparities in access to prenatal care, supportive services, education, and more. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks to the hard work of many of my House colleagues on both sides of the aisle, the Protecting Moms Who Served Act was signed into law. This is a major victory for moms everywhere. But our work doesn't stop there. We're looking ahead to pass the next bill, the Maternal Health for Veterans Act. As co-founder of the Black Maternal Health Caucus, I'm thrilled to share that we secured significant investments in this year’s federal funding bill to support mothers and address the national crisis. These funds will have a real impact, saving lives and making childbirth safer for countless families. We're making great strides, but our work isn't finished! Moms across America need the Momnibus now. They can't wait any longer. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = As a registered nurse, this issue is deeply personal to me. I’ll never stop working to address this crisis with the urgency it deserves. Thanks for supporting us on this. Lauren | = Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

The Epoch Times will soon offer BAs in BS.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83018728/467026639/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzllMjYyOTktODZmYS1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JC0ph58dyWly6gRJLRFi84gHGbtHswtov0UYlu1dMOI=&emci=30e26299-86fa-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=39e26299-86fa-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=14016711)
Hey Peter, remember _The Epoch Times_?
They’re the right-wing fake news outlet that’s been putting the billboards all over the country that say “#1 trusted news” with a bizarre stock photo of this guy:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83018729/467026640/-593472309?refcode=20240414-EM-EpochTimesSchool&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzllMjYyOTktODZmYS1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JC0ph58dyWly6gRJLRFi84gHGbtHswtov0UYlu1dMOI=)
Far from a trusted news source, _The Epoch Times_ has long promoted COVID-19 misinformation, the Big Lie, and other baseless right-wing conspiracies. **The paper also spent more money on social media advertising for Donald Trump than any other organization outside of the Trump campaign in 2020.**
**Well, Peter, The Epoch Times is starting its very own journalism school. Seriously.** 😳
**[COURIER fights back against right-wing propaganda like The Epoch Times in real time by publishing local journalism in communities without access to news they can trust. Can you chip in $15 now to help us stand up to _The Epoch Times_ and other right-wing bad actors?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83018730/467026641/-593472309?refcode=20240414-EM-EpochTimesSchool&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzllMjYyOTktODZmYS1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JC0ph58dyWly6gRJLRFi84gHGbtHswtov0UYlu1dMOI=)**
Earlier this week, _The Epoch Times_ sent an email out to its subscribers announcing its goal to support a new journalism school in the same city as its HQ. **The outlet said the school would champion _The Epoch Times_ ’ values of “truth and traditional.”**
The truth according to _The Epoch Time_ s: alternative facts and conspiracy theories about the 2020 election and COVID-19. And traditional? That’s a dog whistle for the Christian right-wing fundamentalism that’s behind so many disturbing political conspiracies.
**In short:_The Epoch Times_ wants to swear in the next generation of far-right propagandists by giving them a BA in BS. They’ve even promised internships and jobs to promising graduates at the outlet and its sister network, NTD, an equally right-wing and conspiratorial television news station.**
Peter, it’s clear that the far-right conspiracy machines aren’t slowing down. In fact, they’re escalating their tactics and strategizing years ahead.
**At COURIER, we have a strategy to stop them.** Here’s our research-backed approach:
* Our reporters in our ten battleground states write award-winning local news on the issues that matter most.
* We place our good information in the places where people already get their news – social media news feeds and email inboxes – to meet bad information at the source.
* We offer all our news for free. No paywalls, no subscriptions.

**[But we need your help. To continue our work and combat the continued onslaught of misinformation at the source, we rely on the generosity of supporters like you. So, Peter, if you can, can you chip in $10 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83018731/467026642/-593472309?refcode=20240414-EM-EpochTimesSchool&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzllMjYyOTktODZmYS1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JC0ph58dyWly6gRJLRFi84gHGbtHswtov0UYlu1dMOI=)**

name: Jane Fonda
subject: It’s not all doom and gloom.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
I am not giving up. And neither should you!

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83019578/467028114/1328794144?refcode=ea.b25cec46-88fa-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ms=ea.b25cec46-88fa-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIyNWNlYzQ2LTg4ZmEtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=M6xwPmTdnPssbj-BiDeFepFA27TphSfQazvsh_GZOaA=&emci=b05cec46-88fa-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=b25cec46-88fa-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=4823105)
---
| _**“For the 10th consecutive month, Earth in March set a new monthly record for global heat — with both air temperatures and the world's oceans hitting an all-time high for the month...”**_ **_\- NPR, April 9, 2024_**
---
It’s easy to feel hopeless with news stories like this.
Scientists now say that every month since June has been another month of record-breaking heat. It makes you feel like you’re shouting into the void, doesn't it? Like everything's on fire and our elected officials are too slow to put it out, while the fossil fuel bigwigs tighten their grip on our government.
But what if I told you that it’s not all doom and gloom?
If you look at the bigger picture, we’ve made significant progress in the climate fight — from an unparalleled shift towards renewable energy to a surge in electric vehicle adoption, to new standards curbing auto pollution and chemicals in drinking water, and global powers uniting for progress.
At the Jane Fonda Climate PAC, we've mobilized thousands to call for action, brought climate issues to the forefront of public consciousness, and elected dozens of candidates who are bold enough to challenge the status quo.
Our goal here is for you to feel a sense of hope for our future. Our team, and the rest of the climate movement, is working every day out of hope for a livable future, and you’ve been a huge part of it.
We can build a future together where the air is breathable, the water is drinkable, and where our children and grandchildren get to grow up on a thriving planet. But getting there is going to take time — and a hell of a lot of action. And everyone has a role to play: you, me, and most importantly, our elected leaders across the country.
**[If you want to make a meaningful difference today, please consider donating just $5 or $10 to keep us on track. Every contribution empowers us to champion the leaders bold enough to take on the fossil fuel industry and fight for our planet's future.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83019579/467028115/2105508926?amount=5&refcode=ea.b25cec46-88fa-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ms=ea.b25cec46-88fa-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIyNWNlYzQ2LTg4ZmEtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=M6xwPmTdnPssbj-BiDeFepFA27TphSfQazvsh_GZOaA=)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: I am not giving up. And neither should you! | | “For the 10th consecutive month, Earth in March set a new monthly record for global heat — with both air temperatures and the world's oceans hitting an all-time high for the month...” \- NPR, April 9, 2024 It’s easy to feel hopeless with news stories like this. Scientists now say that every month since June has been another month of record-breaking heat. It makes you feel like you’re shouting into the void, doesn't it? Like everything's on fire and our elected officials are too slow to put it out, while the fossil fuel bigwigs tighten their grip on our government. But what if I told you that it’s not all doom and gloom? If you look at the bigger picture, we’ve made significant progress in the climate fight — from an unparalleled shift towards renewable energy to a surge in electric vehicle adoption, to new standards curbing auto pollution and chemicals in drinking water, and global powers uniting for progress. At the Jane Fonda Climate PAC, we've mobilized thousands to call for action, brought climate issues to the forefront of public consciousness, and elected dozens of candidates who are bold enough to challenge the status quo. Our goal here is for you to feel a sense of hope for our future. Our team, and the rest of the climate movement, is working every day out of hope for a livable future, and you’ve been a huge part of it. We can build a future together where the air is breathable, the water is drinkable, and where our children and grandchildren get to grow up on a thriving planet. But getting there is going to take time — and a hell of a lot of action. And everyone has a role to play: you, me, and most importantly, our elected leaders across the country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for your support — today and every day. Warmly, Jane Fonda = | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

clean_body: No one wants that... | | | Peter, We have an important question to ask: Do you want four more years of Donald Trump in the White House? No, we don't think you do. Do you want four more years of the chaos, confusion, and division his election would bring to our daily lives? Do you want to deal with Trump’s promised attacks on Obamacare, Social Security, and Medicare? C’mon, man! Our fundraising goals are NOT arbitrary, they are the numbers we need to hit in order to stay on pace to DEFEAT TRUMP. But there's no hitting those marks without lots and lots and lots of donations from people like you stepping up before it's too late. So please: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | It means a lot to President Biden to know he has such a strong team behind him. Team Biden-Harris

subject: Washington is worse than the NBA.
