body:
To say the least, I DID NOT fit in, and I didn't care. I wanted change, and I got it.
To say the least, I DID NOT fit in, and I didn't care. I wanted change, and I got it.
| [View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kD1PwzAQhn_NZWt0PjuxO3gAqiBRiYGJjsF2qSObpHbSNPx61FBY7-N5H71tHII_LhrkIxCdvM1ABPwBiM6HOaapi_vnDV1els25fo3VbUtPQDQug_s_vVNKF1sfblO5K6zmR4uicJpJxhmTUqnipFHV0lRIZDlzBo_O1uiY2VolTFVvTeE1IQkUTDCFJGRpnbVGVZao5ZWTCALXnLKNLnnTsjzObUp9H0vTxyLo0zgOeRVrgJo59eXXZIKb8u-b6SNQc1cGai5AzTnX3fXQvXcKeLO2wHe4X76n60d4K5K2w-xD8LmWIPDzD_MTAAD__9ADYWE)
| [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jkGPnDAMRn-NuYGIk0nSA4e2Iyq1Uu89VZ7E7KTChA2haP59BVr1-vzk75Gsc5peA7gvgPhMcQNE0J8B8f3XIWX_Iz--tfj3-6t9tz_ldl7xKyDW18r_1Y8vHQul-aTu3sRBT7E3DQ_KKa2Uc943z8Fy8A87TaSJrIrOs6eH8fqTs2SJVZMG7NH0RhnlezSuixxj8LeISPrGrgfTXzsdCZcUSG31oFJyli5kaebhWeu6XWEj4Lhx2At3tHDM9TQAx5JfgdvjmSq3Uy7txgtVBhzTUktu5dFeGuhxr_JbOKZdQN9PaE8SSFZKbwvouzw-WOVyOkdRgJYk70sFfcdbU4a4Hmme02YdmP7tag9Z_gUAAP__t-528A)

[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jkGPnDAMRn-NuYGIk0nSA4e2Iyq1Uu89VZ7E7KTChA2haP59BVr1-vzk75Gsc5peA7gvgPhMcQNE0J8B8f3XIWX_Iz--tfj3-6t9tz_ldl7xKyDW18r_1Y8vHQul-aTu3sRBT7E3DQ_KKa2Uc943z8Fy8A87TaSJrIrOs6eH8fqTs2SJVZMG7NH0RhnlezSuixxj8LeISPrGrgfTXzsdCZcUSG31oFJyli5kaebhWeu6XWEj4Lhx2At3tHDM9TQAx5JfgdvjmSq3Uy7txgtVBhzTUktu5dFeGuhxr_JbOKZdQN9PaE8SSFZKbwvouzw-WOVyOkdRgJYk70sFfcdbU4a4Hmme02YdmP7tag9Z_gUAAP__t-528A) Patriot,

My name is Royce White. After being drafted the NBA, I disrupted the league by demanding policy changes instead of posturing.

While NBA executives were selling out to the Left and the Black Lives Matter cabal, I was bringing awareness about Gain of Function research, the control of the Federal Reserve, and opposing the feminist "Me Too" movement that ruins men.

To say the least, I DID NOT fit in, and I didn't care. I wanted change, and I got it.

**Today, I’m a Republican running for United States Senate against leftist Amy Klobuchar.**

I won't fit into Washington, either. I won't be liked or welcomed; again, I do not care.

I want change, and our nation needs change. **[Please support my campaign so I can get to Washington.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jkGPnDAMRn-NuYGIk0nSA4e2Iyq1Uu89VZ7E7KTChA2haP59BVr1-vzk75Gsc5peA7gvgPhMcQNE0J8B8f3XIWX_Iz--tfj3-6t9tz_ldl7xKyDW18r_1Y8vHQul-aTu3sRBT7E3DQ_KKa2Uc943z8Fy8A87TaSJrIrOs6eH8fqTs2SJVZMG7NH0RhnlezSuixxj8LeISPrGrgfTXzsdCZcUSG31oFJyli5kaebhWeu6XWEj4Lhx2At3tHDM9TQAx5JfgdvjmSq3Uy7txgtVBhzTUktu5dFeGuhxr_JbOKZdQN9PaE8SSFZKbwvouzw-WOVyOkdRgJYk70sFfcdbU4a4Hmme02YdmP7tag9Z_gUAAP__t-528A)**

Democrats in Washington will despise me, and I'll tell you why: **I'm a black man, and I'm a conservative.**

I'm pro-life, pro-liberty, and pro-Constitution. I back law enforcement over criminals and believe that if you want to get ahead in this world, you do what I did and work your tail off for it.

I do not accept the Democrat Plantation that the left has used to control the black population with handouts and welfare. It’s designed to keep us down and obedient to government.

Not me. I kneel to my savior and serve my family, community, and nation. And our nation IS NOT our government. The government serves us, and as Senator, I will serve you.

**[I need your help to get there.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jkGPnDAMRn-NuYGIk0nSA4e2Iyq1Uu89VZ7E7KTChA2haP59BVr1-vzk75Gsc5peA7gvgPhMcQNE0J8B8f3XIWX_Iz--tfj3-6t9tz_ldl7xKyDW18r_1Y8vHQul-aTu3sRBT7E3DQ_KKa2Uc943z8Fy8A87TaSJrIrOs6eH8fqTs2SJVZMG7NH0RhnlezSuixxj8LeISPrGrgfTXzsdCZcUSG31oFJyli5kaebhWeu6XWEj4Lhx2At3tHDM9TQAx5JfgdvjmSq3Uy7txgtVBhzTUktu5dFeGuhxr_JbOKZdQN9PaE8SSFZKbwvouzw-WOVyOkdRgJYk70sFfcdbU4a4Hmme02YdmP7tag9Z_gUAAP__t-528A)**

I’m not part of the Washington Establishment. I’m not even a politician. Simply put, I’m a proven leader. Washington needs more of us, not another politician.

But here’s the cold, hard reality of politics and campaigns: because I’m not part of the establishment, no PAC dollars or big establishment donors will help me out. They'll be fighting me . . . **[and that’s where you come in](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jkGPnDAMRn-NuYGIk0nSA4e2Iyq1Uu89VZ7E7KTChA2haP59BVr1-vzk75Gsc5peA7gvgPhMcQNE0J8B8f3XIWX_Iz--tfj3-6t9tz_ldl7xKyDW18r_1Y8vHQul-aTu3sRBT7E3DQ_KKa2Uc943z8Fy8A87TaSJrIrOs6eH8fqTs2SJVZMG7NH0RhnlezSuixxj8LeISPrGrgfTXzsdCZcUSG31oFJyli5kaebhWeu6XWEj4Lhx2At3tHDM9TQAx5JfgdvjmSq3Uy7txgtVBhzTUktu5dFeGuhxr_JbOKZdQN9PaE8SSFZKbwvouzw-WOVyOkdRgJYk70sFfcdbU4a4Hmme02YdmP7tag9Z_gUAAP__t-528A).**

If you're able . . . and ONLY if you're able . . . [**please donate to my campaign today and help me jump-start my drive to Washington.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jkGPnDAMRn-NuYGIk0nSA4e2Iyq1Uu89VZ7E7KTChA2haP59BVr1-vzk75Gsc5peA7gvgPhMcQNE0J8B8f3XIWX_Iz--tfj3-6t9tz_ldl7xKyDW18r_1Y8vHQul-aTu3sRBT7E3DQ_KKa2Uc943z8Fy8A87TaSJrIrOs6eH8fqTs2SJVZMG7NH0RhnlezSuixxj8LeISPrGrgfTXzsdCZcUSG31oFJyli5kaebhWeu6XWEj4Lhx2At3tHDM9TQAx5JfgdvjmSq3Uy7txgtVBhzTUktu5dFeGuhxr_JbOKZdQN9PaE8SSFZKbwvouzw-WOVyOkdRgJYk70sFfcdbU4a4Hmme02YdmP7tag9Z_gUAAP__t-528A)

With respect and gratitude,
[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jkGPnDAMRn-NuYGIk0nSA4e2Iyq1Uu89VZ7E7KTChA2haP59BVr1-vzk75Gsc5peA7gvgPhMcQNE0J8B8f3XIWX_Iz--tfj3-6t9tz_ldl7xKyDW18r_1Y8vHQul-aTu3sRBT7E3DQ_KKa2Uc943z8Fy8A87TaSJrIrOs6eH8fqTs2SJVZMG7NH0RhnlezSuixxj8LeISPrGrgfTXzsdCZcUSG31oFJyli5kaebhWeu6XWEj4Lhx2At3tHDM9TQAx5JfgdvjmSq3Uy7txgtVBhzTUktu5dFeGuhxr_JbOKZdQN9PaE8SSFZKbwvouzw-WOVyOkdRgJYk70sFfcdbU4a4Hmme02YdmP7tag9Z_gUAAP__t-528A)
Royce White
Candidate
United States Senate

subject: Elissa, Debbie, Jacky, and Tammy need our help, Peter →

body:
These swing states will determine control of the Senate |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83020374/467030927/-120062714?refcode=WTEFEP23_20240414_SwingStateSenateRS_ALL&sourceid=1053437&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2Q5MDdkNi04OGZhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J80wjSBuSut-w2RHSvaETn8zgFsCuPFchu1aGn4eTyU=) Peter,

Control of the U.S. Senate is up for grabs, and Republicans are eyeing **four key swing states** — Michigan, Florida, Nevada, and Wisconsin — in their attempt to take back the majority this November.

That's where EMILYs List-endorsed candidates **Elissa Slotkin (MI-SEN)** , **Debbie Mucarsel-Powell (FL-SEN)** , Sen. **Jacky Rosen (NV)** , and Sen. **Tammy Baldwin (WI)** come in. **Swing states _will_ determine control of the Senate in November. So before we jump in: Can Democratic pro-choice women count on your support in majority-defining Senate races this November, Peter? Here's what you need to know about **Elissa** , **Debbie** , **Jacky** , and **Tammy's** races:
* In Michigan, **Elissa Slotkin** is fighting hard to protect a newly-open blue seat in a purple state. Early polling in Elissa's race found that 25% of voters were _undecided_ — this race WILL come down to the wire.

* Following a state Supreme Court ruling, abortion rights WILL be on the ballot in Florida this fall, and we know that the Senate race in the Sunshine State will be _close_. Former Rep. **Debbie Mucarsel-Powell** is taking on anti-choice Republican Sen. Rick Scott, and recent polling shows Debbie _closely competitive_.

* In 2022, Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto won her race in Nevada by _less than 1% of the vote_. It doesn't get closer than that, and we know that Sen. **Jacky Rosen's** reelection race this November will also be neck-and-neck. Republicans would LOVE to flip this seat.

* Wisconsin is the ultimate swing state. Sen. **Tammy Baldwin's** counterpart is anti-choice extremist Republican Sen. Ron Johnson, who won in the same cycle that Wisconsonites reelected their Democratic governor. In a state where _both_ state chambers are controlled by Republicans, it's critical that we keep this Senate seat blue to protect choice in Wisconsin and beyond.

Our ability to win in swing states will determine whether we hold the Senate this year. It's as simple as that. **If you can, please donate now to help elect and reelect Democratic pro-choice women in must-win swing state races this cycle:**

name: Jon Tester
subject: I bet this would make Mitch McConnell furious
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Hello, in just a minute I’ll ask you to [**split a contribution between my campaign and Jacky Rosen's ahead of our mid-month fundraising deadline**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83020918/467032550/1743277108?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3698-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzhjY2YzNS04YWZhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qrJtlbjxBi83naEf2UTiTX_M6d7YGQ88frYohDaOCfk=), but first I hope you’ll give me a moment to explain why it’s so important to give—especially today.

I grew up on my family’s farm, and Sharla and I still work that land today. In my opinion, being a farmer makes me a better senator. My background is a big part of the reason I remain grounded and focused on defending our Montana way of life. Because with all the chaos in Washington (especially now), you need somebody who will roll up their sleeves and get to work.
Last time I ran, nearly $70 million was spent on the Montana Senate race. This time around, we’ve already passed that number: **an eye-popping** **$120 million** **has been spent or reserved in advertising alone**. It’ll take a lot of support from this team to raise what we’ll need to protect this seat.

And if you know me, I’m not the kind of person who likes to ask for money. But I bet Mitch McConnell would be _furious_ if we showed him that a whole lot of grassroots power is stronger than his wealthy donors and super PACs will ever be.
Let’s be clear: **This election isn’t a sure thing.** Experts say this race is a toss-up and rank Montana as one of the seats most likely to flip. That’s why it’s SO important you make a contribution today—everything is on the line.

Everyone—including Mitch McConnell—is watching what we raise to judge the strength of this team. **I don’t expect you to chip in every time I ask, but I need you on my side now more than ever to show our opponents we’re ready to fight back and win.**
[**Will you split a contribution between my campaign and Jacky Rosen's today? It couldn’t come at a more critical moment:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83020919/467032551/1743277108?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3698-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzhjY2YzNS04YWZhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qrJtlbjxBi83naEf2UTiTX_M6d7YGQ88frYohDaOCfk=)

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83021255/467034183/1419042639?refcode=240414_TW_Vulnerable&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmU3NGIyNTktOGJmYS1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KITZYhmlPA5aCZq9y1nEeNhLkNWTm1K2ehK-lAM9atE=)

Tamie Wilson here, and I’ll cut straight to the point. As the Democratic nominee running AGAINST Jim Jordan, I’ve crisscrossed this district talking to voters about the issues that matter the most to them. Rising cost of living, lack of affordable healthcare, and protecting our reproductive rights are common refrains, but here’s another fact: **Voters are sick and tired of Jim Jordan’s petty partisan politics - and they want an elected official who will put in the work to deliver RESULTS, not headlines.** **As the hardest-working candidate in this race, I’m ready to deliver on Day One for my constituents. But first? I need your help to BEAT Jim Jordan.[Rush a contribution today to help us win >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83021256/467034184/1419042639?refcode=240414_TW_Vulnerable&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmU3NGIyNTktOGJmYS1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KITZYhmlPA5aCZq9y1nEeNhLkNWTm1K2ehK-lAM9atE=)** Anybody who knows me knows I am a tenacious fighter with a reputation for speaking my mind and I won’t shy away from a bruising fight with Jim Jordan. In fact, I have been drafting bills and doing the hard work to represent ALL of US while Jordan only has a record of inaction and self-promotion. He thinks he can just bully his way to re-election, but he has no idea what he’s up against. **We’re building a nationwide movement of grassroots donors to bring him down at the ballot box in November.[Can I count on you to rush $25, $50, or $100 to help us hit that goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83021257/467034185/1419042639?refcode=240414_TW_Vulnerable&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmU3NGIyNTktOGJmYS1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KITZYhmlPA5aCZq9y1nEeNhLkNWTm1K2ehK-lAM9atE=)**

clean_body: = The New York Times ran the numbers to determine the majority-making House seats in the country this cycle...and concluded that Michigan’s 8th District is one of the toughest battlegrounds: = We’ve said it all along: if Democrats are going to take back the House, Kristen needs to win this tossup race in November. But winning is going to take a lot of work – and resources. The official House Republican campaign arm and their top Super PAC named this district a top target – and they will have HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS of dollars at their disposal to spend on misleading attack ads. That is on top of our GOP opponent – a trust funder from California – who has now spent a total of $2.6 MILLION on his multiple attempts to get to Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks, Team KMR | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. body:
We’re coming up on our April mid-month deadline tomorrow night, so we’ve been taking a look at our donation records.
#
It's that time again, Derek.
We’re coming up on our April mid-month deadline tomorrow night, so we’ve been taking a look at our donation records. Here’s what we’ve got for you:
**John Fetterman for PA** _Record for:_
Derek _Active donor:_
Not yet _Suggested donation:_
$5 **[Pitch in now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240414-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240414-1&refcode2=8922_434096_ja7w3J&akid=8922%2E434096%2Eja7w3J)**
---
[**Our deadline is tomorrow night at 11:59 pm, and we’ve set a goal of raising $5,000 before then. Can you pitch in $5 now to help us out?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240414-1?refcode=em20240414-1&amount=5&refcode2=8922_434096_ja7w3J&akid=8922%2E434096%2Eja7w3J)
Setting these goals (and reaching them!) helps us ensure that we have the resources to organize in every corner of Pennsylvania and talk to as many voters as possible.
We can’t do it without you, Derek. So if you’ve been waiting for the right time to make your first donation, **now is the time!** ❤️
[**Pitch in $5 today to help us reach our $5,000 goal and CRUSH this April mid-month deadline:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240414-1?refcode=em20240414-1&amount=5&refcode2=8922_434096_ja7w3J&akid=8922%2E434096%2Eja7w3J)

Thanks,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20240414-8922-footer&t=1&refcode2=8922_434096_ja7w3J&akid=8922%2E434096%2Eja7w3J)**

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83022921/467039665/-664527026?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjI0YjczOC05MWZhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iFqKq_M-F2d8RWAl3eqCBm659RlueNHi5oUa877A_w8=)
_“Seriously, just die.”_

_“We are coming for you b#!*h.”_

_“You better keep your doors locked and sleep with one eye open.”_

_“I can’t wait to find you and follow you to your house and expose your address.”_

That’s just a sampling of the threats DASS Chair and Colorado Sec. of State Jena Griswold has received in the last several months – **a 600% increase** in a seven month period.

Friend, these aren’t isolated incidents either. In the wake of Trump’s 2020 Big Lie, we are seeing extreme threats to election administrators across the nation.

**The Big Lie has morphed into a Big Threat – and it’s not going away. In fact, we expect the rhetoric to ramp up as we get closer to November, which is why we need your help:**

[Can we count on you to make a small donation of $3 to elect Democratic Secretaries of State who will defend our democracy from election-denying Republicans?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83022922/467039666/-209663063?refcode=em-4.12.24-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjI0YjczOC05MWZhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iFqKq_M-F2d8RWAl3eqCBm659RlueNHi5oUa877A_w8=)

clean_body: | = “Seriously, just die.” “We are coming for you b#!h.” “You better keep your doors locked and sleep with one eye open.” “I can’t wait to find you and follow you to your house and expose your address.” That’s just a sampling of the threats DASS Chair and Colorado Sec. of State Jena Griswold has received in the last several months – a 600% increase in a seven month period. Friend, these aren’t isolated incidents either. In the wake of Trump’s 2020 Big Lie, we are seeing extreme threats to election administrators across the nation. The Big Lie has morphed into a Big Threat – and it’s not going away. In fact, we expect the rhetoric to ramp up as we get closer to November, which is why we need your help: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thank you, Team DASS | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters. Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda. | = = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . subject: This Week's Must-Know Trio 📚
body:
This Week's Must-Know Trio 📚 | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=0c4a37d734&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| This week's 3 most important things you need to know or actions you need to take to help us recapture our cities, state, and nation.

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!
---
| | | **
OHIO ELECTION INTEGRITY BILL
HR 472 • HR 472 • HR 472
WHAT TO KNOW! • WHAT TO DO!**

---
|
Members of the Ohio Election Integrity Network (OEIN) have been working almost non-stop for months on election integrity legislation that has recently been introduced in the Ohio House of Representatives as HB 472. You can find information on the bill [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=14aea9216c&e=5c740fa3e2).

Soon, they'll be asking you to take action, BUT NOT YET. For now, be aware of it, study it, ask questions about it, and share it with others.

A summary of HB 472 can be downloaded in PDF format by clicking [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=304166fe0f&e=5c740fa3e2) or by clicking on the image below.

If you have any questions, please contact **Mark Pukita** at **614-499-0599 (c)** by text or call. I will put you in touch with the right people to answer your questions.

---
| [](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=0b0f1e4e15&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| |
**EVENT NOTICE! • CONSIDER ATTENDING****!
OHIO REPUBLICAN PARTY
STATE CENTRAL COMMITTEE
ORGANIZATIONAL MEETING
APRIL 26TH! • FREE!
PLEASE FORWARD & SHARE!**

---
|
**Reserve Friday, April 26th! **This is the date of the Organizational Meeting of the newly-elected Ohio Republican Party State Central Committee (ORP SCC). _**THE MEETING IS OPEN TO THE PUBLIC AND WE NEED YOU THERE!**_

This elected body (you voted for them, or should have, on March 19th!) represents you in the Ohio Republican Party. Grassroots, citizen candidates widened their share of the SCC to almost equal with the old-time, elite, insiders. This is GREAT news for those of us working to take back our communities, state, and nation from corrupt career politicians and party insiders & operatives.

I'll be sending out another of these emails soon to tell you what you can do to help advance the conservative cause within the ORP. Be on the lookout for it!

THANK YOU!
---
|
---
|
---
| |
**ANNOUNCING: THE OHIO X BRIGADE!
JOIN US ON X (formerly Twitter)!
FREE SPEECH SOCIAL MEDIA!**

---
|
**X (formerly "Twitter") is the only large free speech social media platform!**
Since Elon Musk purchased Twitter and renamed it X, it has become the only widely-used, free speech, social media platform. Truth may have free speech, but it has very few users compared to X (or Facebook, or Instagram, or ...) and is an echo chamber for conservatives.

**Why be on X?**
People like us need to be on X expressing our smaller government, more freedom, and natural rights policy beliefs to have our message reach persuadable Independents and swing Democrat voters who "lurk" (watch but don't comment) on X. This isn't possible on Facebook, which has a closed architecture (only friends can see your content). Facebook, like Truth, is a conservative echo chamber and does little or nothing to expand our movement.

If you don't have an X account, I encourage you to get one. If you have an old Twitter account that you're not using, I suggest you start using it. If you were banned on Twitter, if your account was suspended, I urge you to start another one.

**The Ohio X Brigade!**
Once you're up and running on X, join our X "Community". It's called the "Ohio X Brigade". Once you're on X, you can find it by going [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=7caad749c7&e=5c740fa3e2) or by clicking on the image below.

Thank you for joining us!
---
|
---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f841f23e36&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
---
| |
**Prior Issues of This Email
You May Find Valuable**

---
|
[April 7, 2024 - Secure American Freedoms This Week!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=6adcfc6a38&e=5c740fa3e2)

[February 18, 2024 - Vote on or before March 19th!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=cf6889b145&e=5c740fa3e2)

[January 14, 2024 - ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=1a2dea969d&e=5c740fa3e2)[Ohio Liberator List!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=b2911519e8&e=5c740fa3e2 "URGENT! Ohio Liberator List!")

[November 9, 2023 - What now?

October 15, 2023 - Critical Volunteer Needs!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=8cf5797bd6&e=5c740fa3e2)

[August 12, 2023 - Download Our FREE App!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=59c1466f99&e=5c740fa3e2)

[July 30, 2023 - Select Better Candidates

July 23, 2023 - Help Trevor Cain](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f99407b254&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
|
---
|
---
| Thank you for being a GFI **person** as part of the GFI **network**. We're always interested in how we can do a better job of connecting patriots across Ohio. If you want to communicate, we're here!

Best regards,

**Mark Pukita
A GFI Person
mark@gfiohio.com
614-499-0599 (c)**
---
| | _Copyright © 2024 The Grassroots Freedom Initiative, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
The Grassroots Freedom Initiative4240 Hobbs Landing Dr WDublin, OH 43017-6025
[Add us to your address book](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/vcard?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=7f49dcf5db) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&t=b&e=5c740fa3e2&c=7f49dcf5db).

name: Harry Dunn
subject: UPDATE: one month out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| _Our friend Harry Dunn is running for Congress in Maryland’s Third District, and we’re working to support him. We hope you’ll read the message below from him and consider[**splitting a donation between Harry’s campaign and the Voter Protection Project.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65700?t=6&akid=13767%2E878179%2EDrnhFg)_ We're officially one month out, team.

That's just one month to renew my current ads and launch new ones.

Just one month to knock on doors and call up voters.

Just one month to spread the word of why I am the best candidate to protect our democracy.

Abortion rights, voting rights – our freedoms are on the line. Just as they were on January 6.

I put my life on the line for this democracy and every day since I've wondered what more I could do to protect it.

This is my best chance to protect the most fundamental of our rights. And I've only got one month to do it.

[**Tomorrow at midnight I'm facing a mid-month deadline. I need to raise $300,000 so I can catch up to the spending that a super PAC is dishing out to support one of my opponents. Will you chip in to my campaign and the Voter Protection Project to help me knock this goal out of the park? It's a huge amount of money, but chipping in just $10 or $20 at a time will get us there in no time.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65700?t=7&akid=13767%2E878179%2EDrnhFg) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Harry Dunn and Voter Protection Project will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65702?t=8&akid=13767%2E878179%2EDrnhFg)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65703?t=9&akid=13767%2E878179%2EDrnhFg)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65704?t=10&akid=13767%2E878179%2EDrnhFg)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65705?t=11&akid=13767%2E878179%2EDrnhFg)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65706?t=12&akid=13767%2E878179%2EDrnhFg)
30 days and counting,

Harry Dunn
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=13767%2E878179%2EDrnhFg). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=13767%2E878179%2EDrnhFg).**

name: VoteVets
subject: Here’s the rundown:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We founded VoteVets because we were sick and tired of taking it on the chin from Republicans who wrap themselves in the flag but don’t lift a finger to stop needless wars or support the people who fight them.
#
Derek, just a small rundown of the issues we face right now:
Conflict and tension continue to increase in the Eastern Mediterranean.
Ukraine is on the brink, Putin is on the march.
At home, the polls don’t look great. Trump continues to attack the heart of our elections, doing untold damage to our democracy.
The Republican Party seems ready to abandon our commitments to our NATO allies and to democratic partners around the world.
It’s a lot, and it might be difficult to imagine that you can make a difference against all of that, but we’re here to tell you that you can.
We founded VoteVets because we were sick and tired of taking it on the chin from Republicans who wrap themselves in the flag but don’t lift a finger to stop needless wars or support the people who fight them.
Nearly 20 years later, we’ve moved the needle. We get results. We flip races. And together, we can continue moving that needle.
We are going to keep pushing the GOP until Ukraine aid gets passed. We will work to defeat MAGA-right candidates from coast to coast. We wrote the book on defeating Trump in 2020, and we’re ready for round two.
If you’re with us, and if you’re ready to keep up the fight, we need you today:
**[Please, make a donation before our mid-month deadline hits tomorrow at midnight. VoteVets can make a difference, but only with your help.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-april24.NF8wCo&refcode=em240414-1-30&t=1&akid=25046%2E3013755%2EMKMZgs)

name: Harry Dunn
subject: not the news I wanted to give you
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
we're being outspent
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=21257%2E4449941%2ESWKmXW)
---
| _Our friend Harry Dunn is running for Congress in Maryland’s Third District.**_I hope you’ll read the message below from him and consider splitting a donation between Harry’s campaign and Fight for Reform._**_
---
Hey there, we're really fed up right now and we're going to tell you why:

**Harry is a hero. He would never say it himself, but it's the truth.**

He was awarded the Presidential Citizens Medal by President Biden. He defended the Capitol, and our democracy, with his bare hands. He put his life on the line while insurrectionists threatened him, yelled slurs at him, and attacked him.

He's an American hero.

**But right now, a MAGA-funded super PAC is funneling cash into this race to back his opponent. They're so threatened by a Black hero who isn’t afraid to speak truth to power when it comes to protecting our democracy.**
[**So we're urgently asking you to rush $10 to support Harry's campaign and Fight for Reform. If we are outraised we could lose, and our democracy is far too fragile to let that happen: »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/41991?t=7&akid=21257%2E4449941%2ESWKmXW)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight for Reform and Harry Dunn will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/41992?t=8&akid=21257%2E4449941%2ESWKmXW)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/41993?t=9&akid=21257%2E4449941%2ESWKmXW)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/41994?t=10&akid=21257%2E4449941%2ESWKmXW)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/41995?t=11&akid=21257%2E4449941%2ESWKmXW)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/41996?t=12&akid=21257%2E4449941%2ESWKmXW)
It's quite the coincidence that the same billionaires who gave money to Lauren Boebert, Ted Cruz, Ron DeSantis, and Donald Trump are giving to this PAC who just cut a check for Harry’s opponent.

_**This Super PAC has endorsed 109 Republicans who voted to overturn the 2020 election – and one of Harry's "Democratic" opponents has their full support.**_

And the worst part is that this changes the whole race.

With the help of this shady MAGA-backed PAC, we're being outspent. That means less ads of Harry, and more of his opponent.
[**We're less than 5 weeks out from this election, so when we say we're at a full-on sprint, we really mean it. Can you please chip in $20 right now to Harry's campaign to help elect a hero to Congress and to Fight for Reform to help elect pro-democracy state and local Dems? »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/41996?t=13&akid=21257%2E4449941%2ESWKmXW)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight for Reform and Harry Dunn will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/41992?t=14&akid=21257%2E4449941%2ESWKmXW)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/41995?t=17&akid=21257%2E4449941%2ESWKmXW)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/41996?t=18&akid=21257%2E4449941%2ESWKmXW)
-Team Harry

Friend,

Remember in late 2023 when House Republicans were barreling toward an impeachment of President Biden, and Jim Jordan looked like a shoe-in to become the next Speaker of the House?**

What stopped this from happening was a strong national backlash, a grassroots uprising that effectively pushed back on the right wing’s propaganda—and won.**

There was never any evidence backing a case for impeaching Joe Biden. And now the GOP’s baseless impeachment inquiry is on life support, just waiting to be quietly sent to the ash heap of history. The CIA has even entered the debate, after having been accused (without evidence, of course) of interfering with the GOP’s impeachment inquiry. Top CIA officials sent a letter to Jim Jordan and James Comer refuting their allegations.**
**[](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/td/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTg2MTcxMjMwNzk1ODY4OTAsXCJyXCI6MTE4NjE3MTU3NTY2MjAzODIwfSIsInMiOiJmYTYyYmZmN2RkMWMxZWEyIn0)

With supporters like you pitching in to help Tamie organize and stand strong against Jim Jordan this year, we will have another massive victory: defeating Jordan and delivering a blow to the MAGA machine that abuses power to elevate Trump and destroy democracy.**[

Will you stand with Tamie and help her build a firewall of good people who will help defeat Jim Jordan in November? **This could be one of the last emails I ever send you, Friend.** **[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=72ad69a4c4ae4e47801ad50a04c28edf&_e=3YdV9SLHhIudgHiRNVNw9W7nlTGK0hda9Njf0BjxhDzFJajct1F-llXSDHpaD9SHCB5Xz73rNACu4pWvKBHyXl5MdzUpWO-n71EtOfoyHVDlLRFzfcmoOwECpPG9Pc25L7TFzyGtULGUqhTGlbFryPVmMT31lGgejsIX0gfj6aS9O5oQZWwZ0zM3QT_Sj2hs5ppqcLNeq-rMNlUNpw0LKvq9jUJLizXDeFHCV44QZ3K7x8TuYDkgylQC-AErPjitm00Rc62qhDKh7QguAWzzj_-naX8xcOtSu0xYdOirzDYSb6JYzUZXlMyILS5eUtFnI2lvWbc0kD_A6P1QFl51SA%3D%3D) **

I'll be honest with you, no matter how much it pains me to lay it out.

**Things are not looking good for Trump-supporting conservatives like us in 2024, and I need to know how you 'll react to this message to know how to move forward. My next move depends on your response. **

My name is JD Vance. If you haven't heard of me, I'm a Husband, Father, Marine Corps Veteran, Businessman, Author, and Trump Conservative Senator from the great state of Ohio.

I've worked hard to serve the people of Ohio in Washington, and I will never be dishonest with you.

**Joe Biden and his Hard-Left Liberal cronies are sending millions and millions of dollars across the country in an attempt to sweep the most important races and eradicate the conservative movement. We can 't let them win. **

**[That's why I'm reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=72ad69a4c4ae4e47801ad50a04c28edf&_e=3YdV9SLHhIudgHiRNVNw9W7nlTGK0hda9Njf0BjxhDzFJajct1F-llXSDHpaD9SHCB5Xz73rNACu4pWvKBHyXl5MdzUpWO-n71EtOfoyHVDlLRFzfcmoOwECpPG9Pc25L7TFzyGtULGUqhTGlbFryFGNLsgCMA5VbKkSsbgKqopVob46o7bQX0MvNjsF0w__mZvWwv1MDCIvl8vueL_AXg2ByLgVjIphK7Pfa7gusFJvzxNgwuiGvdYCCm96x3ZDdlyEod3TyA8oeg67bOlCyBQamy2mOS3ASrWxd85FlqjeXL2hH5acdETDSaniSs2jQDr8Pg02YN693XOdm8Z-jA%3D%3D)**

name: Rick Coplen
subject: Tomorrow, April 15, is America’s Tax Filing Deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen
body:
|
---
The number of Americans who celebrate this day approaches zero. Some will point out that “tax freedom day” is April 18 – the first day of the year when the United States as a whole has earned enough money to pay all of its local, state, and national taxes. Typically, they will forget to mention that tax freedom day in the United States is earlier in the year than in just about every other country on earth.

Then there are those, such as Scott Perry, who will use tomorrow to complain about the cost of government. But cost is only half of a cost-benefit analysis. So it’s worth asking what we get from government spending.

We can begin by realizing that every dollar the government spends is spent in the private sector. Take for example the $1.3 billion contract between the Defense Logistic Agency and Caterpillar Inc. in 2022. Caterpillar employees in York who work under that contract are private sector employees, but their wages are paid, at least in part, by the U.S. Government.

Even those who work directly for the government spend their money in the private sector. Remove the U.S. Army War College from Carlisle, or state government from Harrisburg, and the impact on the private sector would be immediate and potentially fatal for many businesses. Take away Social Security benefits, as Scott Perry has proposed, and you create real economic hardship for seniors and the private sector businesses they patronize.

Scott Perry’s determination to eliminate benefits so that the rich can get richer reminds me of Oscar Wilde’s famous line, “He knows the price of everything and the value of nothing.”

Of course, government should not collect more than it can use effectively in service to the American people. For example, we should not be wasting $20 billion a year to subsidize Big Oil, as Scott Perry insists we must do.

However, we should be spending money to protect democracy in Ukraine. That money will go mostly to American workers rebuilding our own stockpiles of weapons to replace those we have dedicated to repelling Vladimir Putin’s criminal invasion. By opposing aid for Ukraine, Scott Perry puts “Moscow First” and opposes American jobs, the rule of international law, and the peace that NATO has made possible for the past 75 years.

We don’t have to celebrate April 15, but we should understand what it means for democracy, for the economy, and how lucky we are to live in America.

We don’t have to celebrate April 15, but we should understand what it means for democracy, for the economy, and how lucky we are to live in America. | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen | =

_Our friend Harry Dunn is running for Congress in Maryland’s Third District, and we’re working to support him. We hope you’ll read the message below from him and consider splitting a donation between Harry’s campaign and Defeat Republicans._
We're officially one month out, Peter.

That's just one month to renew my current ads and launch new ones.

Just one month to knock on doors and call up voters.

Just one month to spread the word of why I am the best candidate to protect our democracy.

Abortion rights, voting rights – our freedoms are on the line. Just as they were on January 6.

I put my life on the line for this democracy and every day since I've wondered what more I could do to protect it.

This is my best chance to protect the most fundamental of our rights. And I've only got one month to do it.

[Tomorrow at midnight I'm facing a mid-month deadline. I need to raise $300,000 so I can catch up to the spending that a super PAC is dishing out to support one of my opponents. Will you chip in to my campaign and Defeat Republicans to help me knock this goal out of the park? It's a huge amount of money, but chipping in just $5 or $15 at a time will get us there in no time. ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83024449/467044843/-1538229440?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_230414_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiZTA0M2Y3LTk1ZmEtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=a-JeeIHh2ihdPS3LMTF24IeumVZ4SPrOKxYahGkAmU8=)

name: Martin Sheen
subject: A message from me -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Friend -- My name is Martin Sheen, though you may remember me as President Bartlet from _The West Wing._

I’m reaching out because Election Day is fast approaching. Republican megadonors are spending _millions_ to replace Democratic senators with their MAGA candidates. Control of the Senate and the future of democracy itself are on the line. _Yes, it really is that serious._

The GOP only needs to flip TWO seats to take control -- and polls show a _lot_ more Democrats than that are locked in _frighteningly close_ races against Republican candidates. We can’t let the GOP have its way in ANY of these key races.

**But we don't have many chances left to make a difference -- and with the DSCC's mid-month fundraising deadline coming up tomorrow, we need to act NOW.**

**[So, I’m humbly asking: Will you pitch in $5 or whatever you can afford to support Democrats? A group of donors has even agreed to TRIPLE your gift, but only for a limited time:](https://go.dscc.org/go/17746?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240414-MartinSheen-ReallySeriousDeadline-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240414-MartinSheen-ReallySeriousDeadline-Pros-sl1&akid=14284%2E9716520%2EXCQ9DS)**

| | [DONATE $5 (BECOMES $15)](https://go.dscc.org/go/17746?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240414-MartinSheen-ReallySeriousDeadline-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240414-MartinSheen-ReallySeriousDeadline-Pros-sl1&akid=14284%2E9716520%2EXCQ9DS)
---

On _The West Wing,_ when our country faced impossibly difficult times, we tried to show America what our government _could be_ if we all banded together for a common purpose. But this year’s Republican Senate candidates have no interest in any such vision.

They have tried to grind President Biden’s agenda to a halt and even embraced Donald Trump’s dangerous election lies. There’s just no telling what lengths they’ll go to if they take back our Senate majority.

That’s why the DSCC _must_ reach tomorrow's fundraising goal, so we can elect Democrats with integrity -- something these MAGA Republican candidates know nothing about. Unfortunately, we're falling behind our goal to defend the Senate.

There’s still hope though: Chuck Schumer just let me know that he’s unlocked $10,000 in matching funds to TRIPLE gifts made in response to this email -- _as long as they come in before the mid-month deadline._

**[Please, will you contribute $5 _(becomes $15 today)_ to defend our Democratic Senate majority against the farthest of far-right Republicans?](https://go.dscc.org/go/17746?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240414-MartinSheen-ReallySeriousDeadline-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240414-MartinSheen-ReallySeriousDeadline-Pros-sl1&akid=14284%2E9716520%2EXCQ9DS)**

If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. The first $10,000 received from this email will be TRIPLED:

| [Donate $5 (Becomes $15)](https://go.dscc.org/go/17746?amount=5&t=8&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240414-MartinSheen-ReallySeriousDeadline-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240414-MartinSheen-ReallySeriousDeadline-Pros-sl1&akid=14284%2E9716520%2EXCQ9DS)
---
| [Donate $10 (Becomes $30)](https://go.dscc.org/go/17746?amount=5&t=9&amount=10&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240414-MartinSheen-ReallySeriousDeadline-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240414-MartinSheen-ReallySeriousDeadline-Pros-sl1&akid=14284%2E9716520%2EXCQ9DS)
---
| [Donate $20 (Becomes $60)](https://go.dscc.org/go/17746?amount=5&t=10&amount=20&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240414-MartinSheen-ReallySeriousDeadline-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240414-MartinSheen-ReallySeriousDeadline-Pros-sl1&akid=14284%2E9716520%2EXCQ9DS)
---
| [Rush Another Amount](https://go.dscc.org/go/17746?amount=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240414-MartinSheen-ReallySeriousDeadline-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240414-MartinSheen-ReallySeriousDeadline-Pros-sl1&akid=14284%2E9716520%2EXCQ9DS)
---

My character in _The West Wing_ famously said, “Decisions are made by those who show up.” I truly believe that, and if you do too, then **[let's band together and defend the Senate.](https://go.dscc.org/go/17746?amount=5&t=12&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240414-MartinSheen-ReallySeriousDeadline-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240414-MartinSheen-ReallySeriousDeadline-Pros-sl1&akid=14284%2E9716520%2EXCQ9DS)**

Thank you so much for all you do,

Martin Sheen

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/17746?amount=5&t=13&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240414-MartinSheen-ReallySeriousDeadline-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240414-MartinSheen-ReallySeriousDeadline-Pros-sl1&akid=14284%2E9716520%2EXCQ9DS)

clean_body: | | | Friend -- My name is Martin Sheen, though you may remember me as President Bartlet from The West Wing. I’m reaching out because Election Day is fast approaching. Republican megadonors are spending millions to replace Democratic senators with their MAGA candidates. Control of the Senate and the future of democracy itself are on the line. Yes, it really is that serious. The GOP only needs to flip TWO seats to take control -- and polls show a lot more Democrats than that are locked in frighteningly close races against Republican candidates. We can’t let the GOP have its way in ANY of these key races. But we don't have many chances left to make a difference -- and with the DSCC's mid-month fundraising deadline coming up tomorrow, we need to act NOW. | | On The West Wing, when our country faced impossibly difficult times, we tried to show America what our government could be if we all banded together for a common purpose. But this year’s Republican Senate candidates have no interest in any such vision. They have tried to grind President Biden’s agenda to a halt and even embraced Donald Trump’s dangerous election lies. There’s just no telling what lengths they’ll go to if they take back our Senate majority. That’s why the DSCC must reach tomorrow's fundraising goal, so we can elect Democrats with integrity -- something these MAGA Republican candidates know nothing about. Unfortunately, we're falling behind our goal to defend the Senate. There’s still hope though: Chuck Schumer just let me know that he’s unlocked $10,000 in matching funds to TRIPLE gifts made in response to this email -- as long as they come in before the mid-month deadline. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. The first $10,000 received from this email will be TRIPLED: | | | | My character in The West Wing famously said, “Decisions are made by those who show up.” I truly believe that, and if you do too, then Thank you so much for all you do, Martin Sheen | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Making sure you saw this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Friday was the one year anniversary of my reelection campaign’s launch.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2412%2E35263%2EDI_SQ0)
I wanted to make sure you saw my note from Friday, Peter. One year ago, I announced my reelection campaign for Wisconsin’s Senate seat — and a lot has changed since then. We always knew this race would be one of the most competitive in the nation. Now, it’s time we kick it into high gear. **[Will you chip in to my reelection campaign today to help us protect Wisconsin’s Senate seat and our Democratic majority? Thanks in advance for anything you can spare.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-apr24.2z_qm-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20240414_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2412%2E35263%2EDI_SQ0)** | | [DONATE NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-apr24.2z_qm-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20240414_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2412%2E35263%2EDI_SQ0)
---

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Tammy Baldwin
Date: Fri, Apr 12, 2024
Subject: I launched my reelection campaign one year ago
Peter — **One year ago today, I announced that I was running for reelection to the U.S. Senate.**
So much has changed since then. All eyes are on Wisconsin in what has shaped up to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country — and what will likely be my toughest reelection yet.
Mitch McConnell has made my seat a top target. He even handpicked a megamillionaire to run against me — a California bank owner who pledged to spend at least $20 million of his own fortune to flip this seat red.
Since launching his campaign, my Republican opponent has poured more than $5 million into TV and digital ads to flood Wisconsin’s airwaves and attempt to control the narrative in this race.
Now, the latest polling shows this race statistically tied.
A lot can change in a year, Peter. But one thing hasn’t: **Democrats cannot defend our majority in the Senate if we lose Wisconsin.** That’s why I’m personally asking you today:
**[Will you chip in to help me keep up the fight to defend Wisconsin’s Senate seat and our Senate majority along with it?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-apr24.2z_qm-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20240414_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=2412%2E35263%2EDI_SQ0)**

Peter,
Throughout my career, I’ve been proudly dedicated to leadership and service, holding senior positions at organizations like the Make-A-Wish Foundation and the American Red Cross.
More than anything else, my deep passion for helping others has driven me as I’ve navigated through life. From being on the ground coordinating first-response efforts after natural disasters to supporting families during their most difficult times of crisis, I’ve been able to cross paths with so many people and play a small role in lifting them up when they need it most.
Now, I’m running for Congress because our Democracy is in peril. Can I count on you to help fuel our people-powered campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
Our representative in Congress has held office for over 10 years, yet there have been no improvements made in our district. Instead of working for the great people he’s been elected to serve, David Schweikert has disrespected us by succumbing to special interests and extremist agendas.
I know my experience, along with my dedication to helping others, will allow me to be an effective voice for Arizonans in Congress. Our residents deserve better than career politicians like David Schweikert, so it’s time for us to come together to flip this seat from red to blue.
Peter, will you join our team by making a grassroots contribution today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]

subject: Arizona’s abortion ban is Mike Lawler’s legacy
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR BY
MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Earlier this week, the Arizona Supreme Court reinstated an 1864 law banning nearly all abortions.
Team,

Earlier this week, the Arizona Supreme Court reinstated an 1864 law banning nearly all abortions—a devastating blow to the fundamental rights of women. **This is not just an attack on women's health—it's an assault on bodily autonomy and our freedom to make our own health care decisions.**

Make no mistake: **Mike Lawler stands with the extremist Republicans across the country passing draconian anti-choice laws.** In Congress, he has consistently voted to restrict access to abortion and supported the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ , allowing states to pass these harmful bans in the first place.

**We refuse to sit idly by while politicians like Mike Lawler strip away our rights and control over our own bodies.**

Mondaire will always fight for a woman's right to bodily autonomy. We're fighting tooth and nail to help him defeat anti-choice extremist Mike Lawler and create a pro-choice House majority, but **we can't do it alone.**

name: Team McBride
subject: Only halfway
body:
We can’t do this without you!
#
Hey there,
We wanted to send over a quick email giving you an update on our mid-month goal before the deadline tomorrow. **(ICYMI: We’re aiming to raise $5,000 before Monday at midnight).**
With just over 24 hours to go, **we’re only halfway to our goal.** That means we are going to need a major boost in contributions to help us catch up ground before tomorrow.**
[**Will you help us get one step closer to meeting our goal by making a $5 contribution (or whatever amount fits your budget) right now? Your donation will be put immediately to work to elect Sarah!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/20240414-1?refcode=em20240414-1-42&amount=5&refcode2=42_21716_OTkqtG&akid=42%2E21716%2EOTkqtG)

We can’t do this without you!
Team McBride

My team has reviewed our monthly fundraising data, and unfortunately, we are not pacing well toward our April goal. If we don’t catch up this weekend, it will be very difficult to reach our goal by the end of the month.
This is not the news I wanted to share with you today, but now I'm forced to ask:
**[Will you please contribute, $3 or anything you can afford, to my reelection campaign today? These fundraising goals are not arbitrary. Every dollar you donate will not only help to keep me in Congress fighting for working families but will help us support Democrats across the country whose races will be critical to taking back the House majority in November.

Robert

name: Harry Dunn
subject: officially one month out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Harry Dunn for Congress
body:
30 days |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83025913/467049624/-742709655?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.04.14_B1_MM3_U1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzI4OWNkZmUtOWFmYS1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CyRVX6uOlRxNEFb0qDSNEG5N3Edm_uX3B_jTn4R_GW4=)
---
We're officially one month out, team.

That's just one month to renew my current ads and launch new ones.

Just one month to knock on doors and call up voters.

Just one month to spread the word of why I am the best candidate to protect our democracy.

Abortion rights, voting rights – our freedoms are on the line. Just as they were on January 6.

I put my life on the line for this democracy and every day since I've wondered what more I could do to protect it.

This is my best chance to protect the most fundamental of our rights. And I've only got one month to do it.

clean_body: 30 days | = We're officially one month out, team. That's just one month to renew my current ads and launch new ones. Just one month to knock on doors and call up voters. Just one month to spread the word of why I am the best candidate to protect our democracy. Abortion rights, voting rights – our freedoms are on the line. Just as they were on January 6. I put my life on the line for this democracy and every day since I've wondered what more I could do to protect it. This is my best chance to protect the most fundamental of our rights. And I've only got one month to do it. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = 30 days and counting, Harry Dunn = = | = = Harry Dunn for Congress PO Box 1449 Columbia, MD 21044 United States | mailto:info@harrydunnforcongress.com Paid for by Harry Dunn for Congress

* This is the toughest election for Senate Democrats this _entire decade_ : _“The ceiling is clearly lower for Democrats than for Republicans. It leaves Democrats, even in good years,**with achingly little margin for error to build a Senate majority.”**_

* November won’t just decide control of the Senate next year, but for **_years_ after.**

* It’s not just about the Senate majority — if Democrats lose the Senate this November, Mitch McConnell could refuse to seat any potential Supreme Court nominations recommended by President Biden — which could make the court **_even more_ extreme than it currently is.**

**Peter, all of this underscores just how urgent it is that we protect _every single Senate seat_ , including Mazie’s.** Republicans know that they have a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to retake the Senate majority _and expand it_ (!!!) — and with outside spending expected to reach **record levels** in the 2024 election, we have to be prepared for any right-wing attacks against Mazie that attempt to muddy the waters for Hawaii voters. **[So please, chip in $10 or more to help us re-elect Mazie, fend off GOP attacks, and surge support to Democrats in battleground states across the country. Peter,
From Adams County to Allegheny County, Beaver County to Bucks County, Crawford County to Chester County -- our map of Pennsylvania is filling up with the names of supporters who have stepped up and chipped in to re-elect Bob Casey.

Having this map in our office shows our campaign team (and Bob himself) just how many folks are in this fight to keep Pennsylvania blue. There are already so many people on our team -- and we want to make sure you have a chance to get your name on the map.

We cannot afford to sit idly by while our rights are stripped away. That's why your support is so crucial. ****[By donating today, you're not just helping to elect pro-choice Democrats in Ohio; you're standing up for reproductive freedom everywhere.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83026110/467050101/1103856757?refcode=odp_em_240414_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODJjYzdhYi05YmZhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EJz3eXjPxPVxpXVi4O-blZMX0rqC4VtMzilV190Kl_8=)**** Thank you for your continued support, Emily Feltz, Team ODP | ******Control of the House and Senate runs right through Ohio this year. Can Ohio Democrats count on you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help fuel our fight to hold on to the Senate and flip the House? → ****** | ************[********](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83026111/467050102/1103856757?refcode=odp_em_240414_1&amount=5;email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODJjYzdhYi05YmZhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EJz3eXjPxPVxpXVi4O-blZMX0rqC4VtMzilV190Kl_8=)****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83026112/467050103/1103856757?refcode=odp_em_240414_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODJjYzdhYi05YmZhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EJz3eXjPxPVxpXVi4O-blZMX0rqC4VtMzilV190Kl_8=) ****************

name: Jason Crow
subject: re: My time in the Army
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
|
#
---
Folks, it’s Jason Crow. This is a longer email than ones I usually write, but I wanted to take a few minutes and explain why I’m in this fight. After graduating from high school, I enlisted in the National Guard. You come in, bright-eyed and ready to serve your country. Every new recruit starts out as a Private — the lowest rank during basic training. After 9/11 I went active duty and became a Captain with the Army Rangers. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83026527/467051384/981822820?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_MMG_AC30_20240414_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmIxMTBjNi05ZGZhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=emmtpEsm2r9vMGI_vY-B6IM5F4Zs18aT6f-RLG-nHRs=) _Training can be grueling, especially the selection process to serve as an Army Ranger_ Even when I rose to the rank of Captain, service didn't get easier. As Captain, you’re expected to take on the toughest tasks. You’re the first one to jump out of the plane, and the last to eat. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83026528/467051386/981822820?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_MMG_AC30_20240414_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmIxMTBjNi05ZGZhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=emmtpEsm2r9vMGI_vY-B6IM5F4Zs18aT6f-RLG-nHRs=) That’s the essence of servant leadership. To listen more than talk. To lead by example. To put service above self. Those are the values I learned serving in the Army more than two decades ago, and they’re the values I bring to Congress. **Too many folks have felt like they’re left out and left behind. As though they don’t have the resources to achieve their dreams. I know what it’s like to be in your shoes, and I am fighting for you. Every single day.** **[If you agree that we need more servant leaders in Congress, I hope you’ll donate to help me tackle our biggest challenges and put Coloradans first. clean_body: | Folks, it’s Jason Crow. This is a longer email than ones I usually write, but I wanted to take a few minutes and explain why I’m in this fight. After graduating from high school, I enlisted in the National Guard. You come in, bright-eyed and ready to serve your country. Every new recruit starts out as a Private — the lowest rank during basic training. After 9/11 I went active duty and became a Captain with the Army Rangers. = Training can be grueling, especially the selection process to serve as an Army Ranger Even when I rose to the rank of Captain, service didn't get easier. As Captain, you’re expected to take on the toughest tasks. You’re the first one to jump out of the plane, and the last to eat. = That’s the essence of servant leadership. To listen more than talk. To lead by example. To put service above self. Those are the values I learned serving in the Army more than two decades ago, and they’re the values I bring to Congress. Too many folks have felt like they’re left out and left behind. As though they don’t have the resources to achieve their dreams. I know what it’s like to be in your shoes, and I am fighting for you. ---
Earlier this week I attended a Congressional Hearing about our country's investment (or lack thereof, really) in early childhood education. **As a single parent, I was extremely frustrated with some of my colleagues' continued inability to take the issue of child care seriously.**
The cost of child care has risen dramatically, outpacing other rising costs. Here in Orange County, the median price of child care for an infant is $20,866. _[You can check out costs for different types of care at different ages in your county using this interactive map.](https://substack.com/redirect/c3a3f276-bf16-468d-ba41-01ef24b93935?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/85661e81-a588-4ee5-9890-dc3ce0472476?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**The high sticker price isn 't the only problem.** Many families are struggling to find safe, reliable child care. Day care centers have long and sometimes expensive wait lists. Parents who work outside of traditional hours have trouble finding care that works. It's a massive problem that's pushing parents out of the workforce, making life difficult for families, and costing our economy billions.
Congress has been absent. While I led the push to include a real investment in childcare in the big pieces of legislation we passed in 2021 and 2022, and President Biden supported capping child care costs at 7% of a family's income for many Americans, Congress didn't get it done. **Child care is always first on the chopping block, and still hasn 't made our priority list. **
Congressional Republicans are opposed to investing in child care because they claim it's a "government takeover." **In this week 's hearing, Senator JD Vance cited stats that most married mothers would prefer to stay home with their kids, implying that their preference means we shouldn't invest in child care. **It's a load of BS, and completely ignores the reality for many families. When conservatives block the government from investing in child care to give families "choice," they take away choice from single parents and low-income parents.
Republicans don't want to invest in child care because it would mean taxing billionaires and ultra-profitable corporations, or siphoning funding from their defense industry friends.
In the hearing, Republicans also claimed that we shouldn't invest in child care because it's "spending other people's money."
It's true: Congress' whole job is to spend other people's money. Which is exactly why we should invest it in ways that make sense. Child care is a smart investment, plain and simple--and I have the math to prove it.
Right now, we're losing $122 billion annually in our economy because of unaffordable child care.
**But for every $1 we invest in child care, it yields $4 in return**. Investing in child care is smart economic policy and the only way we'll have a strong and stable workforce.
This issue has been put on the back burner for too long. That's in part because Congress, where the median age in the Senate is 65 and just 28% of Congresspeople are women, does not look like our country.**Too many of my colleagues are men who have never had to worry about affording quality child care.** Their kids are now grown, and when their kids were young, they had a wife (and yes I say wife, because most Members are heterosexual men), who stayed home with the kids. With a Congress that skews so wealthy, this is an issue too few in Congress understand.
**As Senator Vance talked about the preferences of married couples, I reminded the room --there are nearly 10 million single parents in this country.** But there's only one of us in Congress. That's why I'm going to use my remaining months in office to do everything I can to fight for affordable child care.
Thanks for following along,
Katie

clean_body: Congress must take this issue seriously. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more Congress must take this issue seriously. | | | Apr 14 | | | | | | | | | | | | Earlier this week I attended a Congressional Hearing about our country's investment (or lack thereof, really) in early childhood education. As a single parent, I was extremely frustrated with some of my colleagues' continued inability to take the issue of child care seriously. The cost of child care has risen dramatically, outpacing other rising costs. Here in Orange County, the median price of child care for an infant is $20,866. | | ---|---|--- The high sticker price isn 't the only problem. Many families are struggling to find safe, reliable child care. Day care centers have long and sometimes expensive wait lists. Parents who work outside of traditional hours have trouble finding care that works. It's a massive problem that's pushing parents out of the workforce, making life difficult for families, and costing our economy billions. Congress has been absent. While I led the push to include a real investment in childcare in the big pieces of legislation we passed in 2021 and 2022, and President Biden supported capping child care costs at 7% of a family's income for many Americans, Congress didn't get it done. Child care is always first on the chopping block, and still hasn 't made our priority list. Congressional Republicans are opposed to investing in child care because they claim it's a "government takeover." In this week 's hearing, Senator JD Vance cited stats that most married mothers would prefer to stay home with their kids, implying that their preference means we shouldn't invest in child care. It's a load of BS, and completely ignores the reality for many families. When conservatives block the government from investing in child care to give families "choice," they take away choice from single parents and low-income parents. Republicans don't want to invest in child care because it would mean taxing billionaires and ultra-profitable corporations, or siphoning funding from their defense industry friends. In the hearing, Republicans also claimed that we shouldn't invest in child care because it's "spending other people's money." It's true: Congress' whole job is to spend other people's money. Which is exactly why we should invest it in ways that make sense. Child care is a smart investment, plain and simple--and I have the math to prove it. Right now, we're losing $122 billion annually in our economy because of unaffordable child care. But for every $1 we invest in child care, it yields $4 in return. Investing in child care is smart economic policy and the only way we'll have a strong and stable workforce. This issue has been put on the back burner for too long. That's in part because Congress, where the median age in the Senate is 65 and just 28% of Congresspeople are women, does not look like our country.Too many of my colleagues are men who have never had to worry about affording quality child care. Their kids are now grown, and when their kids were young, they had a wife (and yes I say wife, because most Members are heterosexual men), who stayed home with the kids. With a Congress that skews so wealthy, this is an issue too few in Congress understand. As Senator Vance talked about the preferences of married couples, I reminded the room --there are nearly 10 million single parents in this country. But there's only one of us in Congress. That's why I'm going to use my remaining months in office to do everything I can to fight for affordable child care. Thanks for following along, Katie | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Katie Porter Katie Porter for Senate, PO Box 5176 Irvine, CA 92616, Email us: info@katieporter.com ? ?

name: Hold DNC accountable Alert via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Bernie's two presidential runs awakened a progressive populist movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Bernie’s two presidential runs awakened a progressive undercurrent in
America and sparked a populist movement. Corporate Democrats and the DNC
have pushed back every step of the way, refusing to ban dark money from
Democratic primaries and failing to act with urgency on climate change.

That’s why we’re launching a new 2024 progressive policy platform and
working to send delegates to the Democratic National Convention in Chicago
in August to advocate for priorities like Peace in Gaza, desperately
needed campaign finance reform, taxing billionaires like Elon Musk,
fighting climate change, and much more. President Biden and the entire
Democratic Party must listen to progressives if they want to actually gain
support from voters and enact policies that help working people.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16582?source=email-20240414&t=1011&akid=5782%2E5885482%2E0aLwpN ]Will you sign on to our progressive platform so we have a critical mass
of support behind us when we go to the DNC?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16582?source=email-20240414&t=1012&akid=5782%2E5885482%2E0aLwpN ]ADD YOUR NAME

Our platform priorities are built around the fundamental ideas of justice,
equality, peace, and the public good, priorities that Corporate Democrats
all too often leave behind. Here are some of our top priorities:

* Ceasefire in Gaza, no more weapons to Israel, and condition all U.S.
Aid to Israel
* Support Labor, Unions, Wages, and Economic Justice - empower workers
and hold the rich accountable
* Tax the Rich - yes, that means billionaires AND big corporations
* Aggressively Address Climate Change - up the urgency and take action
now!
* Campaign Finance Reform - get dark money out of politics once and for
all
* Preserve US Democracy and Fight a Fascist Takeover - like stopping
Trump’s extreme Project 2025
* End the Privatization of Public Goods - protect our vital public
services and the social safety net from irreversible corporate
takeovers
* Student Loan Forgiveness and Tuition-Free Public Higher Education -
end college debt now!
* Expand Medicare and Allow Comprehensive Pharmaceutical Negotiations -
we need to expand public health care immediately
* Develop and Advance Evidence-Based Policy - pass legislation that
lifts people out of poverty, addresses income inequality, and more

We need the DNC and President Biden to embrace our fight for a better
society for all. It’s time our government, and the Democratic Party,
governed for working people instead of billionaires and big corporations.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16582?source=email-20240414&t=1013&akid=5782%2E5885482%2E0aLwpN ]Add your name to support our core demands for the Democratic Party now!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16582?source=email-20240414&t=1014&akid=5782%2E5885482%2E0aLwpN ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

That doesn’t work – so I’ve got to ask for your help getting over the line. Every dollar is accounted for in our 2024 plans, so we really can’t fall short. name: Matt Cartwright (personal)
subject: Running short ahead of the primary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cartwright for Congress
body:
With the primary just around the corner, it's all hands on deck to ensure we have the resources we need to hit the ground running when the general election officially begins.
| Peter,

As we gear up for the primary election, I wanted to give you a quick update on where we stand. Right now, we're still short of hitting our $10,000 goal for this mid-month deadline.

With the primary just around the corner, it's all hands on deck to ensure we have the resources we need to hit the ground running when the general election officially begins. Every dollar we raise today will go directly towards scaling up our operations, expanding our outreach efforts, and ensuring that our message reaches every corner of our district.

Peter, will you chip in before midnight tonight to help us reach our mid-month fundraising goal and set ourselves up for success in the upcoming primary election? body:
Abortion rights, keeping Trump out of the White House, and winning the House will all come down to the work we do in our district. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83027607/467055018/41388607?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240414_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGUwZGE4YjEtYTNmYS1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3rCFYiUL5Akg6Hpg4hCuGlh_N3belKOvYVa4xYM-S_o=)

Peter — We already knew AZ-01 was going to be one of the most critical races in the country this election year. **Now, in the wake of this week’s Arizona Supreme Court decision banning all abortions in Arizona, the stakes have increased tremendously.** Abortion rights, keeping Trump out of the White House, and flipping the House could all come down to this one district. David Schweikert won by less than 1% in 2022 — he’s one of the most vulnerable Republicans in the House. And all his doubletalking and backpedaling now can’t cover up the fact that he has voted for a national, no exceptions abortion ban throughout his career. Andrei is the only challenger in America to outraise the incumbent every quarter — and this is the time to hit the gas, not the brakes. Defeating Schweikert will require us to keep up the incredible momentum we’ve gained so far — that’s where you come in. **If you want to give us our best shot at restoring abortion rights and helping Democrats win the House and White House, please consider chipping in to support Andrei TODAY.** [Can you pitch in a few bucks today to fuel Andrei’s campaign? #### **There are some that feel I am being too mean to the GOP Leadership. I do not think so, I think they should be accountable for their inaction (No Assistance on the Repeal of Ranked Choice Voting). The Arizona GOP, Idaho GOP, Hawaii GOP all invited me with Open Arms, The Alaska GOP was nonexistent.**
#### **I am not talking about local GOP groups, or individuals. I am discussing the Alaska GOP Leadership. Why the obvious disdain for Citizen Driven Politics?**
#### **We received more help from other State’s GOP. The Alaska GOP Leadership did not help us, let’s get a real leader. Jerry Ward**
#### **Out of all the candidates running to be GOP Chairman, Jerry Ward was essential to our success, we support Jerry Ward for Chairman of the Alaska GOP.**
#### **Learn how to be a delegate and vote in your district for Jerry Ward for GOP Chairman.**
