Over the last three years, as I embarked on a pioneering journey in the field of artificial intelligence [https://sealcam.ai](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=661c80c87bf4eb634a35f710&u=https%3A%2F%2Ft.co%2F5fhc331AVX&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_661c7fd2d001d01bb7aa91b9&l=en-US&s=lhYuSoexNXrIKjL58dEedYcU_y4%3D) , my trajectory took a significant turn. In the aftermath of the 2022 election, my focus shifted entirely to a cause surpassing personal ambition: the campaign to repeal Ranked Choice Voting (RCV). This effort culminates on November 5th, a critical moment when your support and voice can truly make a difference. By engaging just 5-10 friends to vote YES on repealing RCV, you amplify our collective call for change, shaping the future of our electoral processes.The path we've tread has been challenging. My wife, who just celebrated her 29th birthday, and I, now 34, have placed pivotal life events on hold for this cause. This includes delaying our plans to start a family and pausing the development of groundbreaking AI prototypes that are on the cusp of transforming our world [https://sealcam.ai](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=661c80c87bf4eb634a35f710&u=https%3A%2F%2Ft.co%2F5fhc331AVX&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_661c7fd2d001d01bb7aa91b9&l=en-US&s=lhYuSoexNXrIKjL58dEedYcU_y4%3D). This pause is not a complaint but a testament to our dedication to this campaign—a sacrifice we chose for the greater good. Our journey has taken us from Alaska's landscapes from Ketchikan, Sitka, Seward, Fairbanks, Kenai, Soldotna, Homer, Anchor Point, Sterling, Juneau, North Pole, Wasilla, Palmer, Anchorage, and more, where we secured signatures and galvanized support, to engaging with communities through radio, debates, and social media. Despite facing adversities, including personal attacks and espionage from well-funded opposition groups, our commitment has never waned. This is a testament to our belief in grassroots mobilization and democratic engagement. We did not want to take on this fight, we were under funded, under staffed, inexperienced, nonpartisan, no political experience citizens. We woke up one day and decided to do something. 43,000 Signatures, 700+ Volunteers, 12+ States, 5 Secretaries of State, 2 US Senate Members, 2 US Congress Members, Multiple State Legislatures, and thousands of people nationwide later. As we approach this pivotal junction, I invite you to join us in this monumental effort. By uniting under the banner of Team Alaska, we can champion a future where every vote is meaningful, and every voice is heard. This November 5th, let's make history together by voting YES to repeal Ranked Choice Voting. **Donate Today To Help Us Beat Rank Choice Voting, click the link below or go to our website**

Help Us Remove Rank Choice Voting from Alaska! Dear Supporters, Last summer, we paused our donation requests in response to some complaints raised by Soros and Friends aka Pro-RCV groups, but we're thrilled to announce that our donation portal is now live again! We're reaching out to you because we need your support to continue our mission of removing Rank Choice Voting from Alaska. With your generous contributions, we've achieved remarkable progress on a shoestring budget. While we don't have millions to spend, every dollar you donate will be dedicated to crucial advertising and Get Out The Vote (GOTV) activities. For instance, we're excited to bring Scott Presler to Alaska this fall, and your donations will help make this happen! In appreciation of your support, if you donate more than $500, you'll have the opportunity to join us and Scott Presler at the State Fair. It promises to be a memorable event, and we're eager to have a large group participate. Please note that donors contributing more than $500 will need to complete a financial disclosure with APOC, the Alaska State Regulator. We're here to assist you with this process, which can be conveniently done through the same portal used for filing PFD. Your support means the world to us. Please consider sharing and forwarding our emails to spread the word about our cause. We've dedicated over a year and a half of our lives to this mission, and we're determined to see it through. Together, we can make a difference. Let's finish the job! Don't forget to remind 5-10 of your friends about the vote on November 5th. Vote Yes to Repeal/Remove Rank Choice Voting from Alaska. Thank you for standing with us. Warm regards, Phil Izon

### **We Did It, Repeal of RCV is on the ballot**
**Victory in Sight: Mobilizing Alaska Against Ranked Choice Voting In an unprecedented mobilization for electoral reform, our coalition has successfully ignited a statewide movement to challenge and propose the removal of Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska.****With the unwavering dedication of over 700 volunteers, we've shattered expectations by gathering an astounding 43,000 signatures from Alaskans who share our vision for a more transparent and straightforward electoral process. This monumental achievement not only secured our position on the ballot but also paved the way for the citizens of Alaska to voice their desire for change.****The journey to this pivotal moment has been fueled by a year of relentless effort, strategic networking, and a deep commitment to our cause. Our volunteers have traversed every corner of Alaska, engaging with communities, explaining the complexities of RCV, and illuminating the benefits of a more direct voting system. This grassroots campaign has not only expanded our network but has also significantly raised awareness about the issues surrounding RCV.****As we stand on the brink of this historic opportunity, we extend our heartfelt gratitude to everyone who has contributed to this cause. Your support has been the backbone of our campaign, providing us with the resources, energy, and motivation needed to confront and dismantle the RCV system in Alaska.****The early news release confirming our achievement marks not just a milestone for our movement but also a beacon of hope for those who believe in electoral reform. This is our chance to fundamentally transform Alaska's electoral landscape, ensuring a voting system that is straightforward, understandable, and truly reflective of the people's will.****Let's seize this moment and make history together. The ballot is our battleground, and with your continued support, we will achieve our goal of ridding Alaska of Ranked Choice Voting. The fight is far from over, but with our collective strength, determination, and the foundation we've built over the past year, victory is within our reach. Thank you, Alaska, for standing with us.****Together, we will restore simplicity and clarity to our elections, ensuring a future where every vote counts in the most straightforward manner possible. Let's move forward, united in our purpose and resolute in our mission to eliminate Ranked Choice Voting. The time for change is now, and with your help, we will make it a reality.**
---
### **Press Release**
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE****Alaska Volunteers Triumph: Nearly 43,000 Signatures to Overturn Ranked Choice Voting** _**Anchorage, Alaska**_**– In a resounding demonstration of democratic engagement, a grassroots movement led by over 700 Alaskan volunteers has successfully gathered nearly 43,000 signatures, significantly exceeding the required 26,000, to propose the removal of Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska. This monumental effort was completed a full month ahead of schedule, showcasing the determination and unity of Alaskans.****"This is not just a collection of signatures, but a profound statement by the people of Alaska," said Phil Izon, a lead organizer of the initiative. "Our volunteers, all Alaskans, have voiced their concerns and desires through this campaign. We've surpassed the number of signatures the Pro-RCV group initially gathered to introduce RCV, underlining a growing skepticism and desire for change among the electorate."****The movement has been a true grassroots effort, contrasting sharply with the Pro-RCV group, which reportedly spent over $7 million and relied on out-of-state resources to promote and push RCV on Alaska. "Our success was driven by Alaskans, for Alaskans. We did not need to fly in people or spend millions. Our strength came from the genuine support and hard work of our volunteers," Izon added.****This initiative represents a significant challenge to RCV, a system that has been increasingly scrutinized for its complexity and the perception that it obscures the straightforward principle of "one person, one vote." The organizers believe that this successful petition drive will resonate beyond Alaska, setting a precedent for other states considering RCV, we are a cautionary tale (Like a canary in coal mine, warning others about danger).****"We stand for the Alaskans who felt misled, for those who found the RCV ballot confusing, and for everyone who believes in the sanctity of the straightforward voting process," said Izon. "Our message is clear: it's time to remove Ranked Choice Voting from our state. 'Let's Take Out The Trash, Let’s Rid The Rank' is more than a slogan; it's a call to action for all Alaskans who value transparency and simplicity in their electoral system."****The submitted signatures will now undergo verification by state officials. When validated, this will pave the way for a ballot measure where Alaskans can directly vote on the future of RCV in their state.****"We did this for you, for every Alaskan who wants their vote to count in the most direct and understandable way. We urge all Alaskans to stand with us and vote to remove Rank Choice Voting. Together, we can ensure our electoral system reflects the true will of the people," concluded Izon.**

This monumental achievement not only secured our position on the ballot but also paved the way for the citizens of Alaska to voice their desire for change.The journey to this pivotal moment has been fueled by a year of relentless effort, strategic networking, and a deep commitment to our cause. Our volunteers have traversed every corner of Alaska, engaging with communities, explaining the complexities of RCV, and illuminating the benefits of a more direct voting system. This grassroots campaign has not only expanded our network but has also significantly raised awareness about the issues surrounding RCV.As we stand on the brink of this historic opportunity, we extend our heartfelt gratitude to everyone who has contributed to this cause. Your support has been the backbone of our campaign, providing us with the resources, energy, and motivation needed to confront and dismantle the RCV system in Alaska.The early news release confirming our achievement marks not just a milestone for our movement but also a beacon of hope for those who believe in electoral reform. This is our chance to fundamentally transform Alaska's electoral landscape, ensuring a voting system that is straightforward, understandable, and truly reflective of the people's will.Let's seize this moment and make history together. The ballot is our battleground, and with your continued support, we will achieve our goal of ridding Alaska of Ranked Choice Voting. The fight is far from over, but with our collective strength, determination, and the foundation we've built over the past year, victory is within our reach. Thank you, Alaska, for standing with us.Together, we will restore simplicity and clarity to our elections, ensuring a future where every vote counts in the most straightforward manner possible. Let's move forward, united in our purpose and resolute in our mission to eliminate Ranked Choice Voting. The time for change is now, and with your help, we will make it a reality. Press Release FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASEAlaska Volunteers Triumph: Nearly 43,000 Signatures to Overturn Ranked Choice Voting Anchorage, Alaska– In a resounding demonstration of democratic engagement, a grassroots movement led by over 700 Alaskan volunteers has successfully gathered nearly 43,000 signatures, significantly exceeding the required 26,000, to propose the removal of Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska. This monumental effort was completed a full month ahead of schedule, showcasing the determination and unity of Alaskans."This is not just a collection of signatures, but a profound statement by the people of Alaska," said Phil Izon, a lead organizer of the initiative. "Our volunteers, all Alaskans, have voiced their concerns and desires through this campaign. We've surpassed the number of signatures the Pro-RCV group initially gathered to introduce RCV, underlining a growing skepticism and desire for change among the electorate."The movement has been a true grassroots effort, contrasting sharply with the Pro-RCV group, which reportedly spent over $7 million and relied on out-of-state resources to promote and push RCV on Alaska. "Our success was driven by Alaskans, for Alaskans. We did not need to fly in people or spend millions. Our strength came from the genuine support and hard work of our volunteers," Izon added.This initiative represents a significant challenge to RCV, a system that has been increasingly scrutinized for its complexity and the perception that it obscures the straightforward principle of "one person, one vote." The organizers believe that this successful petition drive will resonate beyond Alaska, setting a precedent for other states considering RCV, we are a cautionary tale (Like a canary in coal mine, warning others about danger)."We stand for the Alaskans who felt misled, for those who found the RCV ballot confusing, and for everyone who believes in the sanctity of the straightforward voting process," said Izon. "Our message is clear: it's time to remove Ranked Choice Voting from our state. 'Let's Take Out The Trash, Let’s Rid The Rank' is more than a slogan; it's a call to action for all Alaskans who value transparency and simplicity in their electoral system."The submitted signatures will now undergo verification by state officials. When validated, this will pave the way for a ballot measure where Alaskans can directly vote on the future of RCV in their state."We did this for you, for every Alaskan who wants their vote to count in the most direct and understandable way. We urge all Alaskans to stand with us and vote to remove Rank Choice Voting. Together, we can ensure our electoral system reflects the true will of the people," concluded Izon. | The Tale of the Ranked Choice Voting Dragon Let's do some digging on the Pro-RCV group here in Alaska. Disclaimer from their most recent newsletter. The Pro-RCV group appears to be the “Dark Money” they were so worried about, Arabella Advisors and 1630 Fund are about as “Dark Money” as “Dark Money” gets. Their new Incorporation is their top donor. Then "Article Four from Virginia" Then "1630 Fund in Washington D.C." | Please Share with Friends, Family, and Co-Workers! tel:+19078028116 mailto:info@alaskansforhonestgovernment.org?subject=Newsletter | | This Communication Was Paid For By Alaskans For Honest Elections, 2521 E Mtn Village Dr #904 Wasilla, AK 99654 Phillip Izon, Director Approved This Message. The Top 3 Contributors Are Phillip Izon, Wasilla, AK, Ranked Choice Education Association, Anchorage, AK, ; And Carolyn Overstreet, Anchorage, AK | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- Alaskans For Honest Elections 2521 E. Mtn Village Dr Ste B #904 Wasilla, AK USA

name: Jennifer Garcia, Finance Director
subject: Crunching the numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon

I wanted to reach out to give you a quick update on our progress for the month. **[If you don’t have time to read this email, will you chip in $10 now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83027841/467056136/-554069173?refcode=em_fr_2024.04.14_b1_jgfd_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmIwZDIyYi1hNmZhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GymZnAPWVZIsX7MCfASh4PsYgYlVNoc0DXCq6sc3ERA=)** As finance director, my job is to ensure our campaign has the resources we need to re-elect Andrea to Congress and keep OR-06 blue. That means carefully monitoring our budget to make sure we can invest in TV ads, on-the-ground organizers, yard signs, and more when it really matters. Well, this month, we’ve gotten off to a slow start. **[Our April mid-month deadline is just a few days away, and we’re running $2,000 short of where we need to be. \- Soon after Debbie Mucarsel-Powell launched her campaign to defeat Rick Scott in Florida, polling showed her just 1 POINT behind Sen. Scott in a race that could make or break control of the Senate for Democrats.

\- Now, after traveling Florida and speaking to voters, polling has Debbie UP 4 POINTS over Rick Scott.

_\- Democrats' momentum in Florida began SURGING overnight. _

-**This race is too important to ignore: Democrats MUST flip a red seat blue to keep the Senate — and Florida is their best chance.**

Team Gillibrand
|

* * *

clean_body: will you add your name? | | | Hi, friend! As a reliable Democrat in 43614, we’re personally asking you to endorse Sen. Gillibrand’s must-win reelection campaign. Look, Kirsten Gillibrand is fighting tirelessly in the Senate to defend women’s rights, lower the cost of living for families and protect vital programs like Social Security and Medicare. But the GOP still has a clear path to retaking the Senate in 2024, and New York Republicans are going after Kirsten’s seat like never before. That’s why we need 20,000 grassroots supporters to endorse Kirsten’s campaign by midnight tonight. | | Thank you for standing with us, Team Gillibrand | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Team WFP
subject: Been busy? No worries! Your WFP newsletter is here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, Been busy? No worries! Your WFP newsletter is here to get you up to date on what you might have missed in our movement this month. Keep reading for updates from the State of the Union to cultural organizing to a major win for our democracy and more.
* * *
**_The Working Families Party 2024 State of the Union Response_** WFP champion and Philadelphia City Councilmember Nicolas O’Rourke delivered our 2024 State of the Union Response last month. Nic’s speech helped us make meaning of what is happening right now in U.S. politics, laid out our vision for the nation we’re trying to build together, and shared our political strategy for 2024, including how we can block MAGA extremists and build working-class power nationwide. [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMYd6eLP33O2GRZpvuK-wGuR-H2EZV1A7LdNKYpDLmdYXR3bHYrlxCoXwl4rL-TwaJYyZm-K8P_ZUM5LwKVK__nvJXOrykV3uBuc8EZk3EZxpSu1YiWectfLEGhJ-86E4QXlmBWKD42SnVt1q20CDRuzREqPV-H9n_bI7n85FakiJZ_vLX7XQLktQxaOb9PJS_hGA2sEwj6GFL05EVZMSNigMWVxmCYDRylntewsTIqgwrgndKLt_Hr8L72ZuiOphtJAD8bLDU0rkzVWJPqkzR-q08OUHlua1YYwRTlQ3pGhvlQ9xM3Smhb0MIWWYztgLkA/45i/zq7V4aqjR4q-A2Su2MeGbg/h0/h001.-uTEWt0QNO1KXdXCy9P7q5JpLGgHPfLBss85lHRcXu8)
> “We all face obstacles. Wages that aren’t keeping up with rising costs, and a political system built for your boss instead of for you. The wealthy are few, but they are powerful. Because, they pit us against each other along traditional lines of race and nationality. They convince us we’re in a battle — a battle with other people, who are trying to make a living, just like you and I. They hoard the resources for themselves and then they buy politicians to protect what they’ve extracted from us. I got into organizing and politics because it doesn’t have to be that way. I believe we can do better. We have a **moral** obligation to do better. And, we do that by building governing power for working people.”
**[Click here to watch the full speech in English, Spanish, or with ASL interpretation, or read Nic’s remarks here.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMYd6eLP33O2GRZpvuK-wGuR-H2EZV1A7LdNKYpDLmdYXR3bHYrlxCoXwl4rL-TwaJYyZm-K8P_ZUM5LwKVK__nvJXOrykV3uBuc8EZk3EZxpSu1YiWectfLEGhJ-86E4QeWL2XgVUx6aB7US7G29kisS2OFO7JtvgvkYVhSRu6TaBBwzpYPLCg7-vSS7Vubd3zay7Hu6z6T2MQJ5q69AATqNMd13UIIoBkf84QlgtCeATiY1zg3b8dSHZ9pUzSE0xtQxSpmq9I0FPJttg8vzK30kevShrvqv4z5TT6VIxiUxho_OuB50Ijl5upYsuOCMtA/45i/zq7V4aqjR4q-A2Su2MeGbg/h1/h001.6Q7WF2SD9UDX5qVeZnYZfKce_ZlIgPJc26mdWMQn4T8)**
* * *
**_LAUNCHING: The Reject AIPAC coalition_** **The Working Families Party and more than 20 other progressive groups and allies have created the Reject AIPAC coalition,** to demand that Democratic elected officials and candidates reject the right-wing American Israel Public Affairs Committee and their Republican megadonors once and for all. **[Watch the coalition’s new ad with Wallace Shawn to learn more:](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9t5dOJcVbpq4kCZX05sqZiO7kGlZvGXmG2mzoR8oFjFswNLMHKp1XXTTc_MGrkIk6fyInBHjhJjpwcj9uSY-43JviAauJL-6GXdvS0wSp0vFvKXLgpVb9WXnNWheW0icJn_BcDsNbya1OmG4DWxVbIJbN1Sj3SlBs8Bf7wmQJo0TGyTNJysbknIEwZXnk6tZuFqFP3lHsBrTLgoEluPOzb-PtjriyIGp0lZLFgxpcsZjTurHuXDOXO0DYyJvnt2C_Crkvk97I7hqyUfosszBt07W5fhKQk4fQWvSRD90Oyo4ioj6CPnWAnoYjCakV0zb_YNpFtV3ruzyFJV92LlMXlnVRlbM767F2SL9ewU-ln_eIx-acr9fMP6nNAR5rly_j/45i/zq7V4aqjR4q-A2Su2MeGbg/h2/h001.4HcBC67-5EPw3MnDnMcKruanlMzIx3gVqnkUDm8tX2k)** [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9t5dOJcVbpq4kCZX05sqZiO7kGlZvGXmG2mzoR8oFjFswNLMHKp1XXTTc_MGrkIk6nPEGTFbITqQU7U84uQMQCbycym1cH5nGnjBm4RucfzCoJeT6aWNa-LswA4gISIUGsIsdEp7msjge5_3afAKm8KgivMabDtdjf7R7PybHD-BNXkpz2mWv76AUd8boiBNK50ezrDmrk6i25wGjfSVnMZTz8Fvt4pwUV9iax-M67Yy55aQ7MQKqgK-aXe-S2CaftvEOMlhF4QoZM1HYxrjjzHYReBzLPNV0ES1wijvYk1M1ip9qpL04uVG8vA3sSEnF5Rx2MBFDz4aqhWFZ9r5Oo5ao5AoCY0_db66ymDa8KYedHFnKi0osNNnF2CmkuZQA/45i/zq7V4aqjR4q-A2Su2MeGbg/h3/h001.TgPhYjFflgPEzxvMivKVvbnGAK-dS-5O7CfPUTmRgzY) For years, AIPAC has supported extremist MAGA Republicans, including those who tried to overturn the 2020 election. Now, they plan to spend at least $100 million in Democratic primaries to punish and unseat progressive champions who support a ceasefire to save lives in Gaza. Our WFP allies in Congress are their top targets. **[To help our coalition fight back against AIPAC and defeat their Republican-funded candidates in Democratic primaries, pitch in now.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9t5dOJcVbpq4kCZX05sqZiO7kGlZvGXmG2mzoR8oFjFswNLMHKp1XXTTc_MGrkIk605jXs4lU5AAKx3zB8FryONHkpqtO_DDKISRoHlOZmsKmTDCMhBcFBBdxGmMA48_6Er4W8ZuCRryjUf-t4goEWzO8znkqYeXB9mCU8kZK5dA7UkDslsj1mKv8Q4ffnTsh3yYXhNvn6V3eJYGCPz670QVRAD7uDKqUR5EiVeWFxLvoZdZWimCfNB0dNndhafA0toSJgrsl-2zjnH1VaV1XGlv2tUji0LWZdH8ZKv9tT_CtIVq0ry5q1pp1n-1rtQlCpWDj3BgQXNTsh9erd2dEf9a6Z0gnO_oa0XMANrSsE2ktursQ0sA6TjCaf73tfXoN/45i/zq7V4aqjR4q-A2Su2MeGbg/h4/h001.ue7-Mlr9y9-4hfy3Ib3q3pdNrZjmYMkYre9z-WLJzBQ)**
* * *
**_WFP’s Politics House makes Rolling Stone’s “Best of SXSW” list_** WFP showed up and showed out at the South By Southwest (SXSW) festival, hosting The Politics House and making **[_Rolling Stone’s_ “best of” list for the second year in a row!](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMe2DDuSXMSVR6-yo9jnkdfXwWfurFhez76g5tKJnawtqyM5J3vkJGItA-nE0i9KPbVIFSnDs3x6tMb3grZIZLB3IQ4ilZErpsiyC9d2oIhI--EAbvESRBA6fKU7a1MyVmOAR6Kz_dAbY3BkwBp-aDF6k5t7MmFhl_UMHCNM9jHPCJsL8la3UhTXjVFhjKAZBEm3q2qKR-gWgaxSXPpGE8____c4mPvLBG7aTl3lCKJHteJaN2PCVMPAO9EsgHbj755p4Id4tiTT6eMo5HZgI6Uxa34sAjK20rcnHW1Kt3XKJfp3vMhtj8pHyhQNgteY0eqj6-LZ5ZE1AQu9njKbFyhzaOOO5TkgKMUL-lyycA69_7Xv5GPfW-kJX5pmeoeeqttO14huWcvSDmjgnJX2xsnTd4x9P3_T2V-FALYBNWn77/45i/zq7V4aqjR4q-A2Su2MeGbg/h5/h001.Y6IuRWn0jwm0p-Gk_tKMjuODKsiXPHvA2YLU02-JuIA)** We joined artists and activists to discuss some of the most pressing issues of our time — including Israel’s bombing campaign in Gaza and the 2024 presidential election — and celebrated the community and movement that we’re building together. **During the event, WFP National Director Maurice Mitchell joined a live episode of the Toure Show podcast with other special guests.[Listen to what they had to say about the future of our country here.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.s333gSbyhQmXsyCO3lhAD_wPGYpZmzFh1BtkTTXl-C6d66x7_Vpo2crxi5FS1U4N5b3D6LMCs-gSTTk9IPKQa6yiVFSKJFPB9FX7gVvFfPTDDfH4iRpGSU_Y3P80JplWUCtIH5cXrULng-dMYlhxz_1NyJE9P1wEh3lTxaMQffizml_c-TZG7O1nbVXtDc35DWwZrD5QewPACH3pMUnMoANYOlgL1TlBezxhPZVSZbTbY5NtTVMTBtRfoY85WbDYN2o0d7_aJz2FTRLuTqOz3-uFLAqNVswlh9Jq06T5DKbJ2HwS7ToDE2QbCFE9B3k9Zt6vGkamwO6Yu3OdMDCuYWLTgu_OafVIdHCKdYuPlqdwr9LV1l-OsUwqZXvsvpLC81um3OAfdexu6DzFIeYJeQ/45i/zq7V4aqjR4q-A2Su2MeGbg/h6/h001.GaQdNL8u10p4zDyVi7S_l-nZY7rwEGuusTI4WL8BJnQ)**
* * *
**_A historic lawsuit ends a corrupt NJ political system_** **In a massive win for democracy, a federal judge struck down New Jersey’s unique ballot line system that has long given the state’s political elite the power to hand-pick primary winners.** Unlike the rest of the country, New Jersey’s primary ballots have been designed to feature county party-endorsed candidates in one column and place their less-preferred candidates far off to the side, significantly hurting their chances at the polls. The New Jersey Working Families Party has been fighting this system for years and filed a lawsuit against the practice in 2020. [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMdUS12fSrk6MMZIR1Ut2K6dhOMnCq2tfFH2xoJMF0zVqirNFM26VciDg4WqOEY-tBjhIeG6GEnNI-RDWLFmmuVXSUqPMDV66HDpA3k_unhLuxEYV-U88m5OS-hbVBjNSWWr15hHDlO0AdfGc69BapZ6pY6sDxPYEiVCV7a6dy0loR1IO-EHgT5ULVBbiAP-eUxPvMj0jIbAhT7GsA0pTnfBcG9fL4qWdrmPqWGB2SJImZxPpPEZs6j5g7IzsnPprwT9VGxnzmxUeCd9Ry3kX2O526jYci5lnxWy2Bgg8hpKZYznOTwCd6qXI_yzEeKY2HuAuARwuq8l8dcMQQMfbrcBo4UWGo35ftcFF5pUvd9UWqtRcDrDRXjZ-bp0ltBRPGeLSW1PtOzitIvQzlyrpcIT9Ghtc6xia4hQgXfUYeED3/45i/zq7V4aqjR4q-A2Su2MeGbg/h7/h001.6bDVgUqg__p5GIASo2OG7NTbLG4fy0_E_3ze1me6LFY) _Check out NJWFP State Director Antoinette Miles front-and-center in the New York Times!_ Now, a federal judge has ruled in a separate lawsuit to end the system and force New Jersey election officials to use the same system as the rest of the country — listing primary candidates for the same race in a single list in randomized order, giving every candidate a fair shot. **[NJWFP State Director Antoinette Miles told CNN:](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMTHpY68KeBL-tuPFtNUwAZToL5f_SgjAqZGJOQ_In8H_ymWSL8KDu66MCdCr0vgYjDBF_cPHLSg215Ni7hByOspro9pJ5FaR_k5XfKuRdIYFDXupRF5Dw-IKLilbSwp0gR21Yh-iGvd5ipuTCZT-h_xbZrI9VRLeA35GSi-jEyfBfHy1KpWmzOjncsOv36SEGkhk6XLr6vz3h57d6TABFDeqmeRVeDy8m5ZxE8qnuHFuVkRA6aaYYmk-ke5Q-pA4hHhWpVedbqOSbqsaJAGJlji4Bsm-5DdKDUuvODMtMPbb5TKtac_SS4vkhoBfwJ0bkZcWM4gnuKZRGTdBK5tZAE4KE3zDRWiNe1IrfZsU8RyOJlNI7BfUPhcmXK_O-mdUzQ/45i/zq7V4aqjR4q-A2Su2MeGbg/h8/h001.pUVa2NMeTZCg0qNMmQOoLEYfUWi8kaja8wzXD2bcrMQ)** “County party bosses and clerks will no longer be able to unconstitutionally design ballots meant to elect favored candidates and party insiders... Candidates will now be answerable to voters at the ballot box — not corporate special interests who control the awarding of the line.”
* * *
**_Election results in Wisconsin and New York_** Voters went to the polls in Wisconsin and New York earlier this month, and we’re so proud of what we accomplished. **Volunteers sent over 200,000 texts and made over 20,000 calls** on behalf of our Wisconsin endorsed candidates and ballot referendums. More than half of our candidates won, flipping both the Fitchburg and Green Bay City Councils! We also passed a referendum funding Milwaukee schools to invest in our future. New York held its Democratic presidential primary election, and the NYWFP encouraged voters to submit a blank ballot to show their support for an immediate ceasefire in Gaza, the safe return of hostages, and emergency humanitarian aid to those facing starvation. **Nearly 40,000 New Yorkers went to the polls to do so, showing the strength of the movement for peace in Gaza.** **[Read the op-ed in the _NY Daily News_ from our NYWFP co-directors for more info on why we supported the “leave it blank” campaign:](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMTREUThKn5BAcIZJSgTOYVDP81uGqnRkEAb8pJb2SrswFyPCF3VlcgguWAyBCvrn_p-URyEVmbfRD_8xFR3hyHHQkftpllvZZJyoHW1egDqC2vq17l6Kw3oLfzK_0PDLYNbFZKoQhlUDVUBpBuED09h1CHaHxFQDwd60ZzxIujhwOY1JUWLd_A4TCH7A8iBLNIc8d6qtMJNgWjtfLSpa6sJBpZ3Zt2F811wl8TXFgE3b1D-_OpRUrnfxmGqFy4peY3jpT-YgCFCZ-mES41j8s6UiBKDy7BbhW2_07RGwwStfvTapfpys34pWHFlq6ZXexI7t1v8CsqykFQgGHr4LPM0EgCkKhBJbsVtQChvtmE0Y/45i/zq7V4aqjR4q-A2Su2MeGbg/h9/h001.f4IszXwzSGlH_E5xXFGEcAi9tFrahhC_H5B4B-2aRF8)**
> “In an election year when our democracy is on the line, we must resist despair and hopelessness and instead lean into the opportunities that our democracy offers. Voters in New York can follow the example of hundreds of thousands of voters in states like Michigan, Minnesota, Washington, and Massachusetts who have used “uncommitted votes” as a tactic to pressure the president to correct course... To borrow some wisdom from Working Families Party National Director Maurice Mitchell, the successful uncommitted campaigns around the country have been “a gift for Joe Biden.” That is, if the president is willing to heed their message. With seven months to go until the election, Biden has the opportunity to lay out a morally grounded vision for the country that restores voters’ faith in his leadership and unifies his coalition.”
[**WFP Director Maurice Mitchell also spoke with the _New York Times_ about how the ceasefire movement has grown:**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMdUS12fSrk6MMZIR1Ut2K6faOLXmEtn_lJRViiNpvvVMm4Z_pi_bIOlpkj1i_79V7pZqQzuFRpbF3Uwu5dRGpsM4tC1j-gq_wtgEBk8oby5kdIoAwDxsy6j-N-4rNLlqWnkscj5TqZhxvEjSv4dAPWFdKDnrcubYustpfpRW0-HTmY5HFPlEgHaPPynGVIm4DjJFcZmvxtPY6Y3XXkjePCRdtcKDQ6SVt-7F2DiCs7W2ppIyv3ZLDp6aB3vRnvn7yuk935iCt1o6LhCWDdg1Bm3LNzorG54koQGtySY35CVM8vgq4Ud7SFEkYVss7MRgNyzESQN2ssEIN4QaZTf6tlFVU5BlI-lcOHfCoDSlCccGPFsVWC3nM2AP6a9PCCdD9A/45i/zq7V4aqjR4q-A2Su2MeGbg/h10/h001.tJPP2JsbbuiBp-i7L6x9YZKrbdXNdGglH9EpBvd4N08)
> “Maybe there was an idea that over time, the movement would lose steam, or it was just like a campus thing or it was like a far-left sort of protest movement... The opposite is happening as the humanitarian toll becomes so clear.”
* * *
**_Activist spotlight on Ebony Hollingsworth_** My name is Ebony Hollingsworth. I've been an organizer for 8 years. I found a political home within WFP about 3 1/2 years ago. It's amazing to be a part of a party that is truly for the working people. Through the National Team I've had the opportunity to connect to voters in states I've never been to. Also to be a part of the history that was made in Pennsylvania. It has been a passion of mine to educate individuals on the importance of local elections. The Bronx Chapter of WFP has given me the opportunity to do just that locally. As the Outreach Chair for The Bronx Chapter, I've gotten to actively be involved in the process. Endorsement interviews, rallies, R.A.C. meetings, petitioning, and more. I'm truly grateful for the experiences I've had as part of WFP.
* * *
**_Upcoming Events_** **[Tuesday Text Party](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdJxZAP5xLg1YZaKIinIFmIxcBCfqYmMpMjJTS66Isd8x-XQ-Drpz_5aGyj7Nl0LZtg7gpze6O3w45fRLMxUfiKzGXtrZUENeMgaacRQlB_0m9pK5rBhLvVwHVnv8umE9JZ9lNxNAkbNyCbBG5vyne0mVyt7O2WfimxpS1TO_9MRFe_X198H9pQN62alsTcLDAGGSs4w6hl1Cm7MPqsibcky3oRhYjaIGkksczB3FjkM11I29EVCu721PSVvMqUUMG6vL9SR2FNVh4rUgYROG8AY/45i/zq7V4aqjR4q-A2Su2MeGbg/h11/h001.ys-p7zXTY6hXqy0wb4DGVvVkyJ8jZxigNSiN2ArPsuQ)** Help support our candidates at a WFP virtual text party this Tuesday, April 16 at 6 PM ET/3 PM PT! Our organizers and volunteer leaders will support you as you use our easy program to text voters on behalf of WFP champions across the country. clean_body: | | | Peter, Been busy? No worries! Your WFP newsletter is here to get you up to date on what you might have missed in our movement this month. Keep reading for updates from the State of the Union to cultural organizing to a major win for our democracy and more. The Working Families Party 2024 State of the Union Response WFP champion and Philadelphia City Councilmember Nicolas O’Rourke delivered our 2024 State of the Union Response last month. Nic’s speech helped us make meaning of what is happening right now in U.S. politics, laid out our vision for the nation we’re trying to build together, and shared our political strategy for 2024, including how we can block MAGA extremists and build working-class power nationwide. “We all face obstacles. Wages that aren’t keeping up with rising costs, and a political system built for your boss instead of for you. The wealthy are few, but they are powerful. Because, they pit us against each other along traditional lines of race and nationality. They convince us we’re in a battle — a battle with other people, who are trying to make a living, just like you and I. They hoard the resources for themselves and then they buy politicians to protect what they’ve extracted from us. I got into organizing and politics because it doesn’t have to be that way. I believe we can do better. We have a moral obligation to do better. And, we do that by building governing power for working people.” LAUNCHING: The Reject AIPAC coalition The Working Families Party and more than 20 other progressive groups and allies have created the Reject AIPAC coalition, to demand that Democratic elected officials and candidates reject the right-wing American Israel Public Affairs Committee and their Republican megadonors once and for all. For years, AIPAC has supported extremist MAGA Republicans, including those who tried to overturn the 2020 election. Now, they plan to spend at least $100 million in Democratic primaries to punish and unseat progressive champions who support a ceasefire to save lives in Gaza. Our WFP allies in Congress are their top targets. WFP’s Politics House makes Rolling Stone’s “Best of SXSW” list WFP showed up and showed out at the South By Southwest (SXSW) festival, hosting The Politics House and making We joined artists and activists to discuss some of the most pressing issues of our time — including Israel’s bombing campaign in Gaza and the 2024 presidential election — and celebrated the community and movement that we’re building together. During the event, WFP National Director Maurice Mitchell joined a live episode of the Toure Show podcast with other special guests. A historic lawsuit ends a corrupt NJ political system In a massive win for democracy, a federal judge struck down New Jersey’s unique ballot line system that has long given the state’s political elite the power to hand-pick primary winners. Unlike the rest of the country, New Jersey’s primary ballots have been designed to feature county party-endorsed candidates in one column and place their less-preferred candidates far off to the side, significantly hurting their chances at the polls. The New Jersey Working Families Party has been fighting this system for years and filed a lawsuit against the practice in 2020. Check out NJWFP State Director Antoinette Miles front-and-center in the New York Times! Now, a federal judge has ruled in a separate lawsuit to end the system and force New Jersey election officials to use the same system as the rest of the country — listing primary candidates for the same race in a single list in randomized order, giving every candidate a fair shot. “County party bosses and clerks will no longer be able to unconstitutionally design ballots meant to elect favored candidates and party insiders... Candidates will now be answerable to voters at the ballot box — not corporate special interests who control the awarding of the line.” Election results in Wisconsin and New York Voters went to the polls in Wisconsin and New York earlier this month, and we’re so proud of what we accomplished. Volunteers sent over 200,000 texts and made over 20,000 calls on behalf of our Wisconsin endorsed candidates and ballot referendums. More than half of our candidates won, flipping both the Fitchburg and Green Bay City Councils! We also passed a referendum funding Milwaukee schools to invest in our future. New York held its Democratic presidential primary election, and the NYWFP encouraged voters to submit a blank ballot to show their support for an immediate ceasefire in Gaza, the safe return of hostages, and emergency humanitarian aid to those facing starvation. Nearly 40,000 New Yorkers went to the polls to do so, showing the strength of the movement for peace in Gaza. “In an election year when our democracy is on the line, we must resist despair and hopelessness and instead lean into the opportunities that our democracy offers. Voters in New York can follow the example of hundreds of thousands of voters in states like Michigan, Minnesota, Washington, and Massachusetts who have used “uncommitted votes” as a tactic to pressure the president to correct course... To borrow some wisdom from Working Families Party National Director Maurice Mitchell, the successful uncommitted campaigns around the country have been “a gift for Joe Biden.” That is, if the president is willing to heed their message. With seven months to go until the election, Biden has the opportunity to lay out a morally grounded vision for the country that restores voters’ faith in his leadership and unifies his coalition.” “Maybe there was an idea that over time, the movement would lose steam, or it was just like a campus thing or it was like a far-left sort of protest movement... The opposite is happening as the humanitarian toll becomes so clear.” Activist spotlight on Ebony Hollingsworth My name is Ebony Hollingsworth. I've been an organizer for 8 years. I found a political home within WFP about 3 1/2 years ago. It's amazing to be a part of a party that is truly for the working people. Through the National Team I've had the opportunity to connect to voters in states I've never been to. Also to be a part of the history that was made in Pennsylvania. It has been a passion of mine to educate individuals on the importance of local elections. The Bronx Chapter of WFP has given me the opportunity to do just that locally. As the Outreach Chair for The Bronx Chapter, I've gotten to actively be involved in the process. Endorsement interviews, rallies, R.A.C. meetings, petitioning, and more. I'm truly grateful for the experiences I've had as part of WFP. Upcoming Events Help support our candidates at a WFP virtual text party this Tuesday, April 16 at 6 PM ET/3 PM PT! Our organizers and volunteer leaders will support you as you use our easy program to text voters on behalf of WFP champions across the country. This month, we’ll be texting for Mike Schmidt for Multnomah County DA in Oregon, and our congressional Squad members! Next Thursday, April 18 at 7 PM ET/4 PM PT, join us for our monthly Welcome Gathering! These monthly calls are your opportunity — whether you’re new to the WFP or a long-time supporter — to hear directly from our staff and activists on the country and the party we’re building together. Our community reunions are a chance to deep dive into the work that we’re doing and the issues that our movement is tackling. Next month, on Wednesday, May 18 at 8 PM ET/5 PM PT, we’ll be discussing the very real rise in antisemitism, as well as how it gets instrumentalized by the right to drive a wedge in our movements, repress movements for justice in Palestine, and impact our elections. Thank you for reading, Peter! In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

subject: Democrats are divided. We need to know where you stand, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC

name: GallegoForArizona.com
subject: Don’t wait for the perfect time.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
This is a critical moment — one where we can demonstrate the clear choice between Ruben Gallego and Kari Lake.
#

Peter — we’ve got Kari Lake on defense.
For years the far-right fantasized about extreme abortion bans.
Under Trump, they got what they wanted. _Roe v. Wade_ was struck down.
But now that Arizona is under **one of the most extreme abortion bans in the entire country,** they’re changing their whole outlook.
Trump is saying they’ve gone “too far” and Kari Lake is all of the sudden claiming to be a champion for choice – railing against the same ban she praised in no uncertain terms in her last campaign.
They'll say anything to get elected.
The worst part is, they’ll get people to believe them. The people most responsible for these bans, for endangering the lives of women, for taking away the rights that generations were born with... they’ll get some people to believe that this isn’t their fault.
But not if we stop them. This is a critical moment — one where we can demonstrate the clear choice between Ruben Gallego and Kari Lake.
We can’t afford to wait for a better opportunity to take the fight to Kari Lake.
So please, if you have been waiting for the best possible moment to make your first donation, this is it:
[**Make a donation to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for U.S Senate in Arizona. Chip in $3 or whatever you can afford.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr24.p6MMmT&refcode=em240414-2-120&t=1&akid=2204%2E734936%2EAKo84x)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

name: Congressman Gaetz
subject: Stand with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz
body:
America is the greatest country that has ever existed. Let us all endeavor to keep it that way.

|
---
Fellow American,

When you hired me eight years ago, I made a promise to you. I promised to put America FIRST and never apologize for American progress. We will never cave to the cancel culture.

[**With your help, we have never been closer to draining the swamp and defeating the Radical Left for being the monsters that they are.**](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f173001799e743748cad78fb9004b47b&_e=Y5YbSg1VhBzTv4-Wm-NnliJE7-A1F2zHOQTQ-C3zPFscMNjTafKrWZrAlthRwDe2dQ-HVhWfZuYXanPXUvQ_a5I9ogIEyTQlCgaPhEmq8OTbv1zwNzcjlfOeseQxyuZtPFlQV3VaIUYlduVJ0Zh-vcL_JPdsvR5G3cqJm9UYXUrxizXhZ1fbrlatklANg6ToJne6ncA7yQAjVdOTEWVWq7XAJsOAB7Za3ucKOnoNsLaIHsX7lTthXmfjGuU7PsfyFOmqnlODDkdTF6Ix08HKUiBxRMv4pyuPvOFlOYDGiipSYKQQ4RARR8wnp4VkQ8MACV_C7kQOWRmXfONO01ObUkOIpEW1QIF3t_iFGTMiQgm_kaIJwMyOOKZbgszyvayZ)
| [ **STAND WITH MATT GAETZ** ](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f173001799e743748cad78fb9004b47b&_e=Y5YbSg1VhBzTv4-Wm-NnliJE7-A1F2zHOQTQ-C3zPFscMNjTafKrWZrAlthRwDe2dQ-HVhWfZuYXanPXUvQ_a5I9ogIEyTQlCgaPhEmq8OTbv1zwNzcjlfOeseQxyuZtPFlQV3VaIUYlduVJ0Zh-vcL_JPdsvR5G3cqJm9UYXUrxizXhZ1fbrlatklANg6ToJne6ncA7yQAjVdOTEWVWq7XAJsOAB7Za3ucKOnoNsLZ-iYyGV6R9xw7Ljvu9u9o7r4Wgl1B73sr3zNABhUAi4X58lLducwvzmHwT8PVAUBGNjJZFcgjpxPiQtgNKZ8km3GzwIS0iCdDStxZ7KTFMLJ2fGzvroMg5Hru4OYqwdiVM0638Z_UHzh1NlREvnOBr)
---

We do it not for personal gain but because we love the United States of America. We believe in what this nation was built on and the principles that make it great.

**_This is why 2024 is so important. It is our final chance to save America from the disastrous liberal policies. If they continue to lead the charge, our borders will remain wide open, inflation will continue to skyrocket, our communities will not be safe, our economy will crash, and America Last will be the motto._**

name: Padora HQ
subject: yesterday’s email

body:
We wanted to bump this email from yesterday. We need to raise another $10,000 by Tuesday night in order to have the resources we need to run ads all the way through the June 25th primary.
__ | | | Folks, We wanted to bump this email from yesterday. **We need to raise another $10,000 by Tuesday night in order to have the resources we need to run ads all the way through the June 25th primary.** We got off to a great start yesterday and raised over $2,000 in the first 24 hours. RFK Jr.’s vision restores the American Dream.

Dear Peter,
The headline said it all:
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=housing_4_14_24_nd1&n=3)
Biden’s response comes, no doubt, on the heels of RFK Jr.’s simple plan to make housing affordable for first-time homebuyers.
RFK Jr.’s plan: Tax-free 3% government-backed mortgage bonds.
_3% tax-free loans_. Straight up, simple. Transformative.
RFK Jr.’s vision restores the American Dream by helping millions of young people secure home ownership–private property–for the very first time.
The Biden plan “smacks of pure politics.”
And it clearly highlights the inadequacy of his plan in addressing the soaring costs of housing.
All in all–Biden’s housing plan–like so much of this Administration–hangs the Working and Middle Class out to dry–as it is, as the article noted, purely political.
Biden’s priorities don’t match the priorities of the Working and Middle Class. They are fed up with the US-led proxy war against Russia. This undeclared war in the Ukraine is hemorrhaging billions of dollars and it hurts the Middle and Working Class citizens the most–and they know this!
The verdict is in: Joe Biden’s High Interest, High Inflation economy has pushed nearly 50% of Americans toward insolvency, where today only 4 in 10 Americans have enough savings to cover an unplanned expense of $1,000.
Under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – America’s Working and Middle Class are being _left behind_.
Under President Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. – America’s Working and Middle Class will be __lifted up!__
As you can see, RFK Jr.'s campaign is already having a huge impact.
His courageous housing policy is putting pressure on the Biden Administration to come to its senses.
Can you imagine how much more he will be able to accomplish when he is actually President?
[Your gift of $100, $200, $500 or more will put RFK Jr. on the ballot and into the White House!](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=housing_4_14_24_nd1&n=4)

name: Flemming Larsen
subject: Campaign Updates for April 12
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Flemming Larsen
body:
| | | |
---

**Campaign Updates for April 12, 2024**
Team Larsen has had a busy couple of weeks! Flemming received a new endorsement, launched his coffee tour, and met with voters in Nevada's First Congressional District. Read on to learn where to meet Flemming next!
|
---
**Flemming Launched "Coffee with Candidates" Tour on April 4th**

| This month, Flemming launched his "Coffee with Candidates" tour: "I am thrilled to announce my third Coffee with Candidates tour," said Flemming. "Dive into meaningful conversations with myself and other passionate elected leaders and candidates over a cup of coffee. This is your chance to connect, ask questions, and truly engage with those shaping our state and country. Don't miss out--let's make change over coffee!"
---

|
---
**Flemming 's Coffee Tour is Flourishing!**

On Thursday, Flemming completed the first stop on his coffee tour: "This morning's Coffee with the Candidates was a success, marking the first of many in the next few weeks," said Flemming. "Thank you to everyone who joined us. The support and conversations were truly enriching. And it doesn't stop here - tonight's Henderseron Chamber of Commerce mixers brought even more new faces and supporters to our growing campaign family. Together, we're creating a strong community ready for positive change!"
|
---
**Support Flemming at the "Meet the Candidates" Townhall**

On April 16th, Flemming will speak at the "Meet the Candidates" townhall! Ask Flemming questions, share your concerns, and learn how to get involved.
|
---
**Flemming Attends the Joe Brown Luncheon**

On Wednesday, Flemming attended the Joe Brown Luncheon: "Just wrapped up another successful Joe Brown luncheon," said Flemming. "It's always inspiring to meet new voters and supporters who are backing my congressional race. Today was extra special, as we had the chance to dive into the legendary history of the Las Vegas showgirls with the guest speaker. Their stories are a fascinating slice of entertainment history and a reminder of the rich cultural tapestry that makes Vegas unique."
|
---
**Flemming Attends Nevada Republican Club Luncheon**

On Tuesday, Flemming Larsen attended a Republican luncheon: "Just wrapped up another wonderful luncheon," said Flemming. "It's always so energizing to meet new voters and supporters who are as excited about our congressional campaign as I am. Together, we're making a difference!"
|
---
**Flemming Participates in a Henderson Police Ride-Along**

Last Saturday, Flemming attended a ride-along with the Henderson Police Department: "Huge shout out to the Henderson Police Department for allowing me the incredible opportunity to do a ride-along last night," said Flemming. "It was an eye-opening experience that truly showcased the significance of our police force in maintaining community safety. As your next representative in Washington DC, I pledge to ensure our city has the necessary resources to equip our brave officers properly. A special thanks to Officer Navarro for allowing me to ride along and see first-hand the dedication involved in keeping us safe. Together, we can make a difference!"
|
---
**Americans for Prosperity Endorses Flemming Larsen**

Last Monday, Flemming was endorsed by the group Americans for Prosperity: "Thrilled to announce I've received the endorsement from Americans for Prosperity," said Flemming. "Committed to fighting for Nevada families when elected to Congress. Let's make a difference together!"
|
---
** Follow Us On Social Media!**

Stay connected with our campaign! Follow us at the links below: Facebook: [https://www.facebook.com/](https://contact.larsenfornevada.com/l/krxgxyWMNTwUUFkZETDS892A/Xda3NO8kMRhBzwZtmKzmaA/892x8927QqRR763gTYqalS86m84w) Instagram: [https://www.instagram.com/](https://contact.larsenfornevada.com/l/krxgxyWMNTwUUFkZETDS892A/BebR8Ug6y4a2gcWuDuVaPg/892x8927QqRR763gTYqalS86m84w) X: [https://twitter.com/](https://contact.larsenfornevada.com/l/krxgxyWMNTwUUFkZETDS892A/P9jaZzpni2jPzLwB0AkDWg/892x8927QqRR763gTYqalS86m84w)
|
---

** SUPPORT OUR CAMPAIGN!**
With your help, we can defeat Dina Titus and replace her with a common-sense Republican who will work shoulder-to-shoulder with our next Republican President.
[Contribute Today!](https://contact.larsenfornevada.com/l/krxgxyWMNTwUUFkZETDS892A/wiL4zH7uy763MnlO4tTJnp5Q/892x8927QqRR763gTYqalS86m84w)
|
---
| [](https://contact.larsenfornevada.com/l/krxgxyWMNTwUUFkZETDS892A/Xda3NO8kMRhBzwZtmKzmaA/892x8927QqRR763gTYqalS86m84w) | [](https://contact.larsenfornevada.com/l/krxgxyWMNTwUUFkZETDS892A/BebR8Ug6y4a2gcWuDuVaPg/892x8927QqRR763gTYqalS86m84w) | [](https://contact.larsenfornevada.com/l/krxgxyWMNTwUUFkZETDS892A/P9jaZzpni2jPzLwB0AkDWg/892x8927QqRR763gTYqalS86m84w)
---|---|---
| Paid for by Friends of Flemming Larsen
---
[Unsubscribe Here](https://contact.larsenfornevada.com/unsubscribe/Rnk1pT0PEZ7ZnDWZ763Xda6pZU0u1xeMszDbJSE7E9ass/vw0U2llwHzmI892gcKK9VlzA/892x8927QqRR763gTYqalS86m84w)

name: Jessica Spindle
subject: Volunteers Check in!!! April 15
body:
Good Evening everyone,

You are receiving this because you have signed up to help Gabe Evan Campaign for Congress. This email is to start to figure out where everyone would prefer to help us.

If you could reply back to this email with your name, and what you would like to have us contact you about helping with, that way we can limit the many emails going into your inbox. PLease let me know as many of the catogatories you are interested in. Lastly let me know if you got more than one email about this, it may be that I have your information twice.

I'll help staff a campaign kiosk at public events.
I'll join Gabe's campaign in a parade.
I want to lead a team of volunteers in my area.

I'll assist with Door to door canvassing.
I'll help dial voters with Gabe's message.
I would like Gabe to speak at my church, business or organization.
I'm an employer and need Gabe's content for: newsletters, emails, digital marquee, etc.
I'll help deliver yard signs

Thank you again for any time that you can offer the campaign. If you have any questions, please contact Jessica, at Jessica@electgabeevans,com or calling 720-691-0565

\--

**_Jessica Spindle_**
720-691-0565
[jessica@electgabeevans.com](mailto:jessica@electgabeevans.com)

name: James Carville
subject: pulling my hair out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
|
---
Peter, I’ve been pulling my hair out trying to figure out if there is ANYTHING I can say to convince you to donate $15 today to Jacky Rosen and Defeat Republicans to keep Nevada and the Senate blue.
* What if I told you Jacky Rosen is the most vulnerable Democratic woman in the Senate in an election year where reproductive freedom is on the line?

* What if I told you Jacky's GOP opponent was handpicked by Mitch McConnell and that he just set a new fundraising record to buy this seat?

* What if I told you that polling shows Jacky _neck and neck_ with her GOP opponent, and the only way she can pull ahead is with your immediate support?

name: Kevin Hern
subject: 2nd Class Citizens
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Conservative Victory Fund
body:
doesn’t add up

|
---

Fellow American,

Do you ever feel like the Democrats just don’t make sense? I sure do. Here’s the latest:

The Radical Left just earmarked **$380 MILLION in border security funds TO DEFEND AND PROTECT THE MIDDLE EAST, but the Southern Border seems not to receive the same amount of ATTENTION.**

Can you explain how the Left sees the protection of the Middle East as more **IMPORTANT** than the protection of **AMERICAN CITIZENS?** The Left seems to have gotten their priorities **MIXED UP.**

**[SECURE THE SOUTHERN BORDER!](http://links.houseconservatives.org/u/click?_t=a828c22267f2452d9c778060a3aea04e&_m=c8e22129c07c45ffb1407f71924d9d46&_e=RS8bxSZPEaPorcMLMPoHCK91sy-vrP-Z1i9mgfQq8J8osvwcm7WC4StwT4B_lrr7Ws6xDIW1KV8VtR24alUvYEhdUgQkS34ywoWzOPucMdit5PO68HjTQr23h_8GIOrfXCUQkj2AY_dPTYrRO_QtlhIjsEXnRDzA0ze6CRmYrpNQE19MuhyJJpHf7ZO_GiW-HeoQlDLpfkab20zHHm1-I0_qFi9z4Ajj7w8-DQ5nonspwYFyPhoql2p5NVW09ABz0p2tCFFuY9qBPh6csunYVWzDdoyKBRS--T78ouX1QxAlYy6FR75shTIpgUbhf7Lwkz_bzAe4KQ8aPmN06kdkn-7md4QPwAAStIbvG-F0Tro%3D)**
What did the American people do to deserve this 2nd class treatment? Why are we now in a country that FORGETS about the SAFETY of its own citizens? I can tell you why:

**The Left has NEVER PUT AMERICANS FIRST. Americans only come first when they need their VOTE. After that, they become 2nd class citizens.**

I am NOT like that. You have been my **TOP PRIORITY** since Day One. Your safety and security have always and will always come first. Can you explain how the Left sees the protection of the Middle East as more IMPORTANT than the protection of AMERICAN CITIZENS? The Left seems to have gotten their priorities MIXED UP. Folks,

I’m more nervous than a cat in a room full of rocking chairs.

I reached out the other day about how I won’t be able to hold down the front lines much longer without the resources and support from strong conservatives like yourself.

A LOT of my supporters responded, but I was just alerted – you still have not.

My request is simple. I just need $1 from you, Friend.

If you feel up to the task of pitching in, you can do so here: **[[LINK]](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=91e415986b974efa9aabd2041fcd4902&_e=n9R2myOA8Rn6Nbpj7NRwLAqqNJExqvhKylBqI9RIhogc5s9Q5HreGOGuA5-kjPKcI5uxHyloUsQcPDJJb0Az1UOATjS2xOvsxIvulxpcSW53pLJBIJ_TtJEvrihiezcg7Ay4le0kAuXcKYPhJv_HRseuwt69vCkbLft0hsQf9lnQCSR5v4lchgc7PMyaaAQPtq-xwQ9K3UPwdc95LAkAofXABrnx7RlKVtFP2eaImo4q15Q84HS2LvLIaCxaSYGr4tvfOydLEpbenu8MfDCsOQ3nM9kNBFUSLPQAUmS0555nlMhwcyKqdJLPO2mpqVUltjiGADXH2t3q3V1PVtoKNmlArlU2rQZqVpzUupJcmcf9T-FsZkNLS_qoph7CacPv)**

-JNK

I'm up a creek without a paddle, and my pirogue just sprung a huge leak.

I can manage to hold down the front lines, but I won’t be able to much longer without the resources and support from strong, conservative patriots like yourself.

I won’t take up any more of your precious time, but just know I rely on folks like you who are willing to do what it takes to preserve American Freedom!

Senator Kennedy

I reached out the other day about how I won’t be able to hold down the front lines much longer without the resources and support from strong conservatives like yourself. A LOT of my supporters responded, but I was just alerted – you still have not. My request is simple. I just need $1 from you, Friend. If you feel up to the task of pitching in, you can do so here: [[LINK]]() -JNK \- - - Begin forwarded message - - - Folks, I'm up a creek without a paddle, and my pirogue just sprung a huge leak. I'm giving it all I got to stand up for you and our Conservative values, but everywhere I turn, there are more and more of them woke loonies. I can manage to hold down the front lines, but I won’t be able to much longer without the resources and support from strong, conservative patriots like yourself. Friend, even if you can chip in $1, it’ll go a long way in eliminating woke ideologies from the halls of our government! **It was part of a nationwide scheme by the Trump campaign to desperately cling to power — _and thankfully, we stopped them right in their tracks here in Pennsylvania._**
But almost four years later, these MAGA attacks on our democracy haven’t stopped. If anything, _they’ve gotten even more extreme._
That’s why I’m fighting so hard to win this race and prevent these extremists from taking power across Pennsylvania — _but I can’t do it by myself._

| | Peter,

There are just 65 days until the Republican U.S. Senate Primary in Virginia.

I know that seems like a really long time, but for us at Team Cao, it’s crunch time.

You probably don’t have elections at the forefront of your mind and that’s okay. **But here’s one thing I DO need you to focus on: our mid-month deadline TOMORROW NIGHT at MIDNIGHT.**

It only takes a few minutes, but you could be the donor that pushes us over the edge to take back the Senate.

**[**Can you pitch in before tomorrow at midnight to help us meet our FIRST mid-month deadline of the new quarter?**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=4b82b6acd0b14070b66b127260362ca4&_e=jaoFAoGyOoI4USkjHvG-fqzhcq56TnwtQaKCQgeNE8HCeItvrYlj0uZBHnnI0RI2CScqZpwnQVvMhJIHZR0JD_P6r5KU-G8WTSi7Y1NTnViz2KZNmW6Z1ZrDhiUsx6DSGOg30jUXax3lOyy3jaraaZhvTNSdooGCVk5JJTsyRmEk2gPuSIplUfoYOOMrUQjbNIhnNi9zriT1H7ISXy-r6j7CDtFhDgqtOrRBBWJtoxBvs5V-3ajgGWwEHQmOoBtj1Cp_6nohQqxJhS_tXtr-CNtJ1JyG7iur9roHhN1C1cPZovPWfbxuqTYlNn6BK52EyE5soFyOYLBi6bMWkJTpW1i2-sezHKJcxGODUKN0APc%3D)**

With Tim Kaine raking in MAJOR money, we can’t afford to miss this goal, Peter.

clean_body: The special elections on April 16th are incredibly high stakes for state Democrats, and Republicans are set on destroying our majority in the Michigan House. | | | | | ---|--- Polls close in two days in Michigan’s majority-defining special elections. Two days to mobilize voters to the polls. Two days to protect our majority from an extreme Republican takeover. Two days to win two critical special elections in the Michigan House. The April 16th specials are make-or-break for Democrats’ House majority. Michigan is a priority state for Republicans this year, and they have their eyes set on flipping control of the chamber. Thanks to supporters like you, we finished our first quarter of 2024 strong. But that doesn’t mean we can just stand back. The NRCC is doing everything in its power to expand their slim majority – **which means they are going to flood money right into this district in an attempt to elect Mary Jo “MAGA Mary” Guinchard.**

This is our first mid-month deadline of the new quarter and the first deadline since the GOP awarded their endorsement to my opponent. [Can you chip in $10 or any amount right away to show our opponents we are not slowing down our fight anytime soon?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83030442/467064464/235565535?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20240414_FR_MMFR_0_3MO_TeamGottheimer_NA_NA_MMFR1.2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjBiM2M4NC1iNmZhLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PbqAiIi5J5oD94ECdBzeRucf_czTsW9RNEDFK6cVl7o=)

We are only a few days away from our April mid-month fundraising deadline, and we’ve set a goal of raising $5,000. In a moment, I’m going to explain why this deadline is so important – = | = Thanks to supporters like you, we finished our first quarter of 2024 strong. But that doesn’t mean we can just stand back. The NRCC is doing everything in its power to expand their slim majority – which means they are going to flood money right into this district in an attempt to elect Mary Jo “MAGA Mary” Guinchard. This is our first mid-month deadline of the new quarter and the first deadline since the GOP awarded their endorsement to my opponent. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = – Josh Gottheimer | Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. A top concern for our campaign is the tremendous impact that the climate crisis has had on public health.

Having worked in health care for decades, Cinde has seen air pollution causing asthma attacks, extreme heat waves killing the elderly and unhoused, more severe storms causing flooding and issues like gastrointestinal illnesses.

As Executive Councilor, Cinde’s worked directly with cities and towns in her district to connect them with emergency services in serious climate-related disasters—from power outages to floods. In that role, she’s seen the devastating impact of climate change on families firsthand.

**No matter what Republicans may say, climate change is not a problem for the future. It’s something that we need to address now.**

But it’s not just the climate crisis. There’s a lot of major environmental issues we’re facing right here in the Granite State. That’s why we need to hear from 1,000 of our supporters right now on which is the biggest concern for them.
